```csharp
using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel;
using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.Input;
using CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Financials;
using CondoSphere.Mobile.Services;

namespace CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels
{
    [QueryProperty(nameof(Quota), "Quota")]
    public partial class QuotaDetailsViewModel : ObservableObject
    {
        [ObservableProperty]
        private UnitQuotaDto quota;

        [ObservableProperty]
        private QuotaBreakdownDto breakdown;

        [ObservableProperty]
        private bool isBusy;

        private readonly ApiClient _apiClient;

        public QuotaDetailsViewModel(ApiClient apiClient)
        {
            _apiClient = apiClient;
        }

        partial void OnQuotaChanged(UnitQuotaDto value)
        {
            if (value != null)
            {
                System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine($"[DEBUG] QuotaDetailsViewModel: Quota set - {value.Description}");
                _ = LoadBreakdownAsync();
            }
        }

        private async Task LoadBreakdownAsync()
        {
            if (Quota == null || IsBusy) return;

            IsBusy = true;
            try
            {
                System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine($"[DEBUG] Loading breakdown for quota {Quota.Id}");
                var result = await _apiClient.GetQuotaBreakdownAsync(Quota.Id);
                if (result != null)
                {
                    Breakdown = result;
                    System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine($"[DEBUG] Breakdown loaded successfully");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine($"[DEBUG] LoadBreakdownAsync Error: {ex.Message}");
                await Shell.Current.DisplayAlert("Error", $"Failed to load quota details: {ex.Message}", "OK");
            }
            finally
            {
                IsBusy = false;
            }
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task PayNowAsync()
        {
            if (Quota == null) return;

            // Construct the payment URL for the web app
            // This should match your web app's URL structure
            var paymentUrl = $"{ApiClient.WebBaseUrl}/portal/quotas/{Quota.Id}/pay";

            System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine($"[DEBUG] Opening payment URL: {paymentUrl}");

            try
            {
                // Open the payment page in the device's default browser
                await Launcher.OpenAsync(paymentUrl);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine($"[DEBUG] PayNowAsync Error: {ex.Message}");
                await Shell.Current.DisplayAlert("Error", $"Could not open payment page: {ex.Message}", "OK");
            }
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task UploadProofAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                var result = await MediaPicker.PickPhotoAsync(new MediaPickerOptions
                {
                    Title = "Select payment proof (bank transfer screenshot, receipt, etc.)"
                });

                if (result != null)
                {
                    IsBusy = true;
                    System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine($"[DEBUG] Uploading proof for quota {Quota.Id}");

                    var success = await _apiClient.SubmitPaymentProofAsync(Quota.Id, result);

                    if (success)
                    {
                        await Shell.Current.DisplayAlert("Success",
                            "Payment proof uploaded successfully. The manager will review and confirm your payment.",
                            "OK");

                        // Update the quota status locally to reflect the change
                        Quota.Status = Core.Enums.UnitQuotaStatus.PendingConfirmation;
                        OnPropertyChanged(nameof(Quota));

                        // Navigate back to the portal
                        await Shell.Current.GoToAsync("..");
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        await Shell.Current.DisplayAlert("Error", "Failed to upload payment proof. Please try again.", "OK");
                    }
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine($"[DEBUG] UploadProofAsync Error: {ex.Message}");
                await Shell.Current.DisplayAlert("Error", $"Could not upload proof: {ex.Message}", "OK");
            }
            finally
            {
                IsBusy = false;
            }
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task GoBackAsync()
        {
            await Shell.Current.GoToAsync("..");
        }
    }
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/ViewModels/SendNoticeViewModel.cs
```csharp
using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel;
using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.Input;
using CondoSphere.Mobile.Services;

namespace CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels
{
    [QueryProperty(nameof(CondoId), "CondoId")]
    public partial class SendNoticeViewModel : ObservableObject
    {
        private readonly ApiClient _apiClient;

        [ObservableProperty]
        private bool isBusy;

        [ObservableProperty]
        private int condoId;

        [ObservableProperty]
        private string subject;

        [ObservableProperty]
        private string message;

        public SendNoticeViewModel(ApiClient apiClient)
        {
            _apiClient = apiClient;
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task SendNoticeAsync()
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Subject) || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Message))
            {
                await Shell.Current.DisplayAlert("Validation Error", "Please fill in both the subject and the message.", "OK");
                return;
            }

            if (IsBusy) return;

            IsBusy = true;
            try
            {
                var dto = new AnnouncementDto { Subject = this.Subject, Message = this.Message };
                var (success, responseMessage) = await _apiClient.SendAnnouncementAsync(CondoId, dto);

                if (success)
                {
                    await Shell.Current.DisplayAlert("Success", responseMessage, "OK");
                    await Shell.Current.GoToAsync("..");
                }
                else
                {
                    await Shell.Current.DisplayAlert("Error", responseMessage, "OK");
                }
            }
            finally
            {
                IsBusy = false;
            }
        }
    }
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/ViewModels/UnitListViewModel.cs
```csharp
using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel;
using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.Input;
using CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Condominiums;
using CondoSphere.Mobile.Services;
using System.Collections.ObjectModel;
using System.Linq;

namespace CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels
{
    [QueryProperty(nameof(CondoId), "CondoId")]
    public partial class UnitListViewModel : ObservableObject
    {
        private readonly ApiClient _apiClient;

        [ObservableProperty]
        private bool isBusy;

        [ObservableProperty]
        private int condoId;

        public ObservableCollection<UnitDto> Units { get; } = new();

        public UnitListViewModel(ApiClient apiClient)
        {
            _apiClient = apiClient;
        }

        async partial void OnCondoIdChanged(int value)
        {
            if (value > 0)
            {
                await LoadUnitsAsync();
            }
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task LoadUnitsAsync()
        {
            if (IsBusy)
                return;

            IsBusy = true;
            try
            {
                Units.Clear();
                var unitList = await _apiClient.GetUnitsForCondominiumAsync(CondoId);
                if (unitList != null)
                {
                    foreach (var unit in unitList.OrderBy(u => u.Identifier))
                    {
                        Units.Add(unit);
                    }
                }
            }
            catch (System.Exception ex)
            {
                await Shell.Current.DisplayAlert("Error", $"Failed to load units: {ex.Message}", "OK");
            }
            finally
            {
                IsBusy = false;
            }
        }
    }
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/ViewModels/UserListAdminViewModel.cs
```csharp
using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel;
using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.Input;
using CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Account;
using CondoSphere.Mobile.Services;
using System.Collections.ObjectModel;

namespace CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels
{
    public partial class UserListAdminViewModel : ObservableObject
    {
        private readonly ApiClient _apiClient;

        [ObservableProperty]
        private bool isBusy;

        // This collection will be bound to the UI
        public ObservableCollection<UserListDto> Users { get; } = new();

        public UserListAdminViewModel(ApiClient apiClient)
        {
            _apiClient = apiClient;
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task LoadUsersAsync()
        {
            if (IsBusy)
                return;

            IsBusy = true;
            try
            {
                Users.Clear();

                var userList = await _apiClient.GetUsersAsync();
                if (userList != null)
                {
                    foreach (var user in userList)
                    {
                        Users.Add(user);
                    }
                }
            }
            catch (System.Exception ex)
            {
                await Shell.Current.DisplayAlert("Error", $"Failed to load users: {ex.Message}", "OK");
            }
            finally
            {
                IsBusy = false;
            }
        }
    }
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/Views/AddExpensePage.xaml
```
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<ContentPage xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels"
             xmlns:storage="clr-namespace:Microsoft.Maui.Storage;assembly=Microsoft.Maui.Essentials"
             x:DataType="vm:AddExpenseViewModel"
             x:Class="CondoSphere.Mobile.Views.AddExpensePage"
             BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BackgroundSecondary}"
             Title="Add Expense">

    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
        <!-- Header -->
        <Frame Grid.Row="0" BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Primary}" CornerRadius="24" HasShadow="False" Padding="24,40,24,24" Margin="0,0,0,20">
            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8">
                <Label Text="💰 Add New Expense" Style="{StaticResource HeadingMedium}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" />
                <Label Text="Record a new one-time expense for this property." Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" Opacity="0.9" />
            </VerticalStackLayout>
        </Frame>

        <!-- Form Content -->
        <ScrollView Grid.Row="1">
            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="24" Padding="20,0,20,40">

                <!-- Main Details Card -->
                <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}">
                    <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="16">
                        <Entry Placeholder="Expense Title (e.g., 'Lobby Painting')" Text="{Binding Title}" Style="{StaticResource EntryDefault}" />
                        <Entry Placeholder="Amount (€)" Text="{Binding Amount}" Keyboard="Numeric" Style="{StaticResource EntryDefault}" />
                        <DatePicker Date="{Binding ExpenseDate}" />
                        <Editor Placeholder="Description (optional)" Text="{Binding Description}" AutoSize="TextChanges" HeightRequest="100" Style="{StaticResource EditorDefault}" />
                    </VerticalStackLayout>
                </Frame>

                <!-- Attachments Card -->
                <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}">
                    <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="16">
                        <Label Text="📎 Attachments (Optional)" Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />

                        <CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding Attachments}">
                            <CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
                                <!-- The x:DataType here is the crucial fix -->
                                <DataTemplate x:DataType="storage:FileResult">
                                    <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto" Padding="0,8">
                                        <Label Text="{Binding FileName}" VerticalOptions="Center" />
                                        <Button Grid.Column="1" 
                                                Text="Remove" 
                                                Command="{Binding Source={RelativeSource AncestorType={x:Type vm:AddExpenseViewModel}}, Path=RemoveFileCommand}" 
                                                CommandParameter="{Binding .}" 
                                                FontSize="Small" 
                                                HeightRequest="40" />
                                    </Grid>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
                        </CollectionView>

                        <Button Text="Add Files" Command="{Binding PickFilesCommand}" Style="{StaticResource ButtonOutline}" />
                    </VerticalStackLayout>
                </Frame>
                <Button Text="Save Expense" Command="{Binding SaveExpenseCommand}" Style="{StaticResource ButtonPrimary}" IsEnabled="{Binding IsBusy, Converter={StaticResource InverseBoolConverter}}" />
                <ActivityIndicator IsRunning="{Binding IsBusy}" IsVisible="{Binding IsBusy}" HorizontalOptions="Center" />
            </VerticalStackLayout>
        </ScrollView>
    </Grid>
</ContentPage>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/Views/ChangePasswordPage.xaml
```
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<ContentPage xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels"
             x:DataType="vm:ChangePasswordViewModel"
             x:Class="CondoSphere.Mobile.Views.ChangePasswordPage"
             BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BackgroundSecondary}"
             Title="Change Password">

    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">

        <!-- Loading Overlay -->
        <Frame Grid.RowSpan="2" 
               BackgroundColor="#80000000"
               IsVisible="{Binding IsBusy}"
               ZIndex="999" Padding="0">
            <ActivityIndicator IsRunning="{Binding IsBusy}" 
                             Color="{StaticResource Primary}"
                             HeightRequest="48"
                             WidthRequest="48"
                             VerticalOptions="Center" 
                             HorizontalOptions="Center" />
        </Frame>

        <!-- Header -->
        <Frame Grid.Row="0"
               BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Primary}"
               CornerRadius="24"
               HasShadow="False"
               Padding="24,40,24,24"
               Margin="0,0,0,20">
            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8">
                <Label Text="🔐 Change Your Password" 
                       Style="{StaticResource HeadingMedium}"
                       TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" />
                <Label Text="Use a strong, unique password to keep your account secure."
                       Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                       TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}"
                       Opacity="0.9" />
            </VerticalStackLayout>
        </Frame>

        <!-- Form Content -->
        <ScrollView Grid.Row="1">
            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="24" Padding="20,0,20,40">

                <!-- Current Password -->
                <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}">
                    <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8">
                        <Label Text="Current Password" Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />
                        <Entry Placeholder="Enter your current password" 
                               Text="{Binding CurrentPassword}" 
                               IsPassword="True"
                               Style="{StaticResource EntryDefault}" />
                    </VerticalStackLayout>
                </Frame>

                <!-- New Password -->
                <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}">
                    <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8">
                        <Label Text="New Password" Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />
                        <Entry Placeholder="Enter your new password" 
                               Text="{Binding NewPassword}" 
                               IsPassword="True"
                               Style="{StaticResource EntryDefault}" />
                    </VerticalStackLayout>
                </Frame>

                <!-- Confirm New Password -->
                <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}">
                    <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8">
                        <Label Text="Confirm New Password" Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />
                        <Entry Placeholder="Confirm your new password" 
                               Text="{Binding ConfirmPassword}" 
                               IsPassword="True"
                               Style="{StaticResource EntryDefault}" />
                    </VerticalStackLayout>
                </Frame>

                <!-- Action Button -->
                <Button Text="Update Password" 
                        Command="{Binding ChangePasswordCommand}"
                        Style="{StaticResource ButtonPrimary}"
                        Margin="0,16,0,0" />

            </VerticalStackLayout>
        </ScrollView>
    </Grid>
</ContentPage>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/Views/ComposeMessagePage.xaml
```
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<ContentPage x:Class="CondoSphere.Mobile.Views.ComposeMessagePage"
             xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels"
             xmlns:services="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.Services"
             x:DataType="vm:ComposeMessageViewModel"
             Title="Compose Message">

    <ContentPage.ToolbarItems>
        <ToolbarItem Text="Send" 
                     Command="{Binding SendMessageCommand}"
                     IconImageSource="send.png" />
    </ContentPage.ToolbarItems>

    <ScrollView BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BackgroundPrimary}">
        <StackLayout Padding="20" Spacing="20">

            <!-- Recipient Selection -->
            <Frame BackgroundColor="{StaticResource SurfacePrimary}" 
                   BorderColor="Transparent" 
                   CornerRadius="10" 
                   Padding="15">

                <StackLayout Spacing="10">
                    <Label Text="To:" 
                           FontAttributes="Bold" 
                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextPrimary}" />

                    <Picker ItemsSource="{Binding Contacts}"
                            SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedContact}"
                            ItemDisplayBinding="{Binding FullName}"
                            Title="Select recipient..."
                            BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BackgroundPrimary}"
                            TextColor="{StaticResource TextPrimary}" />

                    <Label Text="Please select a recipient" 
                           TextColor="{StaticResource Danger}" 
                           FontSize="12"
                           IsVisible="{Binding SelectedContact, Converter={StaticResource IsNullConverter}}" />
                </StackLayout>
            </Frame>

            <!-- Subject -->
            <Frame BackgroundColor="{StaticResource SurfacePrimary}" 
                   BorderColor="Transparent" 
                   CornerRadius="10" 
                   Padding="15">

                <StackLayout Spacing="10">
                    <Label Text="Subject:" 
                           FontAttributes="Bold" 
                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextPrimary}" />

                    <Entry Text="{Binding Subject}"
                           Placeholder="Enter message subject..."
                           BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BackgroundPrimary}"
                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextPrimary}"
                           PlaceholderColor="{StaticResource Gray500}"
                           MaxLength="150" />

                    <Label Text="Subject is required" 
                           TextColor="{StaticResource Danger}" 
                           FontSize="12"
                           IsVisible="{Binding Subject, Converter={StaticResource StringToBoolConverter}, ConverterParameter='Inverse'}" />
                </StackLayout>
            </Frame>

            <!-- Message Content -->
            <Frame BackgroundColor="{StaticResource SurfacePrimary}" 
                   BorderColor="Transparent" 
                   CornerRadius="10" 
                   Padding="15">

                <StackLayout Spacing="10">
                    <Label Text="Message:" 
                           FontAttributes="Bold" 
                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextPrimary}" />

                    <Editor Text="{Binding Content}"
                            Placeholder="Type your message here..."
                            BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BackgroundPrimary}"
                            TextColor="{StaticResource TextPrimary}"
                            PlaceholderColor="{StaticResource Gray500}"
                            HeightRequest="200"
                            AutoSize="TextChanges"
                            MaxLength="2000" />

                    <StackLayout Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalOptions="End">
                        <Label Text="{Binding Content.Length}" 
                               TextColor="{StaticResource Gray600}" 
                               FontSize="12" />
                        <Label Text="/2000" 
                               TextColor="{StaticResource Gray600}" 
                               FontSize="12" />
                    </StackLayout>

                    <Label Text="Message is required" 
                           TextColor="{StaticResource Danger}" 
                           FontSize="12"
                           IsVisible="{Binding Content, Converter={StaticResource StringToBoolConverter}, ConverterParameter='Inverse'}" />
                </StackLayout>
            </Frame>

            <!-- Building Context (if applicable) -->
            <Frame BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Info}" 
                   BorderColor="Transparent" 
                   CornerRadius="10" 
                   Padding="15"
                   IsVisible="{Binding CondominiumId, Converter={StaticResource IsNotNullConverter}}">

                <StackLayout Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="10">
                    <Label Text="🏢" FontSize="20" />
                    <Label Text="This message is related to a specific building"
                           TextColor="White" 
                           FontSize="14"
                           VerticalOptions="Center" />
                </StackLayout>
            </Frame>

            <!-- Action Buttons -->
            <StackLayout Orientation="Horizontal" 
                        HorizontalOptions="Center" 
                        Spacing="15" 
                        Margin="0,20,0,0">

                <Button Text="Send Message"
                        Command="{Binding SendMessageCommand}"
                        BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Primary}"
                        TextColor="White"
                        CornerRadius="25"
                        WidthRequest="150"
                        HeightRequest="50"
                        IsEnabled="{Binding IsBusy, Converter={StaticResource InverseBoolConverter}}" />

                <Button Text="Cancel"
                        Command="{Binding CancelCommand}"
                        BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Gray200}"
                        TextColor="{StaticResource TextPrimary}"
                        CornerRadius="25"
                        WidthRequest="120"
                        HeightRequest="50"
                        IsEnabled="{Binding IsBusy, Converter={StaticResource InverseBoolConverter}}" />

            </StackLayout>

            <!-- Loading indicator -->
            <ActivityIndicator IsVisible="{Binding IsBusy}" 
                              IsRunning="{Binding IsBusy}"
                              Color="{StaticResource Primary}" 
                              HorizontalOptions="Center" 
                              Margin="0,20,0,0" />

        </StackLayout>
    </ScrollView>

</ContentPage>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/Views/EditProfilePage.xaml
```
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>

<ContentPage xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml"
xmlns:vm="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels"
xmlns:behaviors="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.Behaviors"
x:DataType="vm:EditProfileViewModel"
x:Class="CondoSphere.Mobile.Views.EditProfilePage"
BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BackgroundSecondary}"
Title="Edit Profile">

    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">

        <!-- Loading Overlay -->
        <Frame Grid.RowSpan="2" BackgroundColor="#80000000" IsVisible="{Binding IsBusy}" ZIndex="999" Padding="0">
            <ActivityIndicator IsRunning="{Binding IsBusy}" Color="{StaticResource Primary}" HeightRequest="48" WidthRequest="48" VerticalOptions="Center" HorizontalOptions="Center" />
        </Frame>

        <!-- Header -->
        <Frame Grid.Row="0" BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Primary}" CornerRadius="24" HasShadow="False" Padding="24,40,24,24" Margin="0,0,0,20">
            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8">
                <Label Text="✏️ Edit Your Profile" Style="{StaticResource HeadingMedium}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" />
                <Label Text="Update your personal information below." Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" Opacity="0.9" />
            </VerticalStackLayout>
        </Frame>

        <!-- Form Content -->
        <ScrollView Grid.Row="1">
            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="24" Padding="20,0,20,40">

                <!-- Profile Picture Section -->
                <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}">
                    <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="16" HorizontalOptions="Center">
                        <Label Text="Profile Picture" Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />
                        <Image Source="{Binding ProfileImageSource}" Aspect="AspectFill" HeightRequest="120" WidthRequest="120">
                            <Image.Clip>
                                <EllipseGeometry RadiusX="60" RadiusY="60" Center="60,60"/>
                            </Image.Clip>
                            <Image.Behaviors>
                                <behaviors:ImageLoadingBehavior />
                            </Image.Behaviors>
                        </Image>
                        <Button Text="📷 Choose New Photo" Command="{Binding PickPhotoCommand}" Style="{StaticResource ButtonOutline}" />
                    </VerticalStackLayout>
                </Frame>

                <!-- Personal Details Section -->
                <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}">
                    <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="16">
                        <Label Text="Personal Details" Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />

                        <Entry Placeholder="First Name" Text="{Binding FirstName}" Style="{StaticResource EntryDefault}" />
                        <Entry Placeholder="Last Name" Text="{Binding LastName}" Style="{StaticResource EntryDefault}" />
                        <Entry Placeholder="Phone Number" Text="{Binding PhoneNumber}" Keyboard="Telephone" Style="{StaticResource EntryDefault}" />
                    </VerticalStackLayout>
                </Frame>

                <!-- Action Buttons -->
                <Button Text="Save Changes" Command="{Binding SaveProfileCommand}" Style="{StaticResource ButtonPrimary}" Margin="0,16,0,0" />
                <Button Text="Cancel" Command="{Binding CancelCommand}" Style="{StaticResource ButtonGhost}" />

            </VerticalStackLayout>
        </ScrollView>
    </Grid>
</ContentPage>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/Views/EmployeeTasksPage.xaml
```
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<ContentPage xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels"
             xmlns:dto="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.Services"
             x:DataType="vm:EmployeeTasksViewModel"
             x:Class="CondoSphere.Mobile.Views.EmployeeTasksPage"
             BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BackgroundSecondary}"
             Title="My Tasks">

    <!-- Add Toolbar Icon for Profile -->
    <ContentPage.ToolbarItems>
        <ToolbarItem IconImageSource="default_profile.png" Command="{Binding GoToProfileCommand}" Order="Primary" Priority="0" />
    </ContentPage.ToolbarItems>

    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto, *">

        <!-- Header -->
        <Frame Grid.Row="0" BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Primary}" CornerRadius="24" HasShadow="False" Padding="24,40,24,24" Margin="0,0,0,20">
            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8">
                <Label Text="🔧 My Tasks" Style="{StaticResource HeadingMedium}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" />
                <Label Text="View all maintenance interventions assigned to you." Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" Opacity="0.9" />
            </VerticalStackLayout>
        </Frame>

        <!-- Task List -->
        <RefreshView Grid.Row="1" IsRefreshing="{Binding IsBusy}" Command="{Binding LoadTasksCommand}">
            <CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding Tasks}"
                            Margin="20,0,20,40"
                            SelectionMode="None">

                <CollectionView.EmptyView>
                    <!-- This wrapper controls the visibility to prevent flickering -->
                    <ContentView IsVisible="{Binding IsBusy, Converter={StaticResource InverseBoolConverter}}">
                        <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Padding="40" Margin="0,40">
                            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="20" HorizontalOptions="Center">
                                <Label Text="✅" FontSize="64" HorizontalOptions="Center" Opacity="0.5" />
                                <Label Text="No Tasks Assigned" Style="{StaticResource SubheadingLarge}" HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />
                                <Label Text="Your task list is clear. Great job!" Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}" HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />
                            </VerticalStackLayout>
                        </Frame>
                    </ContentView>
                </CollectionView.EmptyView>

                <CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
                    <DataTemplate x:DataType="dto:InterventionDto">
                        <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Margin="0,6">
                            <Frame.GestureRecognizers>
                                <TapGestureRecognizer Command="{Binding Source={RelativeSource AncestorType={x:Type vm:EmployeeTasksViewModel}}, Path=GoToTaskDetailsCommand}" 
                                                      CommandParameter="{Binding .}"/>
                            </Frame.GestureRecognizers>
                            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto" ColumnSpacing="16" RowSpacing="8">

                                <!-- Task Description -->
                                <Label Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2"
                                       Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" 
                                       Text="{Binding Description}"
                                       FontAttributes="Bold" />

                                <!-- Scheduled Date -->
                                <Label Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="1" Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}">
                                    <Label.FormattedText>
                                        <FormattedString>
                                            <Span Text="Scheduled for: " TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />
                                            <Span Text="{Binding StartDate, StringFormat='{0:MMM dd, yyyy HH:mm}'}" FontAttributes="Bold" />
                                        </FormattedString>
                                    </Label.FormattedText>
                                </Label>

                                <!-- Status Badge -->
                                <Frame Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="1"
                                       CornerRadius="16"
                                       Padding="12,6"
                                       HasShadow="False"
                                       VerticalOptions="Center"
                                       BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Info}">
                                    <Label Text="{Binding Status}" 
                                           Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" FontAttributes="Bold" />
                                </Frame>
                            </Grid>
                        </Frame>
                    </DataTemplate>
                </CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
            </CollectionView>
        </RefreshView>
    </Grid>
</ContentPage>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/Views/InterventionDetailsPage.xaml
```
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<ContentPage xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels"
             x:DataType="vm:InterventionDetailsViewModel"
             x:Class="CondoSphere.Mobile.Views.InterventionDetailsPage"
             BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BackgroundSecondary}"
             Title="Task Details">

    <ScrollView>
        <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="20" Padding="0,0,0,40">
            <!-- Header -->
            <Frame BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Primary}" CornerRadius="24" HasShadow="False" Padding="24,40,24,24" Margin="0,0,0,10">
                <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8">
                    <Label Text="{Binding OccurrenceDetails.Title}" Style="{StaticResource HeadingMedium}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" />
                    <Label Text="{Binding SelectedTask.StartDate, StringFormat='Scheduled for: {0:dddd, MMM dd, yyyy}'}" Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" Opacity="0.9" />
                </VerticalStackLayout>
            </Frame>

            <!-- Main Content Grid -->
            <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto" ColumnDefinitions="*" RowSpacing="20" Padding="20,0">

                <!-- Assigned Task Card -->
                <Frame Grid.Row="0" Style="{StaticResource CardElevated}">
                    <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="16">
                        <Label Style="{StaticResource SubheadingLarge}">
                            <Label.FormattedText>
                                <FormattedString>
                                    <Span Text="🔧 "/>
                                    <Span Text="Your Assigned Task"/>
                                </FormattedString>
                            </Label.FormattedText>
                        </Label>
                        <Label Text="{Binding SelectedTask.Description}" Style="{StaticResource BodyLarge}" />

                        <Frame CornerRadius="16" Padding="12,6" HasShadow="False" HorizontalOptions="Start" BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Info}">
                            <Label Text="{Binding SelectedTask.Status}" Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" FontAttributes="Bold" />
                        </Frame>
                    </VerticalStackLayout>
                </Frame>

                <!-- Original Report Card -->
                <Frame Grid.Row="1" Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}">
                    <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="16">
                        <Label Text="📋 Original Problem Report" Style="{StaticResource SubheadingLarge}" />

                        <!-- Description -->
                        <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="4">
                            <Label Text="Description:" Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}" FontAttributes="Bold" />
                            <Label Text="{Binding OccurrenceDetails.Description}" Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />
                        </VerticalStackLayout>

                        <!-- Reporter -->
                        <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="4">
                            <Label Text="Reported By:" Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}" FontAttributes="Bold" />
                            <Label Text="{Binding OccurrenceDetails.ReportedByUserName}" Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />
                        </VerticalStackLayout>

                        <!-- Attached Image -->
                        <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="12" IsVisible="{Binding OccurrenceDetails.ImageUrl, Converter={StaticResource IsNotNullConverter}}">
                            <Label Text="Attached Photo:" Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}" FontAttributes="Bold" />
                            <Frame CornerRadius="12" Padding="0" HasShadow="False" BorderColor="{StaticResource BorderPrimary}">
                                <Image Source="{Binding OccurrenceDetails.ImageUrl}" Aspect="AspectFill" HeightRequest="250" />
                            </Frame>
                        </VerticalStackLayout>
                    </VerticalStackLayout>
                </Frame>

            </Grid>
        </VerticalStackLayout>
    </ScrollView>
</ContentPage>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/Views/MessageDetailsPage.xaml
```
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<ContentPage x:Class="CondoSphere.Mobile.Views.MessageDetailsPage"
             xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels"
             x:DataType="vm:MessageDetailsViewModel"
             Title="{Binding Message.Subject}">

    <ContentPage.ToolbarItems>
        <ToolbarItem Text="Reply" 
                     Command="{Binding ReplyCommand}"
                     IconImageSource="reply.png" />
    </ContentPage.ToolbarItems>

    <ScrollView BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BackgroundPrimary}">
        <StackLayout Padding="20" Spacing="15">

            <!-- Message Header -->
            <Frame BackgroundColor="{StaticResource SurfacePrimary}" 
                   BorderColor="Transparent" 
                   CornerRadius="10" 
                   Padding="15">

                <StackLayout Spacing="10">
                    <!-- From/To Info -->
                    <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto" RowSpacing="8">

                        <Label Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0" Text="From:" 
                               FontAttributes="Bold" 
                               TextColor="{StaticResource TextPrimary}" 
                               WidthRequest="80" />
                        <Label Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1" 
                               Text="{Binding Message.SenderName}"
                               TextColor="{StaticResource TextPrimary}" />

                        <Label Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0" Text="To:" 
                               FontAttributes="Bold" 
                               TextColor="{StaticResource TextPrimary}" />
                        <Label Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1" 
                               Text="{Binding Message.ReceiverName}"
                               TextColor="{StaticResource TextPrimary}" />

                        <Label Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="0" Text="Subject:" 
                               FontAttributes="Bold" 
                               TextColor="{StaticResource TextPrimary}" />
                        <Label Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="1" 
                               Text="{Binding Message.Subject}"
                               TextColor="{StaticResource TextPrimary}" 
                               FontAttributes="Bold" />

                        <Label Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="0" Text="Date:" 
                               FontAttributes="Bold" 
                               TextColor="{StaticResource TextPrimary}" />
                        <Label Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="1" 
                               Text="{Binding Message.SentDate, StringFormat='{0:dddd, MMMM dd, yyyy at HH:mm}'}"
                               TextColor="{StaticResource Gray600}" 
                               FontSize="14" />

                    </Grid>

                    <!-- Building Info (if applicable) -->
                    <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*" 
                          IsVisible="{Binding Message.CondominiumName, Converter={StaticResource StringToBoolConverter}}">
                        <Label Grid.Column="0" Text="Building:" 
                               FontAttributes="Bold" 
                               TextColor="{StaticResource TextPrimary}"
                               WidthRequest="80" />
                        <Label Grid.Column="1" 
                               Text="{Binding Message.CondominiumName}"
                               TextColor="{StaticResource Primary}" 
                               FontAttributes="Italic" />
                    </Grid>

                    <!-- Read Status -->
                    <StackLayout Orientation="Horizontal" 
                                IsVisible="{Binding Message.IsRead}">
                        <Label Text="✓" TextColor="{StaticResource Success}" FontSize="16" />
                        <Label Text="{Binding Message.ReadDate, StringFormat='Read on {0:MMM dd, yyyy at HH:mm}'}"
                               TextColor="{StaticResource Success}" 
                               FontSize="12" />
                    </StackLayout>

                </StackLayout>
            </Frame>

            <!-- Message Content -->
            <Frame BackgroundColor="{StaticResource SurfacePrimary}" 
                   BorderColor="Transparent" 
                   CornerRadius="10" 
                   Padding="20">

                <StackLayout>
                    <Label Text="Message:" 
                           FontAttributes="Bold" 
                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextPrimary}" 
                           Margin="0,0,0,10" />

                    <Label Text="{Binding Message.Content}"
                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextPrimary}" 
                           FontSize="16" 
                           LineHeight="1.4" />
                </StackLayout>
            </Frame>

            <!-- Action Buttons -->
            <StackLayout Orientation="Horizontal" 
                        HorizontalOptions="Center" 
                        Spacing="15" 
                        Margin="0,20,0,0">

                <Button Text="Reply"
                        Command="{Binding ReplyCommand}"
                        BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Primary}"
                        TextColor="White"
                        CornerRadius="25"
                        WidthRequest="120"
                        HeightRequest="50" />

                <Button Text="Back"
                        Command="{Binding BackToMessagesCommand}"
                        BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Gray200}"
                        TextColor="{StaticResource TextPrimary}"
                        CornerRadius="25"
                        WidthRequest="120"
                        HeightRequest="50" />

            </StackLayout>

            <!-- Loading indicator -->
            <ActivityIndicator IsVisible="{Binding IsBusy}" 
                              IsRunning="{Binding IsBusy}"
                              Color="{StaticResource Primary}" 
                              HorizontalOptions="Center" 
                              Margin="0,20,0,0" />

        </StackLayout>
    </ScrollView>

</ContentPage>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/Views/PropertyListAdminPage.xaml
```
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<ContentPage xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels"
             xmlns:dto="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Condominiums;assembly=CondoSphere.Core"
             x:DataType="vm:PropertyListAdminViewModel"
             x:Class="CondoSphere.Mobile.Views.PropertyListAdminPage"
             BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BackgroundSecondary}"
             Title="Manage Properties">

    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">

        <!-- Header -->
        <Frame Grid.Row="0" BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Primary}" CornerRadius="24" HasShadow="False" Padding="24,40,24,24" Margin="0,0,0,20">
            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8">
                <Label Text="🏢 Company Properties" Style="{StaticResource HeadingMedium}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" />
                <Label Text="View and manage all properties in your portfolio." Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" Opacity="0.9" />
            </VerticalStackLayout>
        </Frame>

        <!-- Property List -->
        <RefreshView Grid.Row="1" IsRefreshing="{Binding IsBusy}" Command="{Binding LoadPropertiesCommand}">
            <CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding Properties}"
                            Margin="20,0,20,40">
                <CollectionView.EmptyView>
                    <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Padding="40" Margin="0,40">
                        <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="20" HorizontalOptions="Center">
                            <Label Text="🏢" FontSize="64" HorizontalOptions="Center" Opacity="0.5" />
                            <Label Text="No Properties Found" Style="{StaticResource SubheadingLarge}" HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />
                            <Label Text="Add your first property to get started." Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}" HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />
                        </VerticalStackLayout>
                    </Frame>
                </CollectionView.EmptyView>

                <CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
                    <DataTemplate x:DataType="dto:CondominiumDto">
                        <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Margin="0,6">
                            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto" ColumnSpacing="16" RowSpacing="4">
                                <!-- Icon -->
                                <Frame Grid.RowSpan="2" CornerRadius="20" HeightRequest="40" WidthRequest="40" Padding="0" HasShadow="False" BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Primary}">
                                    <Label Text="🏢" FontSize="18" HorizontalOptions="Center" VerticalOptions="Center" />
                                </Frame>

                                <!-- Property Details -->
                                <VerticalStackLayout Grid.Column="1" Grid.RowSpan="2" VerticalOptions="Center">
                                    <Label Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" Text="{Binding Name}" />
                                    <Label Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}" Text="{Binding Address}" />
                                </VerticalStackLayout>
                            </Grid>
                        </Frame>
                    </DataTemplate>
                </CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
            </CollectionView>
        </RefreshView>

    </Grid>
</ContentPage>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/Views/SendNoticePage.xaml
```
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<ContentPage xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels"
             x:DataType="vm:SendNoticeViewModel"
             x:Class="CondoSphere.Mobile.Views.SendNoticePage"
             BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BackgroundSecondary}"
             Title="Send Notice">

    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
        <!-- Header -->
        <Frame Grid.Row="0" BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Primary}" CornerRadius="24" HasShadow="False" Padding="24,40,24,24" Margin="0,0,0,20">
            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8">
                <Label Text="📢 Send Announcement" Style="{StaticResource HeadingMedium}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" />
                <Label Text="Compose a notice for all residents of this property." Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" Opacity="0.9" />
            </VerticalStackLayout>
        </Frame>

        <!-- Form Content -->
        <ScrollView Grid.Row="1">
            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="24" Padding="20,0,20,40">
                <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}">
                    <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="16">
                        <Entry Placeholder="Subject" Text="{Binding Subject}" Style="{StaticResource EntryDefault}" />
                        <Editor Placeholder="Type your message here..." Text="{Binding Message}" AutoSize="TextChanges" HeightRequest="200" Style="{StaticResource EditorDefault}" />
                    </VerticalStackLayout>
                </Frame>

                <Button Text="Send Announcement" Command="{Binding SendNoticeCommand}" Style="{StaticResource ButtonPrimary}" IsEnabled="{Binding IsBusy, Converter={StaticResource InverseBoolConverter}}" />

                <ActivityIndicator IsRunning="{Binding IsBusy}" IsVisible="{Binding IsBusy}" HorizontalOptions="Center" />
            </VerticalStackLayout>
        </ScrollView>
    </Grid>
</ContentPage>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/Views/UnitListPage.xaml
```
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<ContentPage xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels"
             xmlns:dto="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Condominiums;assembly=CondoSphere.Core"
             x:DataType="vm:UnitListViewModel"
             x:Class="CondoSphere.Mobile.Views.UnitListPage"
             BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BackgroundSecondary}"
             Title="Manage Units">

    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
        <!-- Header -->
        <Frame Grid.Row="0" BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Primary}" CornerRadius="24" HasShadow="False" Padding="24,40,24,24" Margin="0,0,0,20">
            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8">
                <Label Text="🏠 Unit Management" Style="{StaticResource HeadingMedium}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" />
                <Label Text="View and manage all units in this property." Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" Opacity="0.9" />
            </VerticalStackLayout>
        </Frame>

        <!-- Unit List -->
        <RefreshView Grid.Row="1" IsRefreshing="{Binding IsBusy}" Command="{Binding LoadUnitsCommand}">
            <CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding Units}"
                            Margin="20,0,20,40">
                <CollectionView.EmptyView>
                    <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Padding="40" Margin="0,40">
                        <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="20" HorizontalOptions="Center">
                            <Label Text="🚪" FontSize="64" HorizontalOptions="Center" Opacity="0.5" />
                            <Label Text="No Units Found" Style="{StaticResource SubheadingLarge}" HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />
                            <Label Text="This property doesn't have any units yet." Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}" HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />
                        </VerticalStackLayout>
                    </Frame>
                </CollectionView.EmptyView>

                <CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
                    <DataTemplate x:DataType="dto:UnitDto">
                        <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Margin="0,6">
                            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto" ColumnSpacing="16" RowSpacing="4">
                                <!-- Unit Identifier -->
                                <Label Grid.Column="0" Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" Text="{Binding Identifier}" />

                                <!-- Resident Info -->
                                <Label Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="1" Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}">
                                    <Label.FormattedText>
                                        <FormattedString>
                                            <Span Text="Resident: " TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />
                                            <Span Text="{Binding Resident.FullName, FallbackValue='Vacant'}" FontAttributes="Bold" TextColor="{Binding Resident, Converter={StaticResource IsNotNullConverter}, ConverterParameter={x:StaticResource Primary}}" />
                                        </FormattedString>
                                    </Label.FormattedText>
                                </Label>

                                <!-- Status Badge -->
                                <Frame Grid.Column="1" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                                       CornerRadius="16"
                                       Padding="12,6"
                                       HasShadow="False"
                                       VerticalOptions="Center"
                                       BackgroundColor="{Binding Resident, Converter={StaticResource IsNotNullConverter}, ConverterParameter={x:StaticResource Info}}">
                                    <Label Text="{Binding Resident, Converter={StaticResource IsNotNullConverter}, ConverterParameter='Occupied,Vacant'}" 
                                           Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" FontAttributes="Bold" />
                                </Frame>
                            </Grid>
                        </Frame>
                    </DataTemplate>
                </CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
            </CollectionView>
        </RefreshView>
    </Grid>
</ContentPage>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/Views/UserListAdminPage.xaml
```
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<ContentPage xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels"
             xmlns:dto="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Account;assembly=CondoSphere.Core"
             x:DataType="vm:UserListAdminViewModel"
             x:Class="CondoSphere.Mobile.Views.UserListAdminPage"
             BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BackgroundSecondary}"
             Title="Manage Users">

    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">

        <!-- Header -->
        <Frame Grid.Row="0" BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Primary}" CornerRadius="24" HasShadow="False" Padding="24,40,24,24" Margin="0,0,0,20">
            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8">
                <Label Text="👥 Company Users" Style="{StaticResource HeadingMedium}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" />
                <Label Text="View and manage all user accounts in your company." Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" Opacity="0.9" />
            </VerticalStackLayout>
        </Frame>

        <!-- User List -->
        <RefreshView Grid.Row="1" IsRefreshing="{Binding IsBusy}" Command="{Binding LoadUsersCommand}">
            <CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding Users}"
                            Margin="20,0,20,40">
                <CollectionView.EmptyView>
                    <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Padding="40" Margin="0,40">
                        <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="20" HorizontalOptions="Center">
                            <Label Text="👤" FontSize="64" HorizontalOptions="Center" Opacity="0.5" />
                            <Label Text="No Users Found" Style="{StaticResource SubheadingLarge}" HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />
                            <Label Text="Could not retrieve user list from the server." Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}" HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />
                        </VerticalStackLayout>
                    </Frame>
                </CollectionView.EmptyView>

                <CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
                    <DataTemplate x:DataType="dto:UserListDto">
                        <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Margin="0,6">
                            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto" ColumnSpacing="16" RowSpacing="4">
                                <!-- Status Indicator -->
                                <BoxView Grid.RowSpan="2" BackgroundColor="{Binding IsActive, Converter={StaticResource BoolToColorConverter}, ConverterParameter='#10B981,#EF4444'}"
                                         WidthRequest="6"
                                         VerticalOptions="Fill"
                                         CornerRadius="3" />

                                <!-- User Details -->
                                <VerticalStackLayout Grid.Column="1" Grid.RowSpan="2" VerticalOptions="Center">
                                    <Label Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" Text="{Binding FullName}" />
                                    <Label Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}" Text="{Binding Email}" />
                                </VerticalStackLayout>

                                <!-- Role Badge -->
                                <Frame Grid.Column="2" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                                       CornerRadius="16"
                                       Padding="12,6"
                                       HasShadow="False"
                                       VerticalOptions="Center"
                                       BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Primary}">
                                    <Label Text="{Binding Role}" Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" FontAttributes="Bold" />
                                </Frame>
                            </Grid>
                        </Frame>
                    </DataTemplate>
                </CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
            </CollectionView>
        </RefreshView>

    </Grid>
</ContentPage>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Controllers/AssembliesController.cs
```csharp
using CondoSphere.Core;
using CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Assemblies;
using CondoSphere.Web.Services;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Rendering;

namespace CondoSphere.Web.Controllers
{
    [Authorize]
    public class AssembliesController : Controller
    {
        private readonly ApiClient _apiClient;
        public AssembliesController(ApiClient apiClient) => _apiClient = apiClient;


        [HttpGet("/assemblies")]
        [Authorize]
        public async Task<IActionResult> Unified(int? condominiumId)
        {
            IEnumerable<AssemblyDto> list = Enumerable.Empty<AssemblyDto>();

            if (User.IsInRole(RoleConstants.CompanyAdmin))
            {
                // Admin: todas as assembleias da empresa
                list = await _apiClient.GetCompanyAssembliesAsync();
                ViewData["CondominiumId"] = 0;
            }
            else if (User.IsInRole(RoleConstants.CondoManager))
            {
                // tenta usar o último condomínio visitado (cookie) se não veio na query
                if (!condominiumId.HasValue || condominiumId.Value <= 0)
                {
                    if (Request.Cookies.TryGetValue("lastCondoId", out var lastStr) && int.TryParse(lastStr, out var lastId) && lastId > 0)
                    {
                        condominiumId = lastId;
                    }
                }

                if (condominiumId.HasValue && condominiumId.Value > 0)
                {
                    // Manager filtrado por um condomínio específico
                    list = await _apiClient.GetCondominiumAssembliesAsync(condominiumId.Value);
                    ViewData["CondominiumId"] = condominiumId.Value;

                    // lembra o último condomínio (para a navbar)
                    Response.Cookies.Append("lastCondoId", condominiumId.Value.ToString(),
                        new CookieOptions { Expires = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow.AddDays(7) });
                }
                else
                {
                    // Manager sem filtro → carregar TODOS os condomínios que ele gere e agregar
                    var myCondominiums = await _apiClient.GetManagedCondominiumsAsync();
                    ViewBag.ManagedCondominiums = myCondominiums; // (opcional) para dropdown na view

                    if (myCondominiums.Count == 1)
                    {
                        // se só gere 1, redireciona para esse para habilitar "New Assembly"
                        return RedirectToAction(nameof(Unified), new { condominiumId = myCondominiums[0].Id });
                    }

                    var tasks = myCondominiums.Select(c => _apiClient.GetCondominiumAssembliesAsync(c.Id));
                    var results = await Task.WhenAll(tasks);
                    list = results.SelectMany(x => x);

                    ViewData["CondominiumId"] = 0; // 0 = “todos”
                }
            }
            else
            {
                return Forbid();
            }

            // ordenar por data desc.
            var ordered = list.OrderByDescending(a => a.Date);

            return View("UnifiedList", ordered);
        }




        // ===== MANAGER: criar =====
        [HttpGet("condo-management/{condominiumId:int}/assemblies/create")]
        [Authorize(Roles = RoleConstants.CondoManager)]
        public IActionResult Create(int condominiumId)
        {
            return View(new CreateAssemblyDto
            {
                CondominiumId = condominiumId,
                Date = DateTime.Now.AddDays(1)
            });
        }

        [HttpPost("condo-management/{condominiumId:int}/assemblies/create")]
        [Authorize(Roles = RoleConstants.CondoManager)]
        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]
        public async Task<IActionResult> Create(int condominiumId, CreateAssemblyDto dto)
        {
            if (!ModelState.IsValid) return View(dto);
            dto.CondominiumId = condominiumId;

            var created = await _apiClient.CreateAssemblyAsync(dto);
            TempData[created is null ? "ErrorMessage" : "SuccessMessage"] =
                created is null ? "Falha ao criar a assembleia." : "Assembleia criada com sucesso.";
            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index), new { condominiumId });
        }

        [HttpGet("/condo-management/{condominiumId:int}/assemblies/{assemblyId:int}/invite")]
        [Authorize(Roles = RoleConstants.CondoManager)]
        public async Task<IActionResult> Invite(int condominiumId, int assemblyId)
        {
            var residents = await _apiClient.GetCondominiumResidentsAsync(condominiumId);

            ViewData["CondominiumId"] = condominiumId;
            ViewData["AssemblyId"] = assemblyId;

            // lista para a combo (value = Id, text = "Nome — email / phone")
            ViewBag.Residents = residents
                .Select(r => new SelectListItem
                {
                    Value = r.Id.ToString(),
                    Text = $"{r.FullName}" +
                           $"{(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(r.Email) ? "" : $" — {r.Email}")}" +
                           $"{(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(r.Phone) ? "" : $" / {r.Phone}")}"
                })
                .ToList();

            return View(new SendAssemblyInvitesDto());
        }

        [HttpPost("/condo-management/{condominiumId:int}/assemblies/{assemblyId:int}/invite")]
        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]
        [Authorize(Roles = RoleConstants.CondoManager)]
        public async Task<IActionResult> Invite(int condominiumId, int assemblyId, SendAssemblyInvitesDto dto)
        {
            if (!dto.InviteAllResidents && (dto.SelectedResidentIds == null || dto.SelectedResidentIds.Count == 0))
            {
                ModelState.AddModelError("", "Seleciona pelo menos um morador ou ativa 'Invite all residents'.");
            }

            if (!ModelState.IsValid)
            {
                // recompor a combo
                var residents = await _apiClient.GetCondominiumResidentsAsync(condominiumId);
                ViewBag.Residents = residents.Select(r => new SelectListItem
                {
                    Value = r.Id.ToString(),
                    Text = $"{r.FullName}" +
                           $"{(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(r.Email) ? "" : $" — {r.Email}")}" +
                           $"{(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(r.Phone) ? "" : $" / {r.Phone}")}"
                }).ToList();

                ViewData["CondominiumId"] = condominiumId;
                ViewData["AssemblyId"] = assemblyId;
                return View(dto);
            }

            var sent = await _apiClient.SendAssemblyInvitesAsync(assemblyId, dto);
            TempData[sent > 0 ? "Success" : "Error"] = sent > 0 ? "Convites enviados." : "Não foi possível enviar convites.";
            return RedirectToAction("Unified", new { condominiumId });
        }

        // GET /assemblies/{assemblyId}/room -> Redirect para o Jitsi
        [HttpGet("/assemblies/{assemblyId:int}/room")]
        [Authorize] // mantém os teus roles conforme precisares
        public async Task<IActionResult> Room(int assemblyId)
        {
            // regra de segurança: não permitir após a data (se já tens IsExpired na API, a API também travará)
            var info = await _apiClient.GetAssemblyRoomInfoAsync(assemblyId);
            if (info == null || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(info.JoinUrl))
            {
                TempData["Error"] = "Não foi possível abrir a sala.";
                return RedirectToAction(nameof(Unified));
            }

            return Redirect(info.JoinUrl);
        }


    }
}
```

using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;

[ApiController]
[Route("diag")]
public class DiagController : ControllerBase
{
    [HttpGet("ping")]
    public IActionResult Ping()
    {
        return Content($"OK {DateTime.UtcNow:o}\n" +
                       $"Scheme={Request.Scheme} Host={Request.Host} Path={Request.Path}\n" +
                       $"Auth={(User.Identity?.IsAuthenticated == true ? "Yes" : "No")} User={User.Identity?.Name ?? "(anon)"}",
                       "text/plain");
    }
}

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Controllers/MessagesController.cs
```csharp
using CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Messages;
using CondoSphere.Web.Services;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;

namespace CondoSphere.Web.Controllers
{
    [Authorize]
    public class MessagesController : Controller
    {
        private readonly ApiClient _apiClient;

        public MessagesController(ApiClient apiClient)
        {
            _apiClient = apiClient;
        }

        public async Task<IActionResult> Index()
        {
            var inbox = await _apiClient.GetInboxAsync();
            return View(inbox);
        }

        public async Task<IActionResult> Sent()
        {
            var sentMessages = await _apiClient.GetSentMessagesAsync();
            return View(sentMessages);
        }

        public async Task<IActionResult> Compose(int? receiverId = null)
        {
            var contacts = await _apiClient.GetContactsAsync();
            ViewBag.Contacts = contacts;
            ViewBag.ReceiverId = receiverId;
            return View(new SendMessageDto { ReceiverId = receiverId ?? 0 });
        }

        [HttpPost]
        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]
        public async Task<IActionResult> Compose(SendMessageDto dto)
        {
            if (!ModelState.IsValid)
            {
                var contacts = await _apiClient.GetContactsAsync();
                ViewBag.Contacts = contacts;
                return View(dto);
            }

            var success = await _apiClient.SendMessageAsync(dto);
            if (success)
            {
                TempData["Success"] = "Message sent successfully!";
                return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));
            }

            TempData["Error"] = "Failed to send message. Please try again.";
            var contactsForError = await _apiClient.GetContactsAsync();
            ViewBag.Contacts = contactsForError;
            return View(dto);
        }

        public async Task<IActionResult> View(int id)
        {
            var message = await _apiClient.GetMessageAsync(id);
            if (message == null)
            {
                TempData["Error"] = "Message not found.";
                return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));
            }

            return View(message);
        }

        public async Task<IActionResult> Reply(int id)
        {
            var originalMessage = await _apiClient.GetMessageAsync(id);
            if (originalMessage == null)
            {
                TempData["Error"] = "Original message not found.";
                return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));
            }

            var contacts = await _apiClient.GetContactsAsync();
            ViewBag.Contacts = contacts;

            var replyDto = new SendMessageDto
            {
                ReceiverId = originalMessage.SenderId,
                Subject = originalMessage.Subject.StartsWith("Re:") ? originalMessage.Subject : $"Re: {originalMessage.Subject}",
                CondominiumId = originalMessage.CondominiumId
            };

            ViewBag.OriginalMessage = originalMessage;
            return View("Compose", replyDto);
        }

        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<IActionResult> MarkAsRead(int id)
        {
            await _apiClient.MarkMessageAsReadAsync(id);
            return Json(new { success = true });
        }
    }
}
```

using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;

namespace CondoSphere.Web.Models
{
    public class ChangePasswordViewModel
    {
        [Required]
        [DataType(DataType.Password)]
        [Display(Name = "Current Password")]
        public string CurrentPassword { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        [Required]
        [StringLength(100, MinimumLength = 6, ErrorMessage = "The new password must be at least 6 characters long.")]
        [DataType(DataType.Password)]
        [Display(Name = "New Password")]
        public string NewPassword { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        [DataType(DataType.Password)]
        [Display(Name = "Confirm New Password")]
        [Compare("NewPassword", ErrorMessage = "The new password and confirmation password do not match.")]
        public string ConfirmPassword { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }
}

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Services/JwtForwardingDelegatingHandler.cs
```csharp
using System.Net.Http.Headers;

namespace CondoSphere.Web.Services
{
    public class JwtForwardingDelegatingHandler : DelegatingHandler
    {
        private readonly IHttpContextAccessor _httpContextAccessor;

        public JwtForwardingDelegatingHandler(IHttpContextAccessor httpContextAccessor)
        {
            _httpContextAccessor = httpContextAccessor;
        }

        protected override async Task<HttpResponseMessage> SendAsync(HttpRequestMessage request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            // Try to get the access_token from the authenticated user's claims
            var token = _httpContextAccessor.HttpContext?.User.FindFirst("access_token")?.Value;

            // If a token is found, add it to the outgoing request's Authorization header
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(token))
            {
                request.Headers.Authorization = new AuthenticationHeaderValue("Bearer", token);
            }

            return await base.SendAsync(request, cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/ViewComponents/NotificationBellViewComponent.cs
```csharp
using CondoSphere.Web.Models;
using CondoSphere.Web.Services;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;

namespace CondoSphere.Web.ViewComponents
{
    public class NotificationBellViewComponent : ViewComponent
    {
        private readonly ApiClient _apiClient;

        public NotificationBellViewComponent(ApiClient apiClient)
        {
            _apiClient = apiClient;
        }

        public async Task<IViewComponentResult> InvokeAsync()
        {
            var notifications = (await _apiClient.GetMyNotificationsAsync()).ToList();

            var viewModel = new NotificationBellViewModel
            {
                Notifications = notifications,
                UnreadCount = notifications.Count(n => !n.IsRead)
            };

            return View(viewModel);
        }
    }
}
```
