## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/Converters/ValueConverters.cs
```csharp
using System.Globalization;
using CondoSphere.Core.Enums;
using Microsoft.Maui.Graphics;

namespace CondoSphere.Mobile.Converters
{
    public class StatusToColorConverter : IValueConverter
    {
        public object Convert(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            if (value is UnitQuotaStatus status)
            {
                return status switch
                {
                    UnitQuotaStatus.Paid => Color.FromArgb("#10B981"), // Success green
                    UnitQuotaStatus.Overdue => Color.FromArgb("#EF4444"), // Error red
                    UnitQuotaStatus.PendingConfirmation => Color.FromArgb("#F59E0B"), // Warning orange
                    UnitQuotaStatus.Pending => Color.FromArgb("#3B82F6"), // Info blue
                    UnitQuotaStatus.PartiallyPaid => Color.FromArgb("#F59E0B"), // Warning orange
                    _ => Color.FromArgb("#6B7280") // Gray
                };
            }
            return Color.FromArgb("#6B7280");
        }

        public object ConvertBack(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            throw new NotImplementedException();
        }
    }

    public class IsNotNullConverter : IValueConverter
    {
        public object Convert(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            return value != null;
        }

        public object ConvertBack(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            throw new NotImplementedException();
        }
    }

    public class HasItemsConverter : IValueConverter
    {
        public object Convert(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            if (value is System.Collections.IEnumerable enumerable)
            {
                return enumerable.Cast<object>().Any();
            }
            return false;
        }

        public object ConvertBack(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            throw new NotImplementedException();
        }
    }

    public class StatusToBoolConverter : IValueConverter
    {
        public object Convert(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            if (value is UnitQuotaStatus status && parameter is string param)
            {
                return param switch
                {
                    "ShowPayButton" => status == UnitQuotaStatus.Pending || status == UnitQuotaStatus.Overdue,
                    "ShowUploadButton" => status == UnitQuotaStatus.Pending || status == UnitQuotaStatus.Overdue || status == UnitQuotaStatus.PartiallyPaid,
                    "ShowPendingMessage" => status == UnitQuotaStatus.PendingConfirmation,
                    _ => false
                };
            }
            return false;
        }

        public object ConvertBack(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            throw new NotImplementedException();
        }
    }

    public class BoolToVisibilityConverter : IValueConverter
    {
        public object Convert(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            return (bool)value;
        }

        public object ConvertBack(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            return (bool)value;
        }
    }

    public class InverseBoolConverter : IValueConverter
    {
        public object Convert(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            return !(bool)value;
        }

        public object ConvertBack(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            return !(bool)value;
        }
    }

    public class OccurrenceStatusToColorConverter : IValueConverter
    {
        public object Convert(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            if (value is OccurrenceStatus status)
            {
                return status switch
                {
                    OccurrenceStatus.Open => Color.FromArgb("#3B82F6"), // Info blue
                    OccurrenceStatus.InProgress => Color.FromArgb("#F59E0B"), // Warning orange
                    OccurrenceStatus.OnHold => Color.FromArgb("#EF4444"), // Error red
                    OccurrenceStatus.Resolved => Color.FromArgb("#8B5CF6"), // Purple
                    OccurrenceStatus.Closed => Color.FromArgb("#10B981"), // Success green
                    _ => Color.FromArgb("#6B7280") // Gray
                };
            }
            return Color.FromArgb("#6B7280");
        }

        public object ConvertBack(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            throw new NotImplementedException();
        }
    }

    public class BoolToColorConverter : IValueConverter
    {
        public object Convert(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            if (value is bool boolValue && parameter is string colorPair)
            {
                var colors = colorPair.Split(',');
                if (colors.Length == 2)
                {
                    var trueColor = colors[0];
                    var falseColor = colors[1];
                    return boolValue ? Color.FromArgb(trueColor) : Color.FromArgb(falseColor);
                }
            }
            return Colors.Transparent;
        }

        public object ConvertBack(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            throw new NotImplementedException();
        }
    }

    public class InverseBoolToColorConverter : IValueConverter
    {
        public object Convert(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            if (value is bool boolValue && parameter is string colorPair)
            {
                var colors = colorPair.Split(',');
                if (colors.Length == 2)
                {
                    var trueColor = colors[0];
                    var falseColor = colors[1];
                    return !boolValue ? Color.FromArgb(trueColor) : Color.FromArgb(falseColor);
                }
            }
            return Colors.Transparent;
        }

        public object ConvertBack(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            throw new NotImplementedException();
        }
    }

    public class BoolToStringConverter : IValueConverter
    {
        public object Convert(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            if (value is bool boolValue && parameter is string stringPair)
            {
                var strings = stringPair.Split(',');
                if (strings.Length == 2)
                {
                    return boolValue ? strings[0] : strings[1];
                }
            }
            return string.Empty;
        }

        public object ConvertBack(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            throw new NotImplementedException();
        }
    }

    public class BoolToFontAttributesConverter : IValueConverter
    {
        public object Convert(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            if (value is bool boolValue)
            {
                return boolValue ? FontAttributes.None : FontAttributes.Bold;
            }
            return FontAttributes.None;
        }

        public object ConvertBack(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            throw new NotImplementedException();
        }
    }

    public class StringFormatConverter : IValueConverter
    {
        public object Convert(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            if (value != null && parameter is string format)
            {
                return string.Format(format, value);
            }
            return value?.ToString() ?? string.Empty;
        }

        public object ConvertBack(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            throw new NotImplementedException();
        }
    }

    public class IsNullConverter : IValueConverter
    {
        public object Convert(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            return value == null;
        }

        public object ConvertBack(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            throw new NotImplementedException();
        }
    }

    public class StringToBoolConverter : IValueConverter
    {
        public object Convert(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            if (parameter is string param && param.Equals("Inverse", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value?.ToString());
            }
            return !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value?.ToString());
        }

        public object ConvertBack(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            throw new NotImplementedException();
        }
    }
}
```

```csharp
using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel;
using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.Input;
using CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Reports;
using CondoSphere.Mobile.Services;

namespace CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels
{
    public partial class AdminDashboardViewModel : BaseViewModel
    {
        [ObservableProperty]
        private bool isBusy;

        [ObservableProperty]
        private AdminDashboardDto stats;

        private readonly ApiClient _apiClient;

        public AdminDashboardViewModel(ApiClient apiClient)
        {
            _apiClient = apiClient;
            Stats = new AdminDashboardDto();
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task LoadDataAsync()
        {
            if (IsBusy) return;

            IsBusy = true;
            try
            {
                var dashboardData = await _apiClient.GetAdminDashboardAsync();
                if (dashboardData != null)
                {
                    Stats = dashboardData;
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                await Shell.Current.DisplayAlert("Error", $"Failed to load dashboard data: {ex.Message}", "OK");
            }
            finally
            {
                IsBusy = false;
            }
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task GoToUsersAsync()
        {
            await Shell.Current.GoToAsync("admin/users");
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task GoToPropertiesAsync()
        {
            await Shell.Current.GoToAsync("admin/properties");

        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task GoToReportsAsync()
        {
            await Shell.Current.DisplayAlert("Coming Soon", "The detailed reports feature is not yet implemented.", "OK");
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task GoToSettingsAsync()
        {
            await Shell.Current.DisplayAlert("Coming Soon", "The settings feature is not yet implemented.", "OK");
        }
    }
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/ViewModels/CondoDetailsViewModel.cs
```csharp
using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel;
using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.Input;
using CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Condominiums;
using CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Occurrences;
using CondoSphere.Mobile.Services;
using System.Collections.ObjectModel;

namespace CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels
{

    [QueryProperty(nameof(Condo), "Condo")]
    public partial class CondoDetailsViewModel : ObservableObject
    {
        [ObservableProperty]
        private CondominiumDto condo;

        [ObservableProperty]
        private OccurrenceDto selectedOccurrence;

        [ObservableProperty]
        private bool isBusy;

        public ObservableCollection<OccurrenceDto> OpenOccurrences { get; } = new();

        private readonly ApiClient _apiClient;

        public CondoDetailsViewModel(ApiClient apiClient)
        {
            _apiClient = apiClient;
        }

        // This method is called automatically when the "Condo" property is set by navigation
        partial void OnCondoChanged(CondominiumDto value)
        {
            _ = LoadDataAsync();
        }

        private async Task LoadDataAsync()
        {
            if (Condo == null || IsBusy) return;

            IsBusy = true;
            try
            {
                OpenOccurrences.Clear();
                var occurrences = await _apiClient.GetOccurrencesForCondominiumAsync(Condo.Id);
                if (occurrences != null)
                {
                    foreach (var occ in occurrences)
                    {
                        OpenOccurrences.Add(occ);
                    }
                }
            }
            finally
            {
                IsBusy = false;
            }
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task GoToOccurrenceDetailsAsync(OccurrenceDto occurrence)
        {
            if (occurrence == null)
            {
                System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine("[DEBUG] GoToOccurrenceDetailsAsync called with null occurrence");
                return;
            }

            System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine($"[DEBUG] GoToOccurrenceDetailsAsync → Occurrence: {occurrence.Title} (Id={occurrence.Id})");

            try
            {
                ShellDebugHelper.LogShellState("Before navigating to condos/occurrences/details");

                var sw = System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch.StartNew();
                await Shell.Current.GoToAsync("///condos/occurrences/details", new Dictionary<string, object>
                {
                    ["Occurrence"] = occurrence
                });
                sw.Stop();

                System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine($"[DEBUG] Navigation to condos/occurrences/details completed in {sw.ElapsedMilliseconds} ms");
                ShellDebugHelper.LogShellState("After navigating to condos/occurrences/details");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine($"[DEBUG] Navigation to condos/occurrences/details FAILED: {ex}");
                await Shell.Current.DisplayAlert("Navigation Error", ex.Message, "OK");
            }
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task ManageUnitsAsync()
        {
            if (Condo == null) return;

            await Shell.Current.GoToAsync($"condos/details/units?CondoId={Condo.Id}");
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task SendNoticeAsync()
        {
            if (Condo == null) return;
            await Shell.Current.GoToAsync($"condos/details/sendnotice?CondoId={Condo.Id}");
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task AddExpenseAsync()
        {
            if (Condo == null) return;
            await Shell.Current.GoToAsync($"condos/details/addexpense?CondoId={Condo.Id}");
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task ViewReportsAsync()
        {
            await Shell.Current.DisplayAlert("Coming Soon", "Detailed property reports are not yet available in the mobile app.", "OK");
        }
    }
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/ViewModels/CondoListViewModel.cs
```csharp
using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel;
using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.Input;
using CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Condominiums;
using CondoSphere.Mobile.Services;
using System.Collections.ObjectModel;

namespace CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels
{
    public partial class CondoListViewModel : BaseViewModel
    {
        private readonly ApiClient _apiClient;

        private List<CondominiumDto> _fullCondoList = new();

        [ObservableProperty]
        private bool isBusy;

        [ObservableProperty]
        private string searchText;

        public ObservableCollection<CondominiumDto> Condominiums { get; } = new();

        public CondoListViewModel(ApiClient apiClient)
        {
            _apiClient = apiClient;
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task LoadDataAsync()
        {
            if (IsBusy) return;

            IsBusy = true;
            try
            {
                _fullCondoList.Clear();
                Condominiums.Clear();
                SearchText = string.Empty;

                var condos = await _apiClient.GetMyManagedCondominiumsAsync();
                if (condos != null)
                {
                    _fullCondoList.AddRange(condos);
                    ApplyFilter();
                }
            }
            finally
            {
                IsBusy = false;
            }
        }

        partial void OnSearchTextChanged(string value)
        {
            ApplyFilter();
        }

        private void ApplyFilter()
        {
            Condominiums.Clear();

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(SearchText))
            {
                foreach (var condo in _fullCondoList)
                {
                    Condominiums.Add(condo);
                }
            }
            else
            {
                var filteredCondos = _fullCondoList.Where(c =>
                    c.Name.Contains(SearchText, System.StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                    c.Address.Contains(SearchText, System.StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));

                foreach (var condo in filteredCondos)
                {
                    Condominiums.Add(condo);
                }
            }
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task GoToDetailsAsync(CondominiumDto condo)
        {
            if (condo == null)
            {
                return;
            }

            await Shell.Current.GoToAsync("condos/details", new Dictionary<string, object>
            {
                { "Condo", condo }
            });
        }
    }
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/ViewModels/DocumentsViewModel.cs
```csharp
using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel;
using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.Input;
using CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Condominiums;
using CondoSphere.Mobile.Services;
using System.Collections.ObjectModel;

namespace CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels
{
    public partial class DocumentsViewModel : ObservableObject
    {
        private readonly ApiClient _apiClient;

        private List<DocumentDto> _fullDocumentList = new();

        [ObservableProperty]
        private bool isBusy;

        [ObservableProperty]
        private string selectedCategory = "All Files";

        public ObservableCollection<DocumentDto> Documents { get; } = new();

        public DocumentsViewModel(ApiClient apiClient)
        {
            _apiClient = apiClient;
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task LoadDataAsync()
        {
            if (IsBusy) return;

            IsBusy = true;
            try
            {
                _fullDocumentList.Clear();
                Documents.Clear();
                SelectedCategory = "All Files";

                var docs = await _apiClient.GetMyDocumentsAsync();
                if (docs != null)
                {
                    _fullDocumentList.AddRange(docs);
                    ApplyFilter();
                }
            }
            finally
            {
                IsBusy = false;
            }
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private void FilterByCategory(string category)
        {
            SelectedCategory = category;
            ApplyFilter();
        }

        private void ApplyFilter()
        {
            Documents.Clear();

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(SelectedCategory) || SelectedCategory == "All Files")
            {
                foreach (var doc in _fullDocumentList)
                {
                    Documents.Add(doc);
                }
            }
            else
            {
                var filteredDocs = _fullDocumentList.Where(d => d.Category == SelectedCategory);
                foreach (var doc in filteredDocs)
                {
                    Documents.Add(doc);
                }
            }
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task OpenDocumentAsync(DocumentDto document)
        {
            if (document == null || IsBusy) return;

            IsBusy = true;
            try
            {
                var downloadUrl = $"{ApiClient.WebBaseUrl}/portal/documents/{document.Id}/view";

                await Launcher.OpenAsync(downloadUrl);
            }
            catch (System.Exception ex)
            {
                await Shell.Current.DisplayAlert("Error", $"Could not open document: {ex.Message}", "OK");
            }
            finally
            {
                IsBusy = false;
            }
        }
    }
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/ViewModels/ResidentPortalViewModel.cs
```csharp
using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel;
using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.Input;
using CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Financials;
using CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Occurrences;
using CondoSphere.Mobile.Services;
using CondoSphere.Mobile.Views;
using System.Collections.ObjectModel;

namespace CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels
{
    public partial class ResidentPortalViewModel : BaseViewModel
    {
        [ObservableProperty]
        private bool isBusy;

        public ObservableCollection<UnitQuotaDto> Quotas { get; } = new();
        public ObservableCollection<OccurrenceDto> Occurrences { get; } = new();

        private readonly ApiClient _apiClient;

        public ResidentPortalViewModel(ApiClient apiClient)
        {
            _apiClient = apiClient;
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task LoadDataAsync()
        {
            // This guard clause prevents the user from triggering a refresh while one is already in progress.
            if (IsBusy)
                return;

            IsBusy = true;
            try
            {
                // Clear existing data before loading new data
                Quotas.Clear();
                Occurrences.Clear();

                // Fetch new data in parallel for efficiency
                var quotasTask = _apiClient.GetMyQuotasAsync();
                var occurrencesTask = _apiClient.GetMyOccurrencesAsync();
                await Task.WhenAll(quotasTask, occurrencesTask);

                var quotasResult = await quotasTask;
                if (quotasResult != null)
                {
                    foreach (var quota in quotasResult)
                    {
                        Quotas.Add(quota);
                    }
                }

                var occurrencesResult = await occurrencesTask;
                if (occurrencesResult != null)
                {
                    foreach (var occurrence in occurrencesResult)
                    {
                        Occurrences.Add(occurrence);
                    }
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                await Shell.Current.DisplayAlert("Error", $"Failed to load portal data: {ex.Message}", "OK");
            }
            finally
            {
                IsBusy = false;
            }
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task ViewQuotaDetailsAsync(UnitQuotaDto quota)
        {
            if (quota == null)
            {
                System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine("[DEBUG] ViewQuotaDetailsAsync called with null quota");
                return;
            }

            System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine($"[DEBUG] ViewQuotaDetailsAsync → Quota: {quota.Description} (Id={quota.Id})");

            try
            {
                await Shell.Current.GoToAsync("quotas/details", new Dictionary<string, object>
                {
                    ["Quota"] = quota
                });
                System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine("[DEBUG] Navigation to quota details completed");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine($"[DEBUG] Navigation to quota details FAILED: {ex}");
                await Shell.Current.DisplayAlert("Navigation Error", ex.Message, "OK");
            }
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task AddOccurrenceAsync()
        {
            // Use relative navigation for global routes
            await Shell.Current.GoToAsync("condos/occurrences/create");
        }
    }
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/ViewModels/ShellViewModel.cs
```csharp
using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel;

namespace CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels
{
    public partial class ShellViewModel : ObservableObject
    {
        [ObservableProperty] private bool isResident;
        [ObservableProperty] private bool isManager;
        [ObservableProperty] private bool isAdmin;
        [ObservableProperty] private bool isEmployee;

        // New: explicit auth flags
        [ObservableProperty] private bool isAuthenticated;
        [ObservableProperty] private bool isUnauthenticated = true;

        public ShellViewModel()
        {
        }

        // Call this ONLY after a successful login
        public void ApplyRoles(IEnumerable<string> roles)
        {
            IsResident = roles.Contains("CondoResident");
            IsManager = roles.Contains("CondoManager");
            IsAdmin = roles.Contains("CompanyAdmin");
            IsEmployee = roles.Contains("Employee");

            IsAuthenticated = true;
            IsUnauthenticated = false;

            System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine(
                $"[ShellViewModel] Roles applied → Resident={IsResident}, Manager={IsManager}, Admin={IsAdmin}");
        }

        // Call this on logout (or if login fails)
        public void ResetAuth()
        {
            IsResident = IsManager = IsAdmin = IsEmployee = false;
            IsAuthenticated = false;
            IsUnauthenticated = true;
        }
    }
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/Views/CreateOccurrencePage.xaml
```
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<ContentPage xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels"
             x:DataType="vm:CreateOccurrenceViewModel"
             x:Class="CondoSphere.Mobile.Views.CreateOccurrencePage"
             BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BackgroundSecondary}"
             Title="Report Issue">

    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto">

        <!-- Header -->
        <Frame Grid.Row="0"
               BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Primary}"
               CornerRadius="24"
               HasShadow="False"
               Padding="24,40,24,24"
               Margin="0,0,0,20">
            <Frame.Shadow>
                <Shadow Brush="{StaticResource ShadowDark}" 
                        Offset="0,4" 
                        Radius="12" 
                        Opacity="0.15" />
            </Frame.Shadow>

            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8">
                <Label Text="🚨 Report an Issue" 
                       Style="{StaticResource HeadingMedium}"
                       TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" />
                <Label Text="Help us resolve problems quickly by providing detailed information"
                       Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                       TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}"
                       Opacity="0.9" />
            </VerticalStackLayout>
        </Frame>

        <!-- Main Form -->
        <ScrollView Grid.Row="1">
            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="24" Padding="20,0,20,20">

                <!-- Unit Selection -->
                <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="12">
                    <Label Text="🏠 Select Your Unit" 
                           Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />

                    <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Padding="0">
                        <Picker ItemsSource="{Binding UserUnits}"
                                ItemDisplayBinding="{Binding Identifier}"
                                SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedUnit}"
                                Title="Choose your unit..."
                                FontSize="16"
                                BackgroundColor="Transparent"
                                Margin="16,0" />
                    </Frame>
                </VerticalStackLayout>

                <!-- Issue Title -->
                <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="12">
                    <Label Text="📝 Issue Title" 
                           Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />

                    <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Padding="0">
                        <Entry Placeholder="Brief description (e.g., 'Leaky faucet in kitchen')" 
                               Text="{Binding Title}"
                               FontSize="16"
                               BackgroundColor="Transparent"
                               Margin="16,0"
                               MaxLength="100" />
                    </Frame>

                    <Label Text="Keep it concise and specific" 
                           Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                           Margin="8,0,0,0" />
                </VerticalStackLayout>

                <!-- Detailed Description -->
                <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="12">
                    <Label Text="📋 Detailed Description" 
                           Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />

                    <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" 
                           Padding="16"
                           HeightRequest="160">
                        <Editor Placeholder="Please describe the issue in detail. Include when it started, how often it happens, and any steps you've already taken..."
                                Text="{Binding Description}"
                                FontSize="16"
                                BackgroundColor="Transparent"
                                AutoSize="Disabled" />
                    </Frame>

                    <Label Text="The more details you provide, the faster we can resolve the issue" 
                           Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                           Margin="8,0,0,0" />
                </VerticalStackLayout>

                <!-- Photo Section -->
                <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="16">
                    <Label Text="📷 Add Photo (Optional)" 
                           Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />

                    <!-- Photo Button or Preview -->
                    <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" 
                           Padding="20"
                           IsVisible="{Binding ImageIsVisible, Converter={StaticResource InverseBoolConverter}}">
                        <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="16" HorizontalOptions="Center">
                            <Label Text="📸" FontSize="48" HorizontalOptions="Center" />
                            <Label Text="A picture helps us understand the problem better" 
                                   Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                                   HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />
                            <Button Text="📷 Take Photo" 
                                    Command="{Binding SelectPhotoCommand}"
                                    Style="{StaticResource ButtonOutline}"
                                    HeightRequest="44" />
                        </VerticalStackLayout>
                    </Frame>

                    <!-- Photo Preview -->
                    <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardElevated}"
                           IsVisible="{Binding ImageIsVisible}"
                           Padding="8">
                        <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="12">
                            <Frame CornerRadius="8"
                                   Padding="0"
                                   HasShadow="False"
                                   BackgroundColor="Transparent">
                                <Image Source="{Binding ImageFileSource}"
                                       Aspect="AspectFit"
                                       HeightRequest="200" />
                            </Frame>
                            <Button Text="🔄 Change Photo" 
                                    Command="{Binding SelectPhotoCommand}"
                                    Style="{StaticResource ButtonGhost}"
                                    FontSize="14"
                                    HeightRequest="36" />
                        </VerticalStackLayout>
                    </Frame>
                </VerticalStackLayout>

                <!-- Priority Tips -->
                <Frame BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Info}"
                       CornerRadius="12"
                       Padding="16"
                       HasShadow="False">
                    <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*" ColumnSpacing="12">
                        <Label Text="💡" FontSize="24" VerticalOptions="Start" />
                        <VerticalStackLayout Grid.Column="1" Spacing="4">
                            <Label Text="Reporting Tips" 
                                   Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}"
                                   TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" />
                            <Label Text="• For emergencies, call the management office directly&#10;• Include photos when possible&#10;• Be specific about location and timing&#10;• Mention if the issue affects multiple units" 
                                   Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                                   TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}"
                                   Opacity="0.95" />
                        </VerticalStackLayout>
                    </Grid>
                </Frame>

            </VerticalStackLayout>
        </ScrollView>

        <!-- Bottom Action Bar -->
        <Frame Grid.Row="2"
               BackgroundColor="{StaticResource SurfacePrimary}"
               CornerRadius="24"
               HasShadow="False"
               Padding="20,20,20,40">
            <Frame.Shadow>
                <Shadow Brush="{StaticResource Shadow}" 
                        Offset="0,-4" 
                        Radius="12" 
                        Opacity="0.1" />
            </Frame.Shadow>

            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="16">

                <!-- Loading Indicator -->
                <StackLayout Orientation="Horizontal" 
                           HorizontalOptions="Center"
                           Spacing="12"
                           IsVisible="{Binding IsBusy}">
                    <ActivityIndicator IsRunning="{Binding IsBusy}" 
                                     Color="{StaticResource Primary}"
                                     HeightRequest="24"
                                     WidthRequest="24" />
                    <Label Text="Submitting your report..." 
                           Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                           VerticalOptions="Center" />
                </StackLayout>

                <!-- Submit Button -->
                <Button Text="📤 Submit Report" 
                        Command="{Binding SubmitCommand}"
                        Style="{StaticResource ButtonPrimary}"
                        IsVisible="{Binding IsBusy, Converter={StaticResource InverseBoolConverter}}" />

                <!-- Cancel Button -->
                <Button Text="Cancel" 
                        Style="{StaticResource ButtonGhost}"
                        HeightRequest="40"
                        FontSize="14"
                        IsVisible="{Binding IsBusy, Converter={StaticResource InverseBoolConverter}}" />

            </VerticalStackLayout>
        </Frame>
    </Grid>

</ContentPage>
```

using CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels;
using CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Condominiums;

namespace CondoSphere.Mobile.Views;

public partial class DocumentsPage : ContentPage
{
    private readonly DocumentsViewModel _viewModel;

    public DocumentsPage(DocumentsViewModel vm)
    {
        InitializeComponent();
        BindingContext = vm;
        _viewModel = vm;
    }

    protected override void OnAppearing()
    {
        base.OnAppearing();
        _viewModel.LoadDataCommand.Execute(null);
    }
}

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/Views/ManagerOccurrenceDetailsPage.xaml
```
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<ContentPage xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels"
             xmlns:services="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.Services"
             x:DataType="vm:ManagerOccurrenceDetailsViewModel"
             x:Class="CondoSphere.Mobile.Views.ManagerOccurrenceDetailsPage"
             BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BackgroundSecondary}"
             Title="{Binding Occurrence.Title}">

    <ContentPage.ToolbarItems>
        <ToolbarItem Text="Back" Command="{Binding GoBackCommand}" />
    </ContentPage.ToolbarItems>

    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">

        <!-- Loading Overlay -->
        <Frame Grid.RowSpan="2" 
               BackgroundColor="#80000000"
               IsVisible="{Binding IsBusy}"
               ZIndex="999"
               Padding="0">
            <ActivityIndicator IsRunning="{Binding IsBusy}" 
                             Color="{StaticResource Primary}"
                             HeightRequest="48"
                             WidthRequest="48"
                             VerticalOptions="Center" 
                             HorizontalOptions="Center" />
        </Frame>

        <!-- Header with Issue Status -->
        <Frame Grid.Row="0"
               BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Primary}"
               CornerRadius="24"
               HasShadow="False"
               Padding="24,40,24,24"
               Margin="0,0,0,20">
            <Frame.Shadow>
                <Shadow Brush="{StaticResource ShadowDark}" 
                        Offset="0,4" 
                        Radius="12" 
                        Opacity="0.15" />
            </Frame.Shadow>

            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto">
                <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8">
                    <Label Text="🚨 Issue Details" 
                           Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}"
                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" />
                    <Label Text="{Binding Occurrence.Title}"
                           Style="{StaticResource HeadingMedium}"
                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" />
                    <Label Text="{Binding Occurrence.ReportedDate, StringFormat='Reported on {0:MMMM dd, yyyy}'}"
                           Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}"
                           Opacity="0.9" />
                </VerticalStackLayout>

                <!-- Status Badge -->
                <Frame Grid.Column="1"
                       CornerRadius="16"
                       Padding="12,6"
                       HasShadow="False"
                       BackgroundColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}">
                    <Label Text="{Binding Occurrence.Status}" 
                           Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                           TextColor="{Binding Occurrence.Status, Converter={StaticResource OccurrenceStatusToColorConverter}}"
                           FontAttributes="Bold" />
                </Frame>
            </Grid>
        </Frame>

        <!-- Main Content -->
        <ScrollView Grid.Row="1">
            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="24" Padding="20,0,20,40">

                <!-- Issue Information Card -->
                <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardElevated}">
                    <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="20">
                        <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto">
                            <Label Text="📋 Issue Information" 
                                   Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />
                            <Button Grid.Column="1" 
                                    Text="Edit Status" 
                                    Style="{StaticResource ButtonGhost}"
                                    FontSize="12"
                                    HeightRequest="28"
                                    Padding="12,0" />
                        </Grid>

                        <!-- Reporter Info -->
                        <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*" 
                              RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto"
                              ColumnSpacing="16"
                              RowSpacing="8">

                            <!-- Reporter Avatar -->
                            <Frame Grid.RowSpan="3"
                                   CornerRadius="24"
                                   HeightRequest="48"
                                   WidthRequest="48"
                                   Padding="0"
                                   HasShadow="False"
                                   BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Secondary}">
                                <Label Text="👤" 
                                       FontSize="24"
                                       HorizontalOptions="Center"
                                       VerticalOptions="Center" />
                            </Frame>

                            <!-- Reporter Details -->
                            <Label Grid.Column="1" 
                                   Text="{Binding Occurrence.ReportedByUserName}" 
                                   Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />

                            <Label Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="1"
                                   Text="Resident Reporter" 
                                   Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                                   TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />

                            <Label Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="2"
                                   Text="{Binding Occurrence.ReportedDate, StringFormat='{0:MMM dd, yyyy at h:mm tt}'}" 
                                   Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                                   TextColor="{StaticResource Primary}" />
                        </Grid>

                        <!-- Description -->
                        <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8">
                            <Label Text="📝 Description" 
                                   Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />
                            <Frame BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BackgroundTertiary}"
                                   CornerRadius="12"
                                   Padding="16"
                                   HasShadow="False">
                                <Label Text="{Binding Occurrence.Description}" 
                                       Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                                       LineBreakMode="WordWrap" />
                            </Frame>
                        </VerticalStackLayout>

                        <!-- Image if available -->
                        <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8"
                                           IsVisible="{Binding Occurrence.ImageUrl, Converter={StaticResource IsNotNullConverter}}">
                            <Label Text="📷 Attached Photo" 
                                   Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />
                            <Frame CornerRadius="12"
                                   Padding="0"
                                   HasShadow="False"
                                   BackgroundColor="Transparent">
                                <Image Source="{Binding Occurrence.ImageUrl}"
                                       Aspect="AspectFit"
                                       HeightRequest="200" />
                            </Frame>
                        </VerticalStackLayout>
                    </VerticalStackLayout>
                </Frame>

                <!-- Management Actions -->
                <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="16">
                    <Label Text="⚡ Management Actions" 
                           Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />

                    <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,*" 
                          RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto" 
                          RowSpacing="12" 
                          ColumnSpacing="12">

                        <!-- Assign Technician -->
                        <Frame Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0" 
                               Style="{StaticResource CardOutline}"
                               Padding="16">
                            <Frame.GestureRecognizers>
                                <TapGestureRecognizer />
                            </Frame.GestureRecognizers>
                            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8" HorizontalOptions="Center">
                                <Label Text="🔧" FontSize="24" HorizontalOptions="Center" />
                                <Label Text="Assign Tech" 
                                       Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                                       HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />
                            </VerticalStackLayout>
                        </Frame>

                        <!-- Update Status -->
                        <Frame Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1" 
                               Style="{StaticResource CardOutline}"
                               Padding="16">
                            <Frame.GestureRecognizers>
                                <TapGestureRecognizer />
                            </Frame.GestureRecognizers>
                            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8" HorizontalOptions="Center">
                                <Label Text="📝" FontSize="24" HorizontalOptions="Center" />
                                <Label Text="Update Status" 
                                       Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                                       HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />
                            </VerticalStackLayout>
                        </Frame>

                        <!-- Add Expense -->
                        <Frame Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0" 
                               Style="{StaticResource CardOutline}"
                               Padding="16">
                            <Frame.GestureRecognizers>
                                <TapGestureRecognizer />
                            </Frame.GestureRecognizers>
                            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8" HorizontalOptions="Center">
                                <Label Text="💰" FontSize="24" HorizontalOptions="Center" />
                                <Label Text="Add Expense" 
                                       Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                                       HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />
                            </VerticalStackLayout>
                        </Frame>

                        <!-- Contact Resident -->
                        <Frame Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1" 
                               Style="{StaticResource CardOutline}"
                               Padding="16">
                            <Frame.GestureRecognizers>
                                <TapGestureRecognizer />
                            </Frame.GestureRecognizers>
                            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8" HorizontalOptions="Center">
                                <Label Text="📞" FontSize="24" HorizontalOptions="Center" />
                                <Label Text="Contact" 
                                       Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                                       HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />
                            </VerticalStackLayout>
                        </Frame>
                    </Grid>
                </VerticalStackLayout>

                <!-- Interventions Section -->
                <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="16">
                    <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto">
                        <Label Text="🛠️ Interventions and Work Orders" 
                               Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />
                        <Button Grid.Column="1" 
                                Text="+ Add" 
                                Style="{StaticResource ButtonOutline}"
                                FontSize="14"
                                HeightRequest="32"
                                Padding="16,0" />
                    </Grid>

                    <CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding Interventions}"
                                    HeightRequest="250">

                        <CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate x:DataType="services:InterventionDto">
                                <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" 
                                       Margin="0,6">

                                    <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto" 
                                          RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto"
                                          ColumnSpacing="16"
                                          RowSpacing="4">

                                        <!-- Intervention Status Icon -->
                                        <Frame Grid.RowSpan="3"
                                               CornerRadius="20"
                                               HeightRequest="40"
                                               WidthRequest="40"
                                               Padding="0"
                                               HasShadow="False"
                                               BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Info}">
                                            <Label Text="🔨" 
                                                   FontSize="18"
                                                   HorizontalOptions="Center"
                                                   VerticalOptions="Center" />
                                        </Frame>

                                        <!-- Intervention Details -->
                                        <Label Grid.Column="1" 
                                               Text="{Binding Description}" 
                                               Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />

                                        <Label Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="1"
                                               Text="{Binding AssignedToUserName, StringFormat='Assigned to: {0}'}" 
                                               Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                                               TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />

                                        <Label Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="2"
                                               Text="{Binding StartDate, StringFormat='Scheduled: {0:MMM dd, yyyy}'}" 
                                               Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                                               TextColor="{StaticResource Primary}" />

                                        <!-- Status Badge -->
                                        <Frame Grid.Column="2" Grid.RowSpan="3"
                                               CornerRadius="12"
                                               Padding="8,4"
                                               HasShadow="False"
                                               VerticalOptions="Start"
                                               BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Success}">
                                            <Label Text="{Binding Status}" 
                                                   Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                                                   TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}"
                                                   FontAttributes="Bold" />
                                        </Frame>
                                    </Grid>
                                </Frame>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </CollectionView.ItemTemplate>

                        <!-- Empty State -->
                        <CollectionView.EmptyView>
                            <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}"
                                   Padding="32">
                                <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="16" HorizontalOptions="Center">
                                    <Label Text="🛠️" FontSize="48" HorizontalOptions="Center" Opacity="0.5" />
                                    <Label Text="No Interventions Scheduled" 
                                           Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}"
                                           HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />
                                    <Label Text="Create work orders and assign technicians to resolve this issue." 
                                           Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                                           HorizontalTextAlignment="Center"
                                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />
                                    <Button Text="+ Schedule Intervention" 
                                            Style="{StaticResource ButtonPrimary}"
                                            HeightRequest="40"
                                            FontSize="14"
                                            Margin="0,12,0,0" />
                                </VerticalStackLayout>
                            </Frame>
                        </CollectionView.EmptyView>
                    </CollectionView>
                </VerticalStackLayout>

            </VerticalStackLayout>
        </ScrollView>
    </Grid>
</ContentPage>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/Views/MessagesPage.xaml
```
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<ContentPage xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels"
             xmlns:services="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.Services"
             xmlns:converters="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.Converters"
             x:DataType="vm:MessagesViewModel"
             x:Class="CondoSphere.Mobile.Views.MessagesPage"
             BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BackgroundSecondary}"
             Title="Messages">

    <ContentPage.ToolbarItems>
        <ToolbarItem Text="Compose" 
                     Command="{Binding ComposeMessageCommand}"
                     IconImageSource="plus_icon.png" />
        <!-- Ensure plus_icon.png is in Resources/Images -->
    </ContentPage.ToolbarItems>

    <ContentPage.Resources>
        <ResourceDictionary>
            <converters:BoolToStringConverter x:Key="BoolToStringConverter" />
            <converters:BoolToFontAttributesConverter x:Key="BoolToFontAttributesConverter" />
            <converters:InverseBoolConverter x:Key="InverseBoolConverter" />
            <converters:StringToBoolConverter x:Key="StringToBoolConverter" />
        </ResourceDictionary>
    </ContentPage.Resources>
    
    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto, Auto, *">

        <!-- Header -->
        <Frame Grid.Row="0" BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Primary}" CornerRadius="24" HasShadow="False" Padding="24,40,24,24" Margin="0,0,0,20">
            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8">
                <Label Text="✉️ Messages" Style="{StaticResource HeadingMedium}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" />
                <Label Text="Stay connected with management and staff." Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" Opacity="0.9" />
            </VerticalStackLayout>
        </Frame>


        <!-- Segmented Control for Inbox/Sent -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="1" ColumnDefinitions="*,*" Padding="20,0" Margin="0,0,0,10">
            <Button Grid.Column="0"
                    Command="{Binding LoadInboxCommand}"
                    Style="{StaticResource ButtonOutline}"
                    HeightRequest="44"
                    CornerRadius="22"
                    BorderWidth="2"
                    Text="{Binding UnreadCount, StringFormat='Inbox ({0})'}"
                    BackgroundColor="{Binding IsInboxSelected, Converter={StaticResource BoolToColorConverter}, ConverterParameter={StaticResource Primary}}"
                    TextColor="White">
                <Button.Triggers>
                    <DataTrigger TargetType="Button" Binding="{Binding UnreadCount}" Value="0">
                        <Setter Property="Text" Value="Inbox" />
                    </DataTrigger>
                </Button.Triggers>
            </Button>
            <Button Grid.Column="1"
                    Text="Sent"
                    Command="{Binding LoadSentCommand}"
                    Style="{StaticResource ButtonOutline}"
                    HeightRequest="44"
                    CornerRadius="22"
                    BorderWidth="2"
                    BackgroundColor="{Binding IsInboxSelected, Converter={StaticResource InverseBoolToColorConverter}, ConverterParameter={StaticResource Primary}}"
                    TextColor="White" />
        </Grid>



        <!-- Messages List -->
        <RefreshView Grid.Row="2" Command="{Binding RefreshCommand}" IsRefreshing="{Binding IsBusy}">
            <CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding Messages}" 
                           BackgroundColor="Transparent"
                           SelectionMode="None"
                           Margin="20,0,20,40">
                <CollectionView.EmptyView>
                    <ContentView IsVisible="{Binding IsBusy, Converter={StaticResource InverseBoolConverter}}">
                        <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Padding="40" Margin="0,40">
                            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="20" HorizontalOptions="Center">
                                <Label Text="{Binding IsInboxSelected, Converter={StaticResource BoolToStringConverter}, ConverterParameter='📭,📤'}" FontSize="64" HorizontalOptions="Center" Opacity="0.5" />
                                <Label Text="{Binding IsInboxSelected, Converter={StaticResource BoolToStringConverter}, ConverterParameter='No Messages in Your Inbox,No Sent Messages'}" Style="{StaticResource SubheadingLarge}" HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />
                                <Label Text="Pull to refresh or compose a new message." Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}" HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />
                            </VerticalStackLayout>
                        </Frame>
                    </ContentView>
                </CollectionView.EmptyView>




                <CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
                    <DataTemplate x:DataType="services:MessageListDto">
                        <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Margin="0,6" Padding="15">
                            <Frame.GestureRecognizers>
                                <TapGestureRecognizer Command="{Binding Source={RelativeSource AncestorType={x:Type vm:MessagesViewModel}}, Path=ViewMessageCommand}" 
                                                      CommandParameter="{Binding .}" />
                            </Frame.GestureRecognizers>

                            <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto, Auto, Auto" ColumnDefinitions="Auto, *">
                                <!-- Unread Indicator -->
                                <BoxView Grid.RowSpan="3"
                                         BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Primary}"
                                         WidthRequest="8"
                                         HeightRequest="8"
                                         CornerRadius="4"
                                         VerticalOptions="Center"
                                         HorizontalOptions="Start"
                                         Margin="0,0,10,0"
                                         IsVisible="{Binding IsRead, Converter={StaticResource InverseBoolConverter}}" />

                                <!-- From/To and Date Line -->
                                <Label Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="0" Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}" FontAttributes="Bold">
                                    <Label.FormattedText>
                                        <FormattedString>
                                            <Span Text="{Binding IsInboxSelected, Source={RelativeSource AncestorType={x:Type vm:MessagesViewModel}}, Converter={StaticResource BoolToStringConverter}, ConverterParameter='From:,To:'}" />
                                            <Span Text=" " />
                                            <Span Text="{Binding DisplayName}" />
                                        </FormattedString>
                                    </Label.FormattedText>
                                </Label>
                                <Label Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="0" Style="{StaticResource Caption}" Text="{Binding SentDate, StringFormat='{0:MMM dd, yyyy}'}" HorizontalOptions="End" />

                                <!-- Subject Line -->
                                <Label Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="1" 
                                       Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}"
                                       FontAttributes="{Binding IsRead, Converter={StaticResource BoolToFontAttributesConverter}, ConverterParameter='None,Bold'}" 
                                       Text="{Binding Subject}" />

                                <!-- Building Line (if applicable) -->
                                <Label Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="2"
                                       Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}" 
                                       Text="{Binding CondominiumName}" 
                                       IsVisible="{Binding CondominiumName, Converter={StaticResource StringToBoolConverter}}" 
                                       TextColor="{StaticResource Primary}" />
                            </Grid>
                        </Frame>
                    </DataTemplate>
                </CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
            </CollectionView>
        </RefreshView>

        <!-- Loading indicator -->
        <ActivityIndicator Grid.Row="1" IsVisible="{Binding IsBusy}" IsRunning="{Binding IsBusy}"
                          Color="{StaticResource Primary}" HorizontalOptions="Center" VerticalOptions="Center" />
    </Grid>

</ContentPage>
```

using CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels;

namespace CondoSphere.Mobile.Views;

public partial class ProfilePage : ContentPage
{
    private readonly ProfileViewModel _viewModel;

    public ProfilePage(ProfileViewModel vm)
    {
        InitializeComponent();
        _viewModel = vm;
        BindingContext = _viewModel;
    }

    protected override async void OnAppearing()
    {
        base.OnAppearing();
        await _viewModel.LoadProfileCommand.ExecuteAsync(null);
    }
}

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/Views/QuotaDetailsPage.xaml
```
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<ContentPage xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels"
             xmlns:dto="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Financials;assembly=CondoSphere.Core"
             x:DataType="vm:QuotaDetailsViewModel"
             x:Class="CondoSphere.Mobile.Views.QuotaDetailsPage"
             BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BackgroundSecondary}"
             Title="Bill Details">

    <ContentPage.ToolbarItems>
        <ToolbarItem Text="Close" Command="{Binding GoBackCommand}" />
    </ContentPage.ToolbarItems>

    <ScrollView>
        <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="24" Padding="20,0,20,40">

            <!-- Loading Indicator -->
            <ActivityIndicator IsRunning="{Binding IsBusy}" 
                             Color="{StaticResource Primary}"
                             HeightRequest="48"
                             WidthRequest="48"
                             HorizontalOptions="Center"
                             Margin="20"
                             IsVisible="{Binding IsBusy}" />

            <!-- Header Card with Amount -->
            <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardElevated}"
                   BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Primary}">
                <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto" 
                      RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto">

                    <!-- Bill Icon and Status -->
                    <Frame Grid.RowSpan="3" Grid.Column="1"
                           BackgroundColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}"
                           CornerRadius="24"
                           HeightRequest="48"
                           WidthRequest="48"
                           Padding="0"
                           HasShadow="False"
                           VerticalOptions="Start">
                        <Label Text="💰" 
                               FontSize="24"
                               HorizontalOptions="Center"
                               VerticalOptions="Center" />
                    </Frame>

                    <!-- Bill Details -->
                    <Label Text="{Binding Quota.Description}" 
                           Style="{StaticResource SubheadingLarge}"
                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" />

                    <Label Grid.Row="1"
                           Text="{Binding Quota.AmountDue, StringFormat='€{0:N2}'}" 
                           Style="{StaticResource HeadingLarge}"
                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}"
                           FontAttributes="Bold" />

                    <Label Grid.Row="2"
                           Text="{Binding Quota.DueDate, StringFormat='Due: {0:MMMM dd, yyyy}'}" 
                           Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}"
                           Opacity="0.9" />
                </Grid>
            </Frame>

            <!-- Status Badge -->
            <Frame CornerRadius="16"
                   Padding="16,8"
                   HasShadow="False"
                   HorizontalOptions="Start"
                   BackgroundColor="{Binding Quota.Status, Converter={StaticResource StatusToColorConverter}}">
                <Label Text="{Binding Quota.Status}" 
                       Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}"
                       TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}"
                       FontAttributes="Bold" />
            </Frame>

            <!-- Bill Breakdown Section -->
            <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}"
                   IsVisible="{Binding Breakdown, Converter={StaticResource IsNotNullConverter}}">
                <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="20">

                    <Label Text="📋 Fee Breakdown" 
                           Style="{StaticResource SubheadingLarge}" />

                    <!-- Fixed Expenses -->
                    <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="12"
                                       IsVisible="{Binding Breakdown.FixedExpenses, Converter={StaticResource HasItemsConverter}}">
                        <Label Text="Monthly Fixed Costs" 
                               Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}"
                               TextColor="{StaticResource Primary}" />

                        <Frame BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BackgroundTertiary}"
                               CornerRadius="12"
                               Padding="16"
                               HasShadow="False">
                            <CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding Breakdown.FixedExpenses}"
                                          HeightRequest="120">
                                <CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
                                    <DataTemplate x:DataType="dto:ExpenseDto">
                                        <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto" 
                                              Padding="0,4"
                                              RowSpacing="2">
                                            <Label Text="{Binding Title}" 
                                                   Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}" />
                                            <Label Grid.Column="1" 
                                                   Text="{Binding Amount, StringFormat='€{0:N2}'}" 
                                                   Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                                                   FontAttributes="Bold"
                                                   TextColor="{StaticResource Primary}" />
                                        </Grid>
                                    </DataTemplate>
                                </CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
                            </CollectionView>
                        </Frame>
                    </VerticalStackLayout>

                    <!-- One-Time Expenses -->
                    <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="12"
                                       IsVisible="{Binding Breakdown.OneTimeExpenses, Converter={StaticResource HasItemsConverter}}">
                        <Label Text="Special Assessments" 
                               Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}"
                               TextColor="{StaticResource Warning}" />

                        <Frame BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BackgroundTertiary}"
                               CornerRadius="12"
                               Padding="16"
                               HasShadow="False">
                            <CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding Breakdown.OneTimeExpenses}"
                                          HeightRequest="120">
                                <CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
                                    <DataTemplate x:DataType="dto:ExpenseDto">
                                        <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto" 
                                              Padding="0,4"
                                              RowSpacing="2">
                                            <VerticalStackLayout>
                                                <Label Text="{Binding Title}" 
                                                       Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}" />
                                                <Label Text="{Binding ExpenseDate, StringFormat='{0:MMM yyyy}'}" 
                                                       Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}" />
                                            </VerticalStackLayout>
                                            <Label Grid.Column="1" 
                                                   Text="{Binding Amount, StringFormat='€{0:N2}'}" 
                                                   Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                                                   FontAttributes="Bold"
                                                   TextColor="{StaticResource Warning}" />
                                        </Grid>
                                    </DataTemplate>
                                </CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
                            </CollectionView>
                        </Frame>
                    </VerticalStackLayout>

                    <!-- Division Info -->
                    <Frame BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Info}"
                           CornerRadius="12"
                           Padding="12"
                           HasShadow="False">
                        <Label Text="{Binding Breakdown.TotalUnitsInCondo, StringFormat='ℹ️ Total cost divided equally among {0} units'}" 
                               Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                               TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}"
                               HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />
                    </Frame>
                </VerticalStackLayout>
            </Frame>

            <!-- Payment Actions -->
            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="16">

                <!-- Pay Now Button -->
                <Button Text="💳 Pay Online Now" 
                        Command="{Binding PayNowCommand}"
                        Style="{StaticResource ButtonPrimary}"
                        IsVisible="{Binding Quota.Status, Converter={StaticResource StatusToBoolConverter}, ConverterParameter=ShowPayButton}" />

                <!-- Upload Proof Button -->
                <Button Text="📎 Upload Payment Proof" 
                        Command="{Binding UploadProofCommand}"
                        Style="{StaticResource ButtonSecondary}"
                        IsVisible="{Binding Quota.Status, Converter={StaticResource StatusToBoolConverter}, ConverterParameter=ShowUploadButton}" />

                <!-- Pending Confirmation Message -->
                <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}"
                       BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Warning}"
                       IsVisible="{Binding Quota.Status, Converter={StaticResource StatusToBoolConverter}, ConverterParameter=ShowPendingMessage}">
                    <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*" ColumnSpacing="12">
                        <Label Text="⏳" FontSize="24" VerticalOptions="Center" />
                        <VerticalStackLayout Grid.Column="1" Spacing="4">
                            <Label Text="Payment Under Review" 
                                   Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}"
                                   TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" />
                            <Label Text="Your payment proof has been uploaded and is being reviewed by the property manager." 
                                   Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                                   TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}"
                                   Opacity="0.9" />
                        </VerticalStackLayout>
                    </Grid>
                </Frame>

            </VerticalStackLayout>

            <!-- Help Section -->
            <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardOutline}"
                   Padding="20">
                <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="12">
                    <Label Text="💬 Need Help?" 
                           Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />
                    <Label Text="Have questions about this bill? Contact your property manager for assistance." 
                           Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}" />
                    <Button Text="Contact Support" 
                            Style="{StaticResource ButtonOutline}"
                            HeightRequest="40"
                            FontSize="14" />
                </VerticalStackLayout>
            </Frame>

        </VerticalStackLayout>
    </ScrollView>
</ContentPage>
```
