## File: CondoSphere.Web/Controllers/EmployeeController.cs
```csharp
using CondoSphere.Core;
using CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Interventions;
using CondoSphere.Web.Models;
using CondoSphere.Web.Services;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;

namespace CondoSphere.Web.Controllers
{
    [Authorize(Roles = RoleConstants.Employee)]
    [Route("employee")]
    public class EmployeeController : Controller
    {
        private readonly ApiClient _apiClient;

        public EmployeeController(ApiClient apiClient)
        {
            _apiClient = apiClient;
        }

        [HttpGet("")]
        public async Task<IActionResult> Index()
        {
            var interventions = await _apiClient.GetMyInterventionsAsync();
            return View(interventions);
        }

        [HttpGet("{interventionId}")]
        public async Task<IActionResult> Details(int interventionId)
        {
            var intervention = await _apiClient.GetInterventionDetailsAsync(interventionId);
            if (intervention == null) return NotFound();

            var occurrence = await _apiClient.GetOccurrenceDetailsAsync(intervention.OccurrenceId);
            if (occurrence == null) return NotFound();

            var viewModel = new EmployeeInterventionViewModel
            {
                Intervention = intervention,
                Occurrence = occurrence,
                StatusUpdate = new UpdateInterventionStatusDto { Status = intervention.Status }
            };

            return View(viewModel);
        }

        [HttpPost("{interventionId}")] // This route now correctly handles the POST from the form
        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]
        public async Task<IActionResult> UpdateStatus(int interventionId, [Bind(Prefix = "StatusUpdate")] UpdateInterventionStatusDto dto)
        {
            if (!ModelState.IsValid)
            {
                TempData["ErrorMessage"] = "Invalid status submitted.";
                return RedirectToAction("Details", new { interventionId });
            }

            var success = await _apiClient.UpdateInterventionStatusAsync(interventionId, dto);
            if (success)
            {
                TempData["SuccessMessage"] = "Task status updated successfully.";
            }
            else
            {
                TempData["ErrorMessage"] = "Failed to update task status. You may not have permission or the task may be cancelled.";
            }

            return RedirectToAction("Details", new { interventionId });
        }
    }
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Controllers/HomeController.cs
```csharp
using CondoSphere.Web.Models;
using CondoSphere.Web.Models.Home;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using System.Diagnostics;

namespace CondoSphere.Web.Controllers
{
    public class HomeController : Controller
    {
        private readonly ILogger<HomeController> _logger;

        public HomeController(ILogger<HomeController> logger)
        {
            _logger = logger;
        }

        public IActionResult Index()
        {
            var viewModel = new HomeViewModel
            {
                Features = new List<FeatureViewModel>
                {
                    new() {
                        IconClass = "bi-cash-coin",
                        Title = "Simplified Financials",
                        Description = "Automate billing, accept online payments, and generate insightful financial reports in just a few clicks."
                    },
                    new() {
                        IconClass = "bi-chat-dots-fill",
                        Title = "Seamless Communication",
                        Description = "Keep residents informed with announcements, manage conversations, and centralize all property-related communication."
                    },
                    new() {
                        IconClass = "bi-wrench-adjustable-circle-fill",
                        Title = "Intelligent Maintenance",
                        Description = "Track resident-reported issues, assign tasks to staff, and manage the entire maintenance workflow from start to finish."
                    }
                },
                Personas = new List<PersonaViewModel>
                {
                    new() {
                        ImageUrl = "/images/home/manager.png",
                        RoleTitle = "For Property Managers",
                        Benefits = new List<string> { "Centralize Operations", "Reduce Admin Work", "Increase Resident Satisfaction" }
                    },
                    new() {
                        ImageUrl = "/images/home/resident.png",
                        RoleTitle = "For Residents",
                        Benefits = new List<string> { "Pay Fees Online", "Report Issues Instantly", "Stay Connected" }
                    },
                    new() {
                        ImageUrl = "/images/home/board-member.png",
                        RoleTitle = "For Board Members",
                        Benefits = new List<string> { "Access Real-Time Reports", "Improve Transparency", "Track Maintenance" }
                    }
                },
                Testimonials = new List<TestimonialViewModel>
                {
                    new() {
                        Quote = "CondoSphere has completely transformed how we manage our properties. Our resident communication has never been better, and we've cut down our administrative time by half.",
                        AuthorName = "Jane Doe",
                        AuthorTitle = "Property Manager, Urban Living Inc."
                    },
                    new() {
                        Quote = "As a resident, I love being able to pay my fees online and report maintenance issues from my phone. It’s incredibly convenient and transparent.",
                        AuthorName = "John Smith",
                        AuthorTitle = "Resident, Sunset Gardens"
                    },
                    new() {
                        Quote = "The financial reporting tools are a game-changer for our board meetings. We have a clear, real-time overview of our property's financial health at all times.",
                        AuthorName = "Mary Johnson",
                        AuthorTitle = "Board Member, The Summit Condominiums"
                    }
                }
            };

            return View(viewModel);
        }

        public IActionResult Privacy()
        {
            return View();
        }

        [ResponseCache(Duration = 0, Location = ResponseCacheLocation.None, NoStore = true)]
        public IActionResult Error()
        {
            return View(new ErrorViewModel { RequestId = Activity.Current?.Id ?? HttpContext.TraceIdentifier });
        }
    }
}
```

using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;

namespace CondoSphere.Web.Models
{
    public class MyProfileViewModel
    {
        [Required]
        [Display(Name = "First Name")]
        [StringLength(100, MinimumLength = 2)]
        public string FirstName { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        [Required]
        [Display(Name = "Last Name")]
        [StringLength(100, MinimumLength = 2)]
        public string LastName { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        [Required]
        [Phone] 
        public string PhoneNumber { get; set; }

        public string? CurrentProfileImageUrl { get; set; }

        [Display(Name = "Upload New Profile Image")]
        public IFormFile? ProfileImage { get; set; }
        public bool TwoFactorEnabled { get; set; }
    }
}

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Services/ImageService.cs
```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Hosting;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration;

namespace CondoSphere.Web.Services
{
    public class ImageService : IImageService
    {
        private readonly IWebHostEnvironment _env;
        private readonly IConfiguration _config;

        public ImageService(IWebHostEnvironment env, IConfiguration config)
        {
            _env = env;
            _config = config;
        }

        public async Task<string> SaveImageAsync(IFormFile imageFile, string folder, string? currentImagePath = null)
        {
            // 1) Delete previous file if it lived under /uploads/
            try
            {
                if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(currentImagePath))
                {
                    const string uploadsMarker = "/uploads/";
                    var idx = currentImagePath.IndexOf(uploadsMarker, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
                    if (idx >= 0)
                    {
                        var subPath = currentImagePath.Substring(idx + uploadsMarker.Length)
                                                      .Replace('/', Path.DirectorySeparatorChar);

                        var rootSetting = _config["FileUpload:Path"];
                        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(rootSetting))
                        {
                            var root = Environment.ExpandEnvironmentVariables(rootSetting);
                            if (!Path.IsPathRooted(root))
                                root = Path.GetFullPath(Path.Combine(Directory.GetCurrentDirectory(), root));

                            var oldPath = Path.Combine(root, subPath);
                            if (File.Exists(oldPath)) File.Delete(oldPath);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            catch
            {
                // Intentionally swallow: deletion failure shouldn't block upload
            }

            // 2) Resolve FileUpload:Path generically (env var + relative -> absolute)
            var uploadsRootSetting = _config["FileUpload:Path"];
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(uploadsRootSetting))
                throw new InvalidOperationException("Missing FileUpload:Path in configuration.");

            var uploadsRoot = Environment.ExpandEnvironmentVariables(uploadsRootSetting);
            if (!Path.IsPathRooted(uploadsRoot))
                uploadsRoot = Path.GetFullPath(Path.Combine(Directory.GetCurrentDirectory(), uploadsRoot));

            // 3) Ensure target folder
            var safeFolder = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(folder) ? "" : folder.Trim().Trim('/', '\\');
            if (safeFolder.Contains("..")) throw new InvalidOperationException("Invalid folder name.");
            var targetDir = Path.Combine(uploadsRoot, safeFolder);
            Directory.CreateDirectory(targetDir);

            // 4) Save file
            var uniqueFileName = $"{Guid.NewGuid()}_{Path.GetFileName(imageFile.FileName)}";
            var filePath = Path.Combine(targetDir, uniqueFileName);
            using (var stream = new FileStream(filePath, FileMode.Create))
            {
                await imageFile.CopyToAsync(stream);
            }

            // 5) Return a relative URL that the Web app will serve
            return $"/uploads/{(string.IsNullOrEmpty(safeFolder) ? "" : safeFolder + "/")}{uniqueFileName}";
        }
    }
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/Account/ChooseTwoFactorMethod.cshtml
```
@model CondoSphere.Web.Models.TwoFactorChooseMethodViewModel
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Two-Factor Authentication";
    ViewData["IsFullWidth"] = true;
}

<style>
    body {
        background: var(--light-bg);
    }

    /* Styles for the custom, clickable radio button cards */
    .radio-option-card {
        display: block;
        border: 2px solid var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 0.75rem;
        padding: 1.5rem;
        transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
        cursor: pointer;
        position: relative;
    }

        .radio-option-card:hover {
            border-color: var(--primary-color);
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        /* Hide the default radio button */
        .radio-option-card input[type="radio"] {
            display: none;
        }

        /* Style the checkmark icon that appears when selected */
        .radio-option-card .check-icon {
            position: absolute;
            top: 1rem;
            right: 1rem;
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            color: var(--success-color);
            opacity: 0;
            transform: scale(0.5);
            transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
        }

        /* The magic: when the card has a checked input inside it, change its style */
        .radio-option-card:has(input:checked) {
            border-color: var(--primary-color);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--primary-color);
            background-color: #f7f7ff;
        }

            /* And show the checkmark icon */
            .radio-option-card:has(input:checked) .check-icon {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: scale(1);
            }
</style>

<div class="container">
    <div class="row justify-content-center align-items-center" style="min-height: 70vh;">
        <div class="col-md-11 col-lg-9 col-xl-8">

            <div class="card shadow-lg border-0">
                <div class="card-header text-center py-4" style="background: var(--primary-gradient);">
                    <h2 class="mb-1 text-white"><i class="bi bi-shield-lock me-2"></i>@ViewData["Title"]</h2>
                    <p class="mb-0 small text-white-50">Choose how to receive your verification code.</p>
                </div>

                <div class="card-body p-4 p-md-5">
                    <form asp-action="ChooseTwoFactorMethod" method="post">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <input type="hidden" asp-for="Email" />

                        <div class="text-danger mb-3" asp-validation-summary="ModelOnly"></div>

                        <div class="vstack gap-3">
                            <!-- Email Option -->
                            <label for="optEmail" class="radio-option-card">
                                <input class="form-check-input" type="radio" asp-for="SelectedMethod" id="optEmail" value="Email" checked />
                                <div class="d-flex align-items-center">
                                    <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill fs-2 me-3 text-primary"></i>
                                    <div>
                                        <h5 class="mb-0">E-mail</h5>
                                        <p class="mb-0 text-muted">A code will be sent to your registered email address.</p>
                                    </div>
                                    <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill check-icon"></i>
                                </div>
                            </label>

                            <!-- SMS Option -->
                            <label for="optSms" class="radio-option-card">
                                <input class="form-check-input" type="radio" asp-for="SelectedMethod" id="optSms" value="Sms" />
                                <div class="d-flex align-items-center">
                                    <i class="bi bi-phone-fill fs-2 me-3 text-primary"></i>
                                    <div>
                                        <h5 class="mb-0">SMS</h5>
                                        <p class="mb-0 text-muted">A code will be sent to your registered phone number.</p>
                                        <small class="form-text">If you don't have a phone number configured, sending by SMS may fail.</small>
                                    </div>
                                    <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill check-icon"></i>
                                </div>
                            </label>
                        </div>

                        <div class="d-grid mt-4">
                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">Continue</button>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>

                <div class="card-footer text-center py-3 bg-light">
                    <a asp-action="Login" class="btn btn-link">Cancel and go back to login</a>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

@model CondoSphere.Web.Models.ForgotPasswordViewModel

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Forgot Password";
    // This flag tells _Layout.cshtml not to render the white ".main-container" box
    ViewData["IsFullWidth"] = true;
}

<style>
    /* Use a light grey background for this page */
    body {
        background: var(--light-bg);
    }
</style>

<div class="container">
    <div class="row justify-content-center align-items-center" style="min-height: 70vh;">
        <div class="col-md-11 col-lg-9 col-xl-8">

            <div class="card shadow-lg border-0">
                <div class="card-header text-center py-4" style="background: var(--primary-gradient);">
                    <h2 class="mb-1 text-white"><i class="bi bi-key-fill me-2"></i>Reset Your Password</h2>
                    <p class="mb-0 small text-white-50">Enter your email to receive a reset link.</p>
                </div>

                <div class="card-body p-4 p-md-5">
                    <p class="text-muted text-center mb-4">
                        No problem. Just enter your email address below and we will send you instructions to reset your password.
                    </p>
                    <section>
                        <form asp-action="ForgotPassword" method="post">
                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()

                            <div asp-validation-summary="ModelOnly" class="text-danger mb-3"></div>

                            <!-- Email with Icon -->
                            <div class="mb-3">
                                <label asp-for="Email" class="form-label fw-bold"></label>
                                <div class="input-group">
                                    <span class="input-group-text"><i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i></span>
                                    <div class="form-floating flex-grow-1">
                                        <input asp-for="Email" class="form-control" placeholder="Email" autocomplete="username" aria-required="true" />
                                        <label asp-for="Email"></label>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <span asp-validation-for="Email" class="text-danger small mt-1 d-block"></span>
                            </div>

                            <div class="d-grid mt-4">
                                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">Send Reset Link</button>
                            </div>
                        </form>
                    </section>
                </div>

                <div class="card-footer text-center py-3 bg-light">
                    <a asp-action="Login" class="btn btn-link">
                        <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i>
                        Back to Login
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <partial name="_ValidationScriptsPartial" />
}
```

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Registration Complete";
    ViewData["IsFullWidth"] = true;
}

<style>
    body {
        background: var(--light-bg);
    }
</style>

<div class="container">
    <div class="row justify-content-center align-items-center" style="min-height: 70vh;">
        <div class="col-md-11 col-lg-9 col-xl-8">

            <div class="card shadow-lg border-0 text-center">
                <div class="card-header py-4" style="background: var(--primary-gradient);">
                    <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill text-white" style="font-size: 3rem;"></i>
                    <h2 class="mb-0 mt-2 text-white">Thank You!</h2>
                </div>

                <div class="card-body p-4 p-md-5">
                    <h5 class="card-title mb-3">Your Account is Almost Ready!</h5>
                    <p class="text-muted">
                        Your company and administrator account have been created successfully.
                    </p>
                    <hr class="my-4" />
                    <div class="alert alert-info d-flex align-items-center">
                        <i class="bi bi-envelope-exclamation-fill flex-shrink-0 me-3" style="font-size: 1.5rem;"></i>
                        <div>
                            <strong>An email has been sent to your address.</strong> Please click the confirmation link inside to activate your account before logging in.
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <p class="small text-muted mt-3">
                        Can't find it? Check your spam folder or <a asp-action="ResendConfirmationEmail">resend the confirmation email</a>.
                    </p>
                </div>

                <div class="card-footer py-3 bg-light">
                    <a class="btn btn-primary" asp-action="Login">
                        <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-in-right me-1"></i>
                        Proceed to Login Page
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

@model CondoSphere.Web.Models.ResendConfirmationEmailViewModel
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Resend Confirmation Email";
    // This flag tells _Layout.cshtml not to render the white ".main-container" box
    ViewData["IsFullWidth"] = true;
}

<style>
    /* Use a light grey background for this page */
    body {
        background: var(--light-bg);
    }
</style>

<div class="container">
    <div class="row justify-content-center align-items-center" style="min-height: 70vh;">
        <div class="col-md-11 col-lg-9 col-xl-8">

            <div class="card shadow-lg border-0">
                <div class="card-header text-center py-4" style="background: var(--primary-gradient);">
                    <h2 class="mb-1 text-white"><i class="bi bi-envelope-arrow-up-fill me-2"></i>@ViewData["Title"]</h2>
                    <p class="mb-0 small text-white-50">Let's get your account verified.</p>
                </div>

                <div class="card-body p-4 p-md-5">
                    @if (ViewData["Mensagem"] is string msg && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(msg))
                    {
                        <div class="alert alert-info text-center">@msg</div>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <p class="text-muted text-center mb-4">
                            Enter the email address you used to register and we'll send the confirmation link again.
                        </p>
                    }

                    <section>
                        <form asp-action="ResendConfirmationEmail" method="post">
                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                            <div asp-validation-summary="ModelOnly" class="text-danger mb-3"></div>

                            <!-- Email with Icon -->
                            <div class="mb-3">
                                <label asp-for="Email" class="form-label fw-bold"></label>
                                <div class="input-group">
                                    <span class="input-group-text"><i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i></span>
                                    <div class="form-floating flex-grow-1">
                                        <input asp-for="Email" class="form-control" placeholder="Email" autocomplete="email" aria-required="true" />
                                        <label asp-for="Email"></label>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <span asp-validation-for="Email" class="text-danger small mt-1 d-block"></span>
                            </div>

                            <div class="d-grid mt-4">
                                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">Resend Email</button>
                            </div>
                        </form>
                    </section>
                </div>

                <div class="card-footer text-center py-3 bg-light">
                    <a asp-action="Login" class="btn btn-link">
                        <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i>
                        Back to Login
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <partial name="_ValidationScriptsPartial" />
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/Account/SetPassword.cshtml
```
@model CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Account.SetPasswordDto

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Set Your Password";
    ViewData["IsFullWidth"] = true;
}

<style>
    body {
        background: var(--light-bg);
    }
</style>

<div class="container">
    <div class="row justify-content-center align-items-center" style="min-height: 70vh;">
        <div class="col-md-11 col-lg-9 col-xl-8">

            <div class="card shadow-lg border-0">
                <div class="card-header text-center py-4" style="background: var(--primary-gradient);">
                    <h2 class="mb-1 text-white"><i class="bi bi-shield-lock-fill me-2"></i>@ViewData["Title"]</h2>
                    <p class="mb-0 small text-white-50">Choose a secure password to protect your account.</p>
                </div>

                <div class="card-body p-4 p-md-5">
                    <p class="text-muted text-center mb-4">
                        Please enter and confirm your new password below.
                    </p>
                    <section>
                        <form asp-action="SetPassword" method="post">
                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                            <div asp-validation-summary="ModelOnly" class="text-danger mb-3"></div>

                            <input type="hidden" asp-for="UserId" />
                            <input type="hidden" asp-for="Token" />

                            <!-- New Password with Icon -->
                            <div class="mb-3">
                                <label asp-for="Password" class="form-label fw-bold">New Password</label>
                                <div class="input-group">
                                    <span class="input-group-text"><i class="bi bi-key-fill"></i></span>
                                    <div class="form-floating flex-grow-1">
                                        <input asp-for="Password" class="form-control" type="password" placeholder="New Password" />
                                        <label asp-for="Password">New Password</label>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <span asp-validation-for="Password" class="text-danger small mt-1 d-block"></span>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Confirm Password with Icon -->
                            <div class="mb-3">
                                <label asp-for="ConfirmPassword" class="form-label fw-bold"></label>
                                <div class="input-group">
                                    <span class="input-group-text"><i class="bi bi-key-fill"></i></span>
                                    <div class="form-floating flex-grow-1">
                                        <input asp-for="ConfirmPassword" class="form-control" type="password" placeholder="Confirm New Password" />
                                        <label asp-for="ConfirmPassword"></label>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <span asp-validation-for="ConfirmPassword" class="text-danger small mt-1 d-block"></span>
                            </div>

                            <div class="d-grid mt-4">
                                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">Set Password</button>
                            </div>
                        </form>
                    </section>
                </div>

                <div class="card-footer text-center py-3 bg-light">
                    <a asp-action="Login" class="btn btn-link">
                        <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i>
                        Back to Login
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <partial name="_ValidationScriptsPartial" />
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/Account/VerifyTwoFactor.cshtml
```
@model CondoSphere.Web.Models.TwoFactorVerifyViewModel
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Two-Factor Verification";

    ViewData["IsFullWidth"] = true;
    var verificationMethod = Model.SelectedMethod?.ToLowerInvariant() == "sms" ? "phone number" : "email address";
}

<style>

    body {
        background: var(--light-bg);
    }
</style>

<div class="container">
    <div class="row justify-content-center align-items-center" style="min-height: 70vh;">
        <div class="col-md-11 col-lg-9 col-xl-8">

            <div class="card shadow-lg border-0">
                <div class="card-header text-center py-4" style="background: var(--primary-gradient);">
                    <h2 class="mb-1 text-white"><i class="bi bi-shield-check me-2"></i>Verify Your Identity</h2>
                    <p class="mb-0 small text-white-50">This extra step helps keep your account secure.</p>
                </div>

                <div class="card-body p-4 p-md-5">
                    <p class="text-muted text-center mb-4">
                        A verification code has been sent to your @verificationMethod. Please enter it below to complete your sign-in.
                    </p>
                    <section>
                        <form asp-action="VerifyTwoFactor" method="post">
                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                            <div asp-validation-summary="ModelOnly" class="text-danger mb-3"></div>

                            <input type="hidden" asp-for="Email" />
                            <input type="hidden" asp-for="SelectedMethod" />

                            <!-- Verification Code with Icon -->
                            <div class="mb-3">
                                <label asp-for="Code" class="form-label fw-bold">Verification Code</label>
                                <div class="input-group">
                                    <span class="input-group-text"><i class="bi bi-hash"></i></span>
                                    <div class="form-floating flex-grow-1">
                                        <input asp-for="Code" class="form-control" placeholder="Verification Code" autocomplete="one-time-code" aria-required="true" />
                                        <label asp-for="Code"></label>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <span asp-validation-for="Code" class="text-danger small mt-1 d-block"></span>
                            </div>

                            <div class="d-grid mt-4">
                                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">Verify & Sign In</button>
                            </div>
                        </form>
                    </section>
                </div>

                <div class="card-footer text-center py-3 bg-light">
                    <a asp-action="ChooseTwoFactorMethod" asp-route-email="@Model.Email" class="btn btn-link">
                        <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i>
                        Choose a different method
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/Administration/AssignManager.cshtml
```
@model AssignManagerViewModel
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Assign Manager";
    var condominium = ViewData["Condominium"] as CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Condominiums.CondominiumDto;
    var availableManagers = ViewData["AvailableManagers"] as IEnumerable<SelectListItem>;
    ViewData["IsFullWidth"] = true;
}

<style>
    body {
        background-color: var(--light-bg);
    }
</style>

<div class="container my-5">
    <div class="row justify-content-center align-items-center" style="min-height: 70vh;">
        <div class="col-md-11 col-lg-9 col-xl-8">

            <div class="card shadow-lg border-0">
                <div class="card-header text-center py-4" style="background: var(--primary-gradient);">
                    <h2 class="mb-1 text-white"><i class="bi bi-person-plus-fill me-2"></i>@ViewData["Title"]</h2>
                    <p class="mb-0 small text-white-50">To Condominium: <strong>@condominium.Name</strong></p>
                </div>

                <div class="card-body p-4 p-md-5">
                    <p class="text-muted text-center mb-4">
                        Select an available manager from the list below to assign them to this property.
                    </p>
                    <form asp-action="AssignManager" asp-route-condominiumId="@condominium.Id" method="post">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <div asp-validation-summary="ModelOnly" class="text-danger mb-3"></div>

                        <div class="form-floating mb-3">
                            <select asp-for="SelectedManagerId" asp-items="availableManagers" class="form-select form-select-lg">
                                <option value="">-- Please select a manager --</option>
                            </select>
                            <label asp-for="SelectedManagerId"></label>
                            <span asp-validation-for="SelectedManagerId" class="text-danger small mt-1 d-block"></span>
                        </div>

                        <div class="d-grid gap-2 mt-4">
                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">Assign Manager</button>
                            <a asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-secondary">Cancel</a>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/Administration/CompanyProfile.cshtml
```
@model CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Account.CompanyProfileDto
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Company Profile";
    ViewData["IsFullWidth"] = true;
}

<style>
    body {
        background-color: var(--light-bg);
    }
</style>

<div class="container my-5">
    <div class="row justify-content-center align-items-center" style="min-height: 70vh;">
        <div class="col-md-11 col-lg-9 col-xl-8">

            <div class="card shadow-lg border-0">
                <div class="card-header text-center py-4" style="background: var(--primary-gradient);">
                    <h2 class="mb-1 text-white"><i class="bi bi-buildings-fill me-2"></i>@ViewData["Title"]</h2>
                    <p class="mb-0 small text-white-50">Update your company's information.</p>
                </div>

                <div class="card-body p-4 p-md-5">
                    <form asp-action="CompanyProfile" method="post">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <div asp-validation-summary="ModelOnly" class="text-danger mb-4"></div>

                        <div class="row">
                            <div class="col-12 mb-3">
                                <div class="form-floating">
                                    <input asp-for="Name" class="form-control" placeholder="Company Name" />
                                    <label asp-for="Name"></label>
                                    <span asp-validation-for="Name" class="text-danger small"></span>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
                                <div class="form-floating">
                                    <input asp-for="Email" class="form-control" placeholder="Company Email" />
                                    <label asp-for="Email"></label>
                                    <span asp-validation-for="Email" class="text-danger small"></span>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
                                <div class="form-floating">
                                    <input asp-for="PhoneNumber" class="form-control" placeholder="Company Phone Number" />
                                    <label asp-for="PhoneNumber"></label>
                                    <span asp-validation-for="PhoneNumber" class="text-danger small"></span>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="col-12 mb-3">
                                <div class="form-floating">
                                    <input asp-for="Address" class="form-control" placeholder="Company Address" />
                                    <label asp-for="Address"></label>
                                    <span asp-validation-for="Address" class="text-danger small"></span>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
                                <div class="form-floating">
                                    <input asp-for="VatNumber" class="form-control" placeholder="VAT Number" />
                                    <label asp-for="VatNumber"></label>
                                    <span asp-validation-for="VatNumber" class="text-danger small"></span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-end gap-2 mt-4">
                            <a asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-secondary">Cancel</a>
                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Save Changes</button>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/Administration/CreateCondominium.cshtml
```
@model CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Condominiums.CreateUpdateCondominiumDto

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Create New Condominium";
    ViewData["IsFullWidth"] = true;
}

<style>
    body {
        background-color: var(--light-bg);
    }
</style>

<div class="container my-5">
    <div class="row justify-content-center align-items-center" style="min-height: 70vh;">
        <div class="col-md-11 col-lg-9 col-xl-8">

            <div class="card shadow-lg border-0">
                <div class="card-header text-center py-4" style="background: var(--primary-gradient);">
                    <h2 class="mb-1 text-white"><i class="bi bi-building-fill-add me-2"></i>@ViewData["Title"]</h2>
                    <p class="mb-0 small text-white-50">Add a new property to your portfolio.</p>
                </div>

                <div class="card-body p-4 p-md-5">
                    <form asp-action="CreateCondominium" method="post">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <div asp-validation-summary="ModelOnly" class="text-danger mb-4"></div>

                        <div class="form-floating mb-3">
                            <input asp-for="Name" class="form-control" placeholder="e.g., Central Park Residences" />
                            <label asp-for="Name"></label>
                            <span asp-validation-for="Name" class="text-danger small"></span>
                        </div>

                        <div class="form-floating mb-3">
                            <input asp-for="Address" class="form-control" placeholder="e.g., 123 Main Street, Anytown" />
                            <label asp-for="Address"></label>
                            <span asp-validation-for="Address" class="text-danger small"></span>
                        </div>

                        <div class="d-grid gap-2 mt-4">
                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success btn-lg">Create Condominium</button>
                            <a asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-secondary">Cancel</a>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <partial name="_ValidationScriptsPartial" />
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/Administration/Dashboard.cshtml
```
@model CondoSphere.Web.Models.AdminBiDashboardViewModel

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Company Dashboard";
    ViewData["IsFullWidth"] = true;
    var stats = Model?.MainStats;
}

<style>
    body {
        background-color: var(--light-bg);
    }

    /* Custom styles for the BI Dashboard */
    .kpi-card {
        background-color: #fff;
        border-radius: 0.75rem;
        padding: 1.5rem;
        box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
        transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 1rem;
    }

        .kpi-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-4px);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
        }

    .kpi-icon {
        flex-shrink: 0;
        width: 50px;
        height: 50px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        font-size: 1.5rem;
        color: #fff;
    }

        .kpi-icon.bg-primary {
            background-color: var(--primary-color);
        }

        .kpi-icon.bg-success {
            background-color: var(--success-color);
        }

        .kpi-icon.bg-danger {
            background-color: var(--danger-color);
        }

        .kpi-icon.bg-warning {
            background-color: var(--warning-color);
        }

        .kpi-icon.bg-info {
            background-color: #3b82f6;
        }

        .kpi-icon.bg-dark {
            background-color: var(--dark-color);
        }

    .kpi-content .kpi-value {
        font-size: 1.75rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        line-height: 1.1;
        margin-bottom: 0;
    }

    .kpi-content .kpi-label {
        font-size: 0.8rem;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        margin-bottom: 0;
    }

    .chart-card .card-header,
    .hotspot-card .card-header {
        background-color: var(--light-bg);
    }
</style>

<div class="container-fluid px-5">

    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4 print-hide pt-3">
        <div>
            <h1 class="mb-0">@ViewData["Title"]</h1>
            <p class="text-muted mb-0">A real-time overview of your company's performance.</p>
        </div>
        <a asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-secondary">
            <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back to Management View
        </a>
    </div>

    <!-- KPI Cards -->
    @if (stats != null)
    {
        <div class="row g-3 mb-4">
            <div class="col-xl-2 col-md-4 col-sm-6"><div class="kpi-card h-100"><div class="kpi-icon bg-primary"><i class="bi bi-building"></i></div><div class="kpi-content"><div class="kpi-value">@stats.TotalCondominiums</div><div class="kpi-label">Condominiums</div></div></div></div>
            <div class="col-xl-2 col-md-4 col-sm-6"><div class="kpi-card h-100"><div class="kpi-icon bg-dark"><i class="bi bi-door-open-fill"></i></div><div class="kpi-content"><div class="kpi-value">@stats.TotalUnits</div><div class="kpi-label">Total Units</div></div></div></div>
            <div class="col-xl-2 col-md-4 col-sm-6"><div class="kpi-card h-100"><div class="kpi-icon bg-info"><i class="bi bi-people-fill"></i></div><div class="kpi-content"><div class="kpi-value">@stats.TotalResidents</div><div class="kpi-label">Residents</div></div></div></div>
            <div class="col-xl-2 col-md-4 col-sm-6"><div class="kpi-card h-100"><div class="kpi-icon bg-success"><i class="bi bi-graph-up-arrow"></i></div><div class="kpi-content"><div class="kpi-value text-success">@stats.TotalIncomeThisMonth.ToString("C")</div><div class="kpi-label">Income (Month)</div></div></div></div>
            <div class="col-xl-2 col-md-4 col-sm-6"><div class="kpi-card h-100"><div class="kpi-icon bg-danger"><i class="bi bi-graph-down-arrow"></i></div><div class="kpi-content"><div class="kpi-value text-danger">@stats.TotalExpensesThisMonth.ToString("C")</div><div class="kpi-label">Expenses (Month)</div></div></div></div>
            <div class="col-xl-2 col-md-4 col-sm-6"><div class="kpi-card h-100"><div class="kpi-icon bg-warning"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i></div><div class="kpi-content"><div class="kpi-value text-warning">@stats.OpenOccurrences</div><div class="kpi-label">Open Issues</div></div></div></div>
        </div>
    }
    else
    {
        <div class="alert alert-warning">Dashboard statistics are currently unavailable.</div>
    }

    <!-- Charts & Hotspots Section -->
    <div class="row g-4">
        <div class="col-lg-8">
            <div class="card shadow-sm border-0 h-100 chart-card">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="bi bi-bar-chart-line-fill me-2"></i>Income vs. Expenses (Last 6 Months)</h5>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column p-3">
                    <div class="flex-grow-1" style="position: relative; height: 300px;">
                        <canvas id="financialTrendChart"></canvas>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-lg-4">
            <div class="card shadow-sm border-0 h-100 chart-card">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="bi bi-pie-chart-fill me-2"></i>Occurrences by Status</h5>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column p-3">
                    <div class="flex-grow-1" style="position: relative; height: 300px;">
                        <canvas id="occurrenceStatusChart"></canvas>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-12">
            <div class="card shadow-sm border-0 hotspot-card">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-diamond-fill me-2"></i>Condominium Hotspots (Top 5 by Open Issues)</h5>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body p-0">
                    @if (Model?.CondoHotspots != null && Model.CondoHotspots.Any())
                    {
                        <ul class="list-group list-group-flush">
                            @foreach (var hotspot in Model.CondoHotspots)
                            {
                                <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center p-3">
                                    <span>@hotspot.CondominiumName</span>
                                    @{
                                        var badgeClass = hotspot.OpenIssuesCount > 10 ? "bg-danger" : hotspot.OpenIssuesCount > 5 ? "bg-warning text-dark" : "bg-info";
                                    }
                                    <span class="badge rounded-pill @badgeClass fs-6">@hotspot.OpenIssuesCount Open</span>
                                </li>
                            }
                        </ul>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="text-center p-4">
                            <i class="bi bi-check2-circle fs-2 text-success"></i>
                            <p class="text-muted mt-2 mb-0">No open issues found across all condominiums. Great job!</p>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script src="~/lib/chart.js/dist/chart.umd.js"></script>

    <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
            const primaryColor = '#6366f1';
            const successColor = '#10b981';
            const dangerColor = '#ef4444';
            const warningColor = '#f59e0b';
            const infoColor = '#3b82f6';
            const secondaryColor = '#64748b';

            // --- Financial Trend Chart: Bar Chart ---
            @if (Model?.FinancialTrend != null && Model.FinancialTrend.Any())
            {
                    <text>
                    const financialCtx = document.getElementById('financialTrendChart');
                    if (financialCtx) {
                        const financialLabels = @Html.Raw(Json.Serialize(Model.FinancialTrend.Select(f => f.Month)));
                        const incomeData = @Html.Raw(Json.Serialize(Model.FinancialTrend.Select(f => f.TotalIncome)));
                        const expenseData = @Html.Raw(Json.Serialize(Model.FinancialTrend.Select(f => f.TotalExpenses)));

                        new Chart(financialCtx, {
                            type: 'bar',
                            data: {
                                labels: financialLabels,
                                datasets: [
                                    {
                                        label: 'Income',
                                        data: incomeData,
                                        backgroundColor: successColor,
                                        borderRadius: 4
                                    },
                                    {
                                        label: 'Expenses',
                                        data: expenseData,
                                        backgroundColor: dangerColor,
                                        borderRadius: 4
                                    }
                                ]
                            },
                            options: {
                                responsive: true,
                                maintainAspectRatio: false,
                                scales: { y: { beginAtZero: true } }
                            }
                        });
                    }
                    </text>
            }

            // --- Occurrence Status Chart: Doughnut Chart ---
            @if (Model?.OccurrenceSummary != null && Model.OccurrenceSummary.Any())
            {
                     <text>
                    const occurrenceCtx = document.getElementById('occurrenceStatusChart');
                    if (occurrenceCtx) {
                        const occurrenceLabels = @Html.Raw(Json.Serialize(Model.OccurrenceSummary.Select(o => o.StatusName)));
                        const occurrenceData = @Html.Raw(Json.Serialize(Model.OccurrenceSummary.Select(o => o.Count)));

                        new Chart(occurrenceCtx, {
                            type: 'doughnut',
                            data: {
                                labels: occurrenceLabels,
                                datasets: [{
                                    label: 'Occurrences',
                                    data: occurrenceData,
                                    backgroundColor: [
                                        dangerColor,   // Open
                                        warningColor,  // InProgress
                                        infoColor,     // OnHold, Resolved
                                        successColor,  // Closed
                                        secondaryColor
                                    ],
                                    hoverOffset: 8,
                                    borderWidth: 2
                                }]
                            },
                            options: {
                                responsive: true,
                                maintainAspectRatio: false
                            }
                        });
                    }
                    </text>
            }
        });
    </script>
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/Administration/EditCondominium.cshtml
```
@model CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Condominiums.CreateUpdateCondominiumDto

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Edit Condominium";
    ViewData["IsFullWidth"] = true;
}

<style>
    body {
        background-color: var(--light-bg);
    }
</style>

<div class="container my-5">
    <div class="row justify-content-center align-items-center" style="min-height: 70vh;">
        <div class="col-md-11 col-lg-9 col-xl-8">

            <div class="card shadow-lg border-0">
                <div class="card-header text-center py-4" style="background: var(--primary-gradient);">
                    <h2 class="mb-1 text-white"><i class="bi bi-pencil-fill me-2"></i>@ViewData["Title"]</h2>
                    <p class="mb-0 small text-white-50">Updating details for: <strong>@ViewData["CondominiumName"]</strong></p>
                </div>

                <div class="card-body p-4 p-md-5">
                    <form asp-action="EditCondominium" method="post">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <div asp-validation-summary="ModelOnly" class="text-danger mb-4"></div>

                        <div class="form-floating mb-3">
                            <input asp-for="Name" class="form-control" placeholder="Condominium Name" />
                            <label asp-for="Name"></label>
                            <span asp-validation-for="Name" class="text-danger small"></span>
                        </div>

                        <div class="form-floating mb-3">
                            <input asp-for="Address" class="form-control" placeholder="Condominium Address" />
                            <label asp-for="Address"></label>
                            <span asp-validation-for="Address" class="text-danger small"></span>
                        </div>

                        <div class="d-grid gap-2 mt-4">
                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">Save Changes</button>
                            <a asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-secondary">Cancel</a>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <partial name="_ValidationScriptsPartial" />
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/CondoManagement/AllNotifications.cshtml
```
@model IEnumerable<CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Notifications.NotificationDto>

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "All Notifications";
}

<style>
    .notification-item {
        display: flex;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: 1rem;
        padding: 1rem;
        border-bottom: 2px solid #9ca3af;
        transition: background-color 0.2s ease;
        text-decoration: none;
        color: inherit;
    }

        .notification-item:last-child {
            border-bottom: none;
        }

        .notification-item:hover {
            background-color: var(--light-bg);
        }

    .notification-icon-wrapper {
        flex-shrink: 0;
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        background-color: var(--primary-color);
        color: white;
    }

        .notification-icon-wrapper i {
            font-size: 1.25rem;
        }

    .notification-content {
        flex-grow: 1;
    }

    .notification-title {
        font-weight: 600;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
    }

    .notification-message {
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    }

    .notification-meta {
        font-size: 0.8rem;
        color: var(--text-muted);
    }

    .notification-unread {
        background-color: #f7f7ff;
        border-left: 4px solid var(--primary-color);
    }

    .empty-notifications {
        text-align: center;
        padding: 4rem 2rem;
    }
</style>

<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
    <div>
        <h1 class="mb-0">@ViewData["Title"]</h1>
        <p class="text-muted mb-0">Your complete notification history.</p>
    </div>
    <a asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-secondary">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back to My Condos
    </a>
</div>


<div class="card shadow-sm border-0 overflow-hidden">
    <div class="list-group list-group-flush">
        @if (Model.Any())
        {
            @foreach (var notification in Model)
            {
                <a href="@notification.LinkUrl" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action notification-item @(notification.IsRead ? "" : "notification-unread")">
                    <div class="notification-icon-wrapper">
                        <i class="bi bi-bell-fill"></i>
                    </div>
                    <div class="notification-content">
                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-between">
                            <h5 class="notification-title">@notification.Title</h5>
                        </div>
                        <p class="notification-message">@notification.Message</p>
                        <small class="notification-meta">@notification.SentDate.ToLocalTime().ToString("MMMM dd, yyyy 'at' hh:mm tt")</small>
                    </div>
                </a>
            }
        }
        else
        {
            <div class="empty-notifications">
                <i class="bi bi-bell-slash-fill" style="font-size: 3rem; color: var(--text-secondary);"></i>
                <h4 class="mt-3">No Notifications Yet</h4>
                <p class="text-muted">You have no notifications in your history.</p>
            </div>
        }
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/CondoManagement/Announcement.cshtml
```
@model CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Notifications.AnnouncementDto
@using CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Condominiums

@{
    var condo = ViewData["Condominium"] as CondominiumDto;
    ViewData["Title"] = "Send Announcement";
    ViewData["IsFullWidth"] = true;
}

<style>
    body {
        background-color: var(--light-bg);
    }
</style>

<div class="container my-5">
    <div class="row justify-content-center align-items-center" style="min-height: 70vh;">
        <div class="col-md-11 col-lg-9 col-xl-8">

            <div class="card shadow-lg border-0">
                <div class="card-header text-center py-4" style="background: var(--primary-gradient);">
                    <h2 class="mb-1 text-white"><i class="bi bi-megaphone-fill me-2"></i>@ViewData["Title"]</h2>
                    <p class="mb-0 small text-white-50">To all residents of: <strong>@condo.Name</strong></p>
                </div>

                <div class="card-body p-4 p-md-5">
                    <p class="text-muted text-center mb-4">
                        Compose your message below. It will be sent as an email and an in-app notification to all residents of this property.
                    </p>
                    <form asp-action="Announcement" asp-route-condominiumId="@condo.Id" method="post">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <div asp-validation-summary="ModelOnly" class="text-danger mb-3"></div>

                        <div class="form-floating mb-3">
                            <input asp-for="Subject" class="form-control" placeholder="Announcement Subject" />
                            <label asp-for="Subject"></label>
                            <span asp-validation-for="Subject" class="text-danger small"></span>
                        </div>

                        <div class="form-floating mb-3">
                            <textarea asp-for="Message" class="form-control" placeholder="Type your message here..." style="height: 200px;"></textarea>
                            <label asp-for="Message"></label>
                            <span asp-validation-for="Message" class="text-danger small"></span>
                        </div>

                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-end gap-2 mt-4">
                            <a asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@condo.Id" class="btn btn-secondary">Cancel</a>
                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary"><i class="bi bi-send-fill me-2"></i>Send Announcement</button>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>
@section Scripts {
    <partial name="_ValidationScriptsPartial" />
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/CondoManagement/CreateFixedExpense.cshtml
```
@model CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Financials.CreateUpdateFixedExpenseDto
@using CondoSphere.Core.Enums

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Create Fixed Expense";
    ViewData["IsFullWidth"] = true;
}

<style>
    body {
        background-color: var(--light-bg);
    }
</style>

<div class="container my-5">
    <div class="row justify-content-center align-items-center" style="min-height: 70vh;">
        <div class="col-md-11 col-lg-9 col-xl-8">

            <div class="card shadow-lg border-0">
                <div class="card-header text-center py-4" style="background: var(--primary-gradient);">
                    <h2 class="mb-1 text-white"><i class="bi bi-cash-stack me-2"></i>@ViewData["Title"]</h2>
                    <p class="mb-0 small text-white-50">For Condominium: <strong>@ViewData["CondominiumName"]</strong></p>
                </div>

                <div class="card-body p-4 p-md-5">
                    <form asp-action="CreateFixedExpense" method="post">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <div asp-validation-summary="ModelOnly" class="text-danger mb-4"></div>
                        <input type="hidden" asp-for="CondominiumId" />

                        <div class="row">
                            <div class="col-12 mb-3">
                                <div class="form-floating">
                                    <input asp-for="Title" class="form-control" placeholder="e.g., Monthly Cleaning Service" />
                                    <label asp-for="Title"></label>
                                    <span asp-validation-for="Title" class="text-danger small"></span>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="col-12 mb-3">
                                <div class="form-floating">
                                    <textarea asp-for="Description" class="form-control" placeholder="Optional notes..." style="height: 100px;"></textarea>
                                    <label asp-for="Description"></label>
                                    <span asp-validation-for="Description" class="text-danger small"></span>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
                                <div class="form-floating">
                                    <input asp-for="Amount" class="form-control" type="number" step="0.01" inputmode="decimal" placeholder="Amount" />
                                    <label asp-for="Amount"></label>
                                    <span asp-validation-for="Amount" class="text-danger small"></span>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
                                <div class="form-floating">
                                    <select asp-for="Frequency" asp-items="Html.GetEnumSelectList<ExpenseFrequency>().Skip(1)" class="form-select">
                                        <option value="">-- Select Frequency --</option>
                                    </select>
                                    <label asp-for="Frequency"></label>
                                    <span asp-validation-for="Frequency" class="text-danger small"></span>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
                                <div class="form-floating">
                                    <input asp-for="DayOfBilling" class="form-control" type="number" placeholder="Day of Billing" />
                                    <label asp-for="DayOfBilling"></label>
                                    <div class="form-text mt-1">Enter a day from 1 to 28.</div>
                                    <span asp-validation-for="DayOfBilling" class="text-danger small"></span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-end gap-2 mt-4">
                            <a asp-action="FixedExpenses" asp-route-condominiumId="@Model.CondominiumId" class="btn btn-secondary btn-lg">Cancel</a>
                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success btn-lg"><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill me-2"></i>Save Expense</button>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <partial name="_ValidationScriptsPartial" />
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/CondoManagement/CreateUnit.cshtml
```
@model CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Condominiums.CreateUpdateUnitDto

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Add New Unit";
    var condominiumId = ViewData["CondominiumId"];
    ViewData["IsFullWidth"] = true;
}

<style>
    body {
        background-color: var(--light-bg);
    }
</style>

<div class="container my-5">
    <div class="row justify-content-center align-items-center" style="min-height: 70vh;">
        <div class="col-md-11 col-lg-9 col-xl-8">

            <div class="card shadow-lg border-0">
                <div class="card-header text-center py-4" style="background: var(--primary-gradient);">
                    <h2 class="mb-1 text-white"><i class="bi bi-house-add-fill me-2"></i>@ViewData["Title"]</h2>
                    <p class="mb-0 small text-white-50">Adding a unit to: <strong>@ViewData["CondominiumName"]</strong></p>
                </div>

                <div class="card-body" style="padding: 4rem;">
                    <form asp-action="CreateUnit" asp-route-condominiumId="@condominiumId" method="post">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <div asp-validation-summary="ModelOnly" class="text-danger mb-4"></div>

                        <div class="form-floating mb-3">
                            <input asp-for="Identifier" class="form-control" placeholder="e.g., Apt 101, Block B - Floor 2" />
                            <label asp-for="Identifier">Unit Identifier</label>
                            <span asp-validation-for="Identifier" class="text-danger small"></span>
                        </div>

                        <div class="d-grid gap-2 mt-4">
                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success btn-lg">Create Unit</button>
                            <a asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@condominiumId" class="btn btn-secondary btn-lg">Cancel</a>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <partial name="_ValidationScriptsPartial" />
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/CondoManagement/EditFixedExpense.cshtml
```
@model CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Financials.CreateUpdateFixedExpenseDto
@using CondoSphere.Core.Enums

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Edit Fixed Expense";
    ViewData["IsFullWidth"] = true;
}

<style>
    body {
        background-color: var(--light-bg);
    }
</style>

<div class="container my-5">
    <div class="row justify-content-center align-items-center" style="min-height: 70vh;">
        <div class="col-md-11 col-lg-9 col-xl-8">

            <div class="card shadow-lg border-0">
                <div class="card-header text-center py-4" style="background: var(--primary-gradient);">
                    <h2 class="mb-1 text-white"><i class="bi bi-pencil-fill me-2"></i>@ViewData["Title"]</h2>
                    <p class="mb-0 small text-white-50">For Condominium: <strong>@ViewData["CondominiumName"]</strong></p>
                </div>

                <div class="card-body p-4 p-md-5">
                    <form asp-action="EditFixedExpense" asp-route-expenseId="@ViewData["ExpenseId"]" method="post">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <div asp-validation-summary="ModelOnly" class="text-danger mb-4"></div>
                        <input type="hidden" asp-for="CondominiumId" />

                        <div class="row">
                            <div class="col-12 mb-3">
                                <div class="form-floating">
                                    <input asp-for="Title" class="form-control" placeholder="e.g., Monthly Cleaning Service" />
                                    <label asp-for="Title"></label>
                                    <span asp-validation-for="Title" class="text-danger small"></span>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="col-12 mb-3">
                                <div class="form-floating">
                                    <textarea asp-for="Description" class="form-control" placeholder="Optional notes..." style="height: 100px;"></textarea>
                                    <label asp-for="Description"></label>
                                    <span asp-validation-for="Description" class="text-danger small"></span>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
                                <div class="form-floating">
                                    <input asp-for="Amount" class="form-control" type="number" step="0.01" inputmode="decimal" placeholder="Amount" />
                                    <label asp-for="Amount"></label>
                                    <span asp-validation-for="Amount" class="text-danger small"></span>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
                                <div class="form-floating">
                                    <select asp-for="Frequency" asp-items="Html.GetEnumSelectList<ExpenseFrequency>().Skip(1)" class="form-select">
                                        <option value="">-- Select Frequency --</option>
                                    </select>
                                    <label asp-for="Frequency"></label>
                                    <span asp-validation-for="Frequency" class="text-danger small"></span>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
                                <div class="form-floating">
                                    <input asp-for="DayOfBilling" class="form-control" type="number" placeholder="Day of Billing" />
                                    <label asp-for="DayOfBilling"></label>
                                    <div class="form-text mt-1">Enter a day from 1 to 28.</div>
                                    <span asp-validation-for="DayOfBilling" class="text-danger small"></span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-end gap-2 mt-4">
                            <a asp-action="FixedExpenses" asp-route-condominiumId="@Model.CondominiumId" class="btn btn-secondary btn-lg">Cancel</a>
                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg"><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill me-2"></i>Save Changes</button>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <partial name="_ValidationScriptsPartial" />
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/CondoManagement/ExpenseDetails.cshtml
```
@model CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Financials.ExpenseDto

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Expense Details";
    var occurrenceId = ViewData["OccurrenceId"];
    var condominiumId = ViewData["CondominiumId"];
    ViewData["IsFullWidth"] = true;
}

@functions {
    private static bool IsImage(string url)
    {
        try
        {
            var ext = System.IO.Path.GetExtension(new Uri(url).AbsolutePath)?.ToLowerInvariant();
            return ext == ".jpg" || ext == ".jpeg" || ext == ".png" || ext == ".gif" || ext == ".webp" || ext == ".bmp";
        }
        catch { return false; }
    }
}

<style>
    body {
        background-color: var(--light-bg);
    }
</style>

<div class="container my-5">
    <div class="row justify-content-center">
        <div class="col-lg-10 col-xl-9">

            <!-- Page Header -->
            <div class="text-center mb-4">
                <h1 class="mb-1">@Model.Title</h1>
                <p class="text-muted">Expense recorded on @Model.ExpenseDate.ToLocalTime().ToString("f")</p>
            </div>

            <!-- Main Details Card -->
            <div class="card shadow-lg border-0 mb-4">
                <div class="card-header d-flex align-items-center" style="background: var(--primary-gradient);">
                    <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff text-white me-2 fs-5"></i>
                    <h5 class="mb-0 text-white">Expense Details</h5>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body p-4">
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start">
                        <div>
                            <h6 class="text-muted">Description</h6>
                            <p>
                                @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.Description))
                                {
                                    @Model.Description
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <span class="fst-italic">No description provided.</span>
                                }
                            </p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="text-end ps-3">
                            <h6 class="text-muted">Amount</h6>
                            <p class="h3 text-success fw-bold">@Model.Amount.ToString("C")</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Attachments Card -->
            @if (Model.AttachmentUrls.Any())
            {
                <div class="card shadow-lg border-0">
                    <div class="card-header d-flex align-items-center">
                        <i class="bi bi-paperclip me-2 fs-5"></i>
                        <h5 class="mb-0">Attachments</h5>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card-body">
                        @{
                            var imageUrls = Model.AttachmentUrls.Where(u => IsImage(u)).ToList();
                            var otherUrls = Model.AttachmentUrls.Where(u => !IsImage(u)).ToList();
                        }

                        @if (imageUrls.Any())
                        {
                            <h6 class="mb-3 text-muted">Images</h6>
                            <div class="row g-3">
                                @foreach (var url in imageUrls)
                                {
                                    <div class="col-6 col-md-4 col-lg-3">
                                        <a href="@url" target="_blank" class="d-block rounded overflow-hidden shadow-sm" style="border: 1px solid var(--border-color);">
                                            <img src="@url"
                                                 alt="@System.IO.Path.GetFileName(new Uri(url).AbsolutePath)"
                                                 class="img-fluid"
                                                 loading="lazy" />
                                        </a>
                                    </div>
                                }
                            </div>
                        }

                        @if (otherUrls.Any())
                        {
                            @if (imageUrls.Any())
                            {
                                <hr class="my-4" />
                            }
                            <h6 class="mb-3 text-muted">Files</h6>
                            <div class="list-group">
                                @foreach (var url in otherUrls)
                                {
                                    <a href="@url" target="_blank" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action d-flex align-items-center">
                                        <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text-fill text-primary me-2 fs-5"></i>
                                        @System.IO.Path.GetFileName(new Uri(url).AbsolutePath)
                                        <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right ms-auto text-muted"></i>
                                    </a>
                                }
                            </div>
                        }
                    </div>
                </div>
            }

            <!-- Back Button is now at the very bottom, centered -->
            <div class="text-center mt-4">
                <a asp-action="OccurrenceDetails"
                   asp-route-condominiumId="@condominiumId"
                   asp-route-occurrenceId="@occurrenceId"
                   class="btn btn-secondary btn-lg">
                    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back to Occurrence
                </a>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/CondoManagement/FinancialReport.cshtml
```
@model CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Reports.FinancialStatementDto
@using CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Condominiums

@{
    var condo = ViewData["Condominium"] as CondominiumDto;
    ViewData["Title"] = "Financial Statement";

    var selectedMonth = Context.Request.Query.ContainsKey("month") ? int.Parse(Context.Request.Query["month"]) : DateTime.Now.Month;
    var selectedYear = Context.Request.Query.ContainsKey("year") ? int.Parse(Context.Request.Query["year"]) : DateTime.Now.Year;
}

<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
    <div>
        <h1 class="mb-0">@ViewData["Title"]</h1>
        <p class="text-muted mb-0">For Condominium: <strong>@condo.Name</strong></p>
    </div>
    <a asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@condo.Id" class="btn btn-secondary print-hide">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back to Dashboard
    </a>
</div>

<!-- Selection Form -->
<div class="card shadow-sm mb-4 print-hide">
    <div class="card-body">
        <form method="get">
            <div class="row g-3 align-items-end">
                <input type="hidden" name="condominiumId" value="@condo.Id" />
                <div class="col-md">
                    <label for="month" class="form-label fw-bold">Select Month</label>
                    <select name="month" id="month" class="form-select form-select-lg">
                        @for (int i = 1; i <= 12; i++)
                        {
                            <option value="@i" selected="@(i == selectedMonth)">@System.Globalization.CultureInfo.CurrentCulture.DateTimeFormat.GetMonthName(i)</option>
                        }
                    </select>
                </div>
