                <div class="col-md">
                    <label for="year" class="form-label fw-bold">Enter Year</label>
                    <input name="year" id="year" type="number" class="form-control form-control-lg" value="@selectedYear" />
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-auto">
                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg w-100">
                        <i class="bi bi-search me-1"></i> Generate Report
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
</div>

@if (Model != null)
{
    <div id="report-container" class="card shadow-lg border-0">
        <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center print-hide">
            <div>
                <h5 class="mb-0">Statement for @(new DateTime(Model.Year, Model.Month, 1).ToString("MMMM yyyy"))</h5>
                <small class="text-muted">Report generated on @Model.ReportDate.ToLocalTime().ToString("g")</small>
            </div>
            <button onclick="window.print()" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">
                <i class="bi bi-printer-fill me-1"></i> Print
            </button>
        </div>
        <div class="card-body p-4">
            <!-- Summary Row -->
            <div class="row g-3 text-center mb-4">
                <div class="col-md-4">
                    <div class="card bg-light border-success border-2 h-100">
                        <div class="card-body">
                            <h6 class="card-title text-success">Total Income</h6>
                            <p class="card-text h3 fw-bold">@Model.TotalIncome.ToString("C")</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-4">
                    <div class="card bg-light border-danger border-2 h-100">
                        <div class="card-body">
                            <h6 class="card-title text-danger">Total Expenses</h6>
                            <p class="card-text h3 fw-bold">@Model.TotalExpenses.ToString("C")</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-4">
                    <div class="card @(Model.Balance >= 0 ? "bg-success-subtle" : "bg-danger-subtle") h-100">
                        <div class="card-body">
                            <h6 class="card-title">Final Balance</h6>
                            <p class="card-text h3 fw-bold">@Model.Balance.ToString("C")</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Details Tables -->
            <div class="row mt-4">
                <div class="col-lg-6">
                    <h5 class="mb-3"><i class="bi bi-arrow-down-circle-fill text-success me-2"></i>Income Details</h5>
                    <div class="table-responsive">
                        <table class="table table-sm table-bordered table-hover">
                            <thead class="table-light"><tr><th>Date</th><th>Unit</th><th>Description</th><th class="text-end">Amount</th></tr></thead>
                            <tbody>
                                @foreach (var item in Model.IncomeItems)
                                {
                                    <tr><td>@item.PaymentDate.ToString("d")</td><td>@item.UnitIdentifier</td><td>@item.Description</td><td class="text-end">@item.Amount.ToString("C")</td></tr>
                                }
                            </tbody>
                            <tfoot>
                                <tr class="fw-bold">
                                    <td colspan="3">Total Income</td>
                                    <td class="text-end">@Model.TotalIncome.ToString("C")</td>
                                </tr>
                            </tfoot>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="col-lg-6">
                    <h5 class="mb-3"><i class="bi bi-arrow-up-circle-fill text-danger me-2"></i>Expense Details</h5>
                    <div class="table-responsive">
                        <table class="table table-sm table-bordered table-hover">
                            <thead class="table-light"><tr><th>Date</th><th>Title</th><th class="text-end">Amount</th></tr></thead>
                            <tbody>
                                @foreach (var item in Model.ExpenseItems.OrderBy(e => e.ExpenseDate == DateTime.MinValue).ThenBy(e => e.ExpenseDate))
                                {
                                    <tr><td>@(item.ExpenseDate == DateTime.MinValue ? "Recurring" : item.ExpenseDate.ToString("d"))</td><td>@item.Title</td><td class="text-end">@item.Amount.ToString("C")</td></tr>
                                }
                            </tbody>
                            <tfoot>
                                <tr class="fw-bold">
                                    <td colspan="2">Total Expenses</td>
                                    <td class="text-end">@Model.TotalExpenses.ToString("C")</td>
                                </tr>
                            </tfoot>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
}
else if (Context.Request.Query.ContainsKey("year"))
{
    <div class="alert alert-warning text-center">
        <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill fs-4 me-2"></i> No financial data found for the selected period.
    </div>
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/CondoManagement/FixedExpenses.cshtml
```
@model IEnumerable<CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Financials.ExpenseDto>
@using CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Condominiums

@{
    var condo = ViewData["Condominium"] as CondominiumDto;
    ViewData["Title"] = "Fixed Expenses";
}

<style>
    .table-fixed-expenses th {
        font-weight: 600;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        font-size: 0.8rem;
        letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    }

    .table-fixed-expenses .expense-title {
        font-weight: 600;
        color: var(--text-primary);
    }

    .table-fixed-expenses .expense-description {
        font-size: 0.9rem;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
    }

    .btn-action-lg {
        padding: 0.5rem 0.8rem; /* Iteration Knob 1: Controls padding */
        font-size: 1rem; /* Iteration Knob 2: Controls icon size */
    }
</style>

<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
    <div>
        <h1 class="mb-0">@ViewData["Title"]</h1>
        <p class="text-muted mb-0">Manage recurring expenses for: <strong>@condo.Name</strong></p>
    </div>
    <div>
        <a asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@condo.Id" class="btn btn-secondary">
            <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back to Details
        </a>
        <a asp-action="CreateFixedExpense" asp-route-condominiumId="@condo.Id" class="btn btn-primary">
            <i class="bi bi-plus-circle-fill me-1"></i> Create New Expense
        </a>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="card shadow-sm border-0">
    <div class="card-body p-0">
        @if (Model.Any())
        {
            <div class="table-responsive">
                <table class="table table-hover mb-0 align-middle table-fixed-expenses">
                    <thead class="table-light">
                        <tr>
                            <th scope="col" style="width: 35%;">Title</th>
                            <th scope="col" class="text-end">Amount</th>
                            <th scope="col" class="text-center">Frequency</th>
                            <th scope="col" class="text-center">Billing Day</th>
                            <th scope="col" class="text-center">Status</th>
                            <th scope="col" class="text-center">Actions</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        @foreach (var expense in Model)
                        {
                            <tr>
                                <td>
                                    <div class="expense-title">@expense.Title</div>
                                    @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(expense.Description))
                                    {
                                        <div class="expense-description">@expense.Description</div>
                                    }
                                </td>
                                <td class="text-end fw-bold">@expense.Amount.ToString("C")</td>
                                <td class="text-center">@expense.Frequency</td>
                                <td class="text-center">@expense.DayOfBilling</td>
                                <td class="text-center">
                                    @if (expense.IsActive)
                                    {
                                        <span class="badge rounded-pill bg-success">Active</span>
                                    }
                                    else
                                    {
                                        <span class="badge rounded-pill bg-secondary">Inactive</span>
                                    }
                                </td>
                                <td class="text-end">
                                    <div class="btn-group" role="group" aria-label="Expense Actions">

                                        <!-- Edit Button -->
                                        <a asp-action="EditFixedExpense"
                                           asp-route-condominiumId="@condo.Id"
                                           asp-route-expenseId="@expense.Id"
                                           class="btn btn-action-lg btn-outline-secondary" title="Edit">
                                            <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill me-1"></i>
                                            <span>Edit</span>
                                        </a>

                                        <!-- Deactivate/Activate Button -->
                                        <form asp-action="ToggleFixedExpenseStatus"
                                              asp-route-condominiumId="@condo.Id"
                                              asp-route-expenseId="@expense.Id"
                                              method="post" class="d-inline">
                                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-action-lg @(expense.IsActive ? "btn-outline-warning" : "btn-outline-success")" title="@(expense.IsActive ? "Deactivate" : "Activate")">
                                                @if (expense.IsActive)
                                                {
                                                    <i class="bi bi-pause-circle me-1"></i>
                                                    <span>Deactivate</span>
                                                }
                                                else
                                                {
                                                    <i class="bi bi-play-circle me-1"></i>
                                                    <span>Activate</span>
                                                }
                                            </button>
                                        </form>

                                        <!-- Delete Button -->
                                        <form asp-action="DeleteFixedExpense"
                                              asp-route-condominiumId="@condo.Id"
                                              asp-route-expenseId="@expense.Id"
                                              method="post" class="d-inline"
                                              onsubmit="return confirm('Are you sure you want to permanently delete the expense: \'@expense.Title\'? This cannot be undone.');">
                                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-action-lg btn-outline-danger" title="Delete">
                                                <i class="bi bi-trash-fill me-1"></i>
                                                <span>Delete</span>
                                            </button>
                                        </form>
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        }
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        }
        else
        {
            <div class="text-center p-5">
                <i class="bi bi-journal-x fs-1 text-muted"></i>
                <h4 class="mt-3">No Fixed Expenses Found</h4>
                <p class="text-muted">Click the "Create New Expense" button to add a recurring expense for this condominium.</p>
            </div>
        }
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/CondoManagement/GenerateFees.cshtml
```
@model CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Condominiums.CondominiumDto

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Generate Monthly Fees";
    ViewData["IsFullWidth"] = true;
}

<style>
    body {
        background-color: var(--light-bg);
    }
</style>

<div class="container my-5">
    <div class="row justify-content-center align-items-center" style="min-height: 70vh;">
        <div class="col-md-9 col-lg-7 col-xl-6">

            <div class="card shadow-lg border-0">
                <div class="card-header text-center py-4" style="background: var(--primary-gradient);">
                    <h2 class="mb-1 text-white"><i class="bi bi-calculator-fill me-2"></i>@ViewData["Title"]</h2>
                    <p class="mb-0 small text-white-50">For Condominium: <strong>@Model.Name</strong></p>
                </div>

                <div class="card-body p-4 p-md-5">
                    <div class="alert alert-warning d-flex align-items-center mb-4">
                        <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill flex-shrink-0 me-3" style="font-size: 1.5rem;"></i>
                        <div>
                            <strong>This action cannot be undone.</strong> It will generate a new bill for every unit based on the expenses for the selected month.
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <form method="post" onsubmit="return confirm('Are you sure you want to generate fees for the selected period? This cannot be reversed.');">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()

                        <label class="form-label fw-bold">Select Billing Period</label>
                        <div class="row g-3 align-items-end">
                            <div class="col-md">
                                <div class="form-floating">
                                    <select name="month" id="month" class="form-select">
                                        @for (int i = 1; i <= 12; i++)
                                        {
                                            <option value="@i" selected="@(i == DateTime.Now.Month)">@System.Globalization.CultureInfo.CurrentCulture.DateTimeFormat.GetMonthName(i)</option>
                                        }
                                    </select>
                                    <label for="month">Month</label>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="col-md">
                                <div class="form-floating">
                                    <input name="year" id="year" type="number" class="form-control" value="@DateTime.Now.Year" />
                                    <label for="year">Year</label>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="d-grid gap-2 mt-4">
                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">
                                <i class="bi bi-gear-fill me-2"></i>
                                Generate Fees
                            </button>
                            <a asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@Model.Id" class="btn btn-secondary btn-lg">Cancel</a>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/CondoManagement/Receipt.cshtml
```
@model CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Financials.ReceiptDto

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = $"Receipt #{Model.Id}";
    Layout = null;
}

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8" />
    <title>@ViewData["Title"]</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="~/lib/bootstrap/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" />
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.3/font/bootstrap-icons.min.css">

    <style>
        :root {
            --primary-gradient: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
        }

        body {
            background-color: #f8f9fa;
            font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif;
        }

        .receipt-container {
            max-width: 800px;
            margin: 40px auto;
            background-color: #fff;
            border-radius: 0.5rem;
            box-shadow: 0 0.5rem 1.5rem rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .receipt-header {
            background: var(--primary-gradient);
            color: white;
            padding: 1rem;
            text-align: center;
        }

            .receipt-header h1 {
                font-weight: 700;
                letter-spacing: 2px;
                margin: 0;
            }

            .receipt-header p {
                color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
                margin: 0;
                font-size: 1.5rem;
            }

        .receipt-body {
            padding: 2.5rem;
            position: relative;
        }

            .receipt-body::after {
                content: "PAID";
                font-size: 8rem;
                font-weight: 700;
                color: #e9ecef;
                position: absolute;
                top: 50%;
                left: 50%;
                transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(-30deg);
                z-index: 1;
                user-select: none;
            }

        .receipt-content {
            position: relative;
            z-index: 2;
        }

        .table tfoot tr {
            background-color: #f8f9fa;
        }

        .print-controls {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 1rem;
        }

        /* --- PRINT-SPECIFIC STYLES --- */
        @@media print {
            body {
                background-color: #fff !important;
                margin: 0;
                padding: 0;
            }

            .print-hide {
                display: none !important;
            }

            .receipt-container {
                margin: 0;
                box-shadow: none !important;
                border-radius: 0 !important;
                border: none !important;
                width: 100%;
            }

            .receipt-header {
                background-color: #f1f1f1 !important;
                background-image: none !important;
                color: #000 !important;
            }

                .receipt-header p {
                    color: #555 !important;
                }

            .receipt-body::after {
                display: none !important;
            }

            .receipt-content {
                position: static !important;
                z-index: auto !important;
            }

            .table, .table-bordered, .table-bordered th, .table-bordered td {
                border-color: #dee2e6 !important;
                border-width: 1px !important;
                border-style: solid !important;
                color: #000 !important;
                -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;
                print-color-adjust: exact;
            }

            .table-light {
                background-color: #f8f9fa !important;
            }
        }
    </style>


</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <div class="text-center my-4 print-hide print-controls">
            <a asp-action="QuotaManagement" asp-route-condominiumId="@Model.CondominiumId" class="btn btn-secondary btn-lg">
                <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to Quota Management
            </a>
            <button onclick="window.print()" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">
                <i class="bi bi-printer-fill"></i> Print Receipt
            </button>
        </div>

        <div class="receipt-container">

            <div class="receipt-header">
                <h1 class="display-6">RECEIPT</h1>
                <p class="mb-0"><strong>@Model.CompanyName</strong></p>
                @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.CompanyAddress))
                {
                    <p class="mb-0">Address: @Model.CompanyAddress</p>
                }
                @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.CompanyPhone))
                {
                    <p class="mb-0">Phone: @Model.CompanyPhone</p>
                }
            </div>


            <div class="receipt-body">
                <div class="receipt-content">
                    <div class="row mb-4">
                        <div class="col-sm-6">
                            <h5 class="mb-3 text-muted">BILLED TO</h5>
                            <p class="mb-1 fs-5"><strong>@Model.ResidentName</strong></p>
                            <p class="mb-0">@Model.CondominiumName</p>
                            <p class="mb-0">Unit: @Model.UnitIdentifier</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-sm-6 text-sm-end">
                            <h5 class="mb-3 text-muted">DETAILS</h5>
                            <p class="mb-1"><strong>Receipt #:</strong> @Model.Id</p>
                            <p class="mb-0"><strong>Issue Date:</strong> @Model.IssueDate.ToLocalTime().ToString("D")</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <table class="table table-bordered">
                        <thead class="table-light">
                            <tr>
                                <th scope="col">Description</th>
                                <th scope="col" class="text-end">Amount Paid</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                <td>@Model.Details</td>
                                <td class="text-end">@Model.Amount.ToString("C")</td>
                            </tr>
                        </tbody>
                        <tfoot>
                            <tr class="fw-bold fs-5">
                                <td>Total Paid</td>
                                <td class="text-end">@Model.Amount.ToString("C")</td>
                            </tr>
                        </tfoot>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</body>
</html>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/Home/Index.cshtml
```
@model HomeViewModel
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Welcome to CondoSphere";
}

@section Styles {
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/home-style.css" asp-append-version="true" />
}

<!-- Hero Section -->
<div class="hero-section">
    <div class="container">
        <div class="row align-items-center g-5">
            <div class="col-lg-6 hero-text-content">
                <h1 class="mb-4">Effortless Condominium Management, Happier Residents.</h1>
                <p class="lead mb-4">CondoSphere is the all-in-one platform for property managers to streamline operations, enhance communication, and provide a seamless digital experience.</p>
                <div class="d-grid gap-3 d-md-flex">
                    <a asp-controller="Account" asp-action="Register" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg fw-bold">
                        <i class="bi bi-rocket-launch-fill me-2"></i> Get Started
                    </a>
                    <a href="#contact" class="btn btn-secondary btn-lg">
                        <i class="bi bi-telephone-fill me-2"></i> Contact Us
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-lg-5 hero-image-content">
                <img src="~/images/home/hero-image.png" class="d-block mx-auto" alt="CondoSphere Dashboard Screenshot">
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Features Section -->
<div class="content-section features-section border-top" id="features">
    <div class="container">
        <h2 class="text-center section-title">
            <i class="bi bi-star-fill"></i>
            Everything You Need to Manage with Confidence
        </h2>
        <div class="row g-4">
            @foreach (var feature in Model.Features)
            {
                <div class="col-lg-4">
                    <div class="card h-100 feature-card">
                        <div class="feature-icon">
                            <i class="bi @feature.IconClass"></i>
                        </div>
                        <div class="feature-text-content">
                            <h3>@feature.Title</h3>
                            <p class="text-muted">@feature.Description</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            }
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Personas Section ("Designed For You") -->
<div class="content-section personas-section border-top" id="personas">
    <div class="container">
        <h2 class="text-center section-title">
            <i class="bi bi-people-fill"></i>
            A Better Experience for Everyone
        </h2>
        <div class="row g-4 justify-content-center">
            @foreach (var persona in Model.Personas)
            {
                <div class="col-lg-4 col-md-6">
                    <div class="card persona-card h-100">
                        <img src="@persona.ImageUrl" class="card-img-top" alt="@persona.RoleTitle">
                        <div class="card-body">
                            <h3 class="card-title">@persona.RoleTitle</h3>
                            <ul class="benefit-list mt-3">
                                @foreach (var benefit in persona.Benefits)
                                {
                                    <li>@benefit</li>
                                }
                            </ul>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            }
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Testimonials Section -->
<div class="content-section testimonials-section" id="testimonials">
    <div class="container text-center">
        <h2 class="section-title">
            <i class="bi bi-chat-quote-fill"></i>
            Trusted by Modern Management Companies
        </h2>

        @if (Model.Testimonials.Any())
        {
            <div class="row justify-content-center">
                <div class="col-lg-9">
                    <div id="testimonialCarousel" class="carousel slide" data-bs-ride="carousel">
                        <div class="carousel-inner">
                            @for (int i = 0; i < Model.Testimonials.Count; i++)
                            {
                                var testimonial = Model.Testimonials[i];
                                var activeClass = i == 0 ? "active" : "";
                                <div class="carousel-item @activeClass">
                                    <p class="testimonial-quote">"@testimonial.Quote"</p>
                                    <p class="mt-4 mb-0 testimonial-author">@testimonial.AuthorName</p>
                                    <p class="testimonial-author-title">@testimonial.AuthorTitle</p>
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>
                        <button class="carousel-control-prev" type="button" data-bs-target="#testimonialCarousel" data-bs-slide="prev">
                            <span class="carousel-control-prev-icon" aria-hidden="true"></span>
                            <span class="visually-hidden">Previous</span>
                        </button>
                        <button class="carousel-control-next" type="button" data-bs-target="#testimonialCarousel" data-bs-slide="next">
                            <span class="carousel-control-next-icon" aria-hidden="true"></span>
                            <span class="visually-hidden">Next</span>
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        }
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Contact Section -->
<div class="content-section contact-section border-top" id="contact">
    <div class="container">
        <h2 class="text-center section-title">
            <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i>
            Get In Touch
        </h2>
        <div class="row g-4">
            <!-- Contact Information Column -->
            <div class="col-lg-6">
                <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm border-0 contact-info-card">
                    <div class="card-body p-4">
                        <ul class="mt-3">
                            <li>
                                <div class="icon-wrapper">
                                    <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i>
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <strong>Address:</strong><br>
                                    Pólo de Educação e Formação D. João de Castro, R. Jau, 1300-312 Lisboa
                                </div>
                            </li>
                            <li>
                                <div class="icon-wrapper">
                                    <i class="bi bi-telephone-fill"></i>
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <strong>Phone:</strong><br>
                                    (351) 211234567
                                </div>
                            </li>
                            <li>
                                <div class="icon-wrapper">
                                    <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i>
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <strong>Email:</strong><br>
                                    contact@condosphere.com
                                </div>
                            </li>
                        </ul>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Map Column -->
            <div class="col-lg-6">
                <div class="card h-100 contact-map-card">

                    <iframe src="https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=!1m18!1m12!1m3!1d3113.43542289569!2d-9.18788418465524!3d38.70247297960088!2m3!1f0!2f0!3f0!3m2!1i1024!2i768!4f13.1!3m3!1m2!1s0xd193478d056381d%3A0xe21532f22a5786f8!2sCINEL!5e0!3m2!1sen!2spt!4v1633383000000!5m2!1sen!2spt"
                            style="width:100%; height:100%; border:0; min-height: 400px;"
                            allowfullscreen=""
                            loading="lazy"
                            referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade">
                    </iframe>


                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/Messages/Compose.cshtml
```
@model CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Messages.SendMessageDto
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Compose Message";
    var contacts = ViewBag.Contacts as IEnumerable<CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Account.SimpleUserDto> ?? new List<CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Account.SimpleUserDto>();
    var receiverId = ViewBag.ReceiverId as int?;
    ViewData["IsFullWidth"] = true;
}

<style>
    body {
        background-color: var(--light-bg);
    }

    .compose-card .card-header {
        padding-top: 1.5rem;
        padding-bottom: 1.5rem;
    }

    .compose-card .card-body {
        font-size: 1.2rem;
    }

    .compose-card .form-control, .compose-card .form-select {
        font-size: 1.2rem;
    }
</style>

<div class="container my-5">
    <div class="row justify-content-center">
        <div class="col-md-11 col-lg-9 col-xl-8">

            <div class="card shadow-lg border-0 compose-card">
                <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center" style="background: var(--primary-gradient);">
                    <h2 class="mb-0 text-white"><i class="bi bi-pencil-square me-2"></i>@ViewData["Title"]</h2>
                    <a asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-close btn-close-white"></a>
                </div>

                <div class="card-body p-4 p-md-5">
                    <form asp-action="Compose" method="post">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <div asp-validation-summary="ModelOnly" class="text-danger mb-4"></div>

                        <div class="form-floating mb-3">
                            <select asp-for="ReceiverId" asp-items="@(new SelectList(contacts, "Id", "FullName", receiverId))" class="form-select">
                                <option value="">Select recipient...</option>
                            </select>
                            <label asp-for="ReceiverId">To:</label>
                            <span asp-validation-for="ReceiverId" class="text-danger small"></span>
                        </div>

                        <div class="form-floating mb-3">
                            <input asp-for="Subject" class="form-control" placeholder="Enter message subject">
                            <label asp-for="Subject">Subject:</label>
                            <span asp-validation-for="Subject" class="text-danger small"></span>
                        </div>

                        <div class="form-floating mb-3">
                            <textarea asp-for="Content" class="form-control" rows="8" placeholder="Type your message here..." style="min-height: 200px;"></textarea>
                            <label asp-for="Content">Message:</label>
                            <span asp-validation-for="Content" class="text-danger small"></span>
                        </div>

                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-end gap-2 mt-4">
                            <a asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-secondary btn-lg">
                                <i class="bi bi-x-circle me-1"></i> Discard
                            </a>
                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">
                                <i class="bi bi-send-fill me-1"></i> Send Message
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <partial name="_ValidationScriptsPartial" />
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/Messages/Index.cshtml
```
@model IEnumerable<CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Messages.MessageListDto>
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Messages - Inbox";
}

<style>
    .messages-container-scaled {
        font-size: 1.2rem;
    }

        .messages-container-scaled .btn {
            padding: 0.6em 1.1em;
            font-size: 0.9em;
        }
</style>

<div class="messages-container-scaled">
    <div class="container-fluid">
        <div class="row">
            <!-- Sidebar -->
            <div class="col-md-3">
                <div class="card">
                    <div class="card-header">
                        <h5><i class="bi bi-envelope me-2"></i>Messages</h5>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card-body p-0">
                        <div class="list-group list-group-flush">
                            <a asp-action="Index" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action active">
                                <i class="bi bi-inbox-fill me-2"></i> Inbox
                            </a>
                            <a asp-action="Sent" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="bi bi-send-fill me-2"></i> Sent Messages
                            </a>
                            <a asp-action="Compose" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action text-primary">
                                <i class="bi bi-plus-circle-fill me-2"></i> New Message
                            </a>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Main Content -->
            <div class="col-md-9">
                <div class="card">
                    <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                        <h5><i class="bi bi-inbox me-2"></i>Inbox</h5>
                        <a asp-action="Compose" class="btn btn-primary">
                            <i class="bi bi-plus-circle me-1"></i> New Message
                        </a>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card-body p-0">
                        @if (Model.Any())
                        {
                            <div class="table-responsive">
                                <table class="table table-hover mb-0 align-middle">
                                    <thead class="table-light">
                                        <tr>
                                            <th>From</th>
                                            <th>Subject</th>
                                            <th>Building</th>
                                            <th>Date</th>
                                            <th>Status</th>
                                            <th>Actions</th>
                                        </tr>
                                    </thead>
                                    <tbody>
                                        @foreach (var message in Model)
                                        {
                                            <tr class="@(message.IsRead ? "" : "table-warning")">
                                                <td class="fw-@(message.IsRead ? "normal" : "bold")">@message.SenderName</td>
                                                <td class="fw-@(message.IsRead ? "normal" : "bold")">@message.Subject</td>
                                                <td>
                                                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(message.CondominiumName))
                                                    {
                                                        <small class="text-muted">@message.CondominiumName</small>
                                                    }
                                                    else
                                                    {
                                                        <small class="text-muted">General</small>
                                                    }
                                                </td>
                                                <td><small>@message.SentDate.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm")</small></td>
                                                <td>
                                                    @if (message.IsRead)
                                                    {
                                                        <span class="badge bg-success">Read</span>
                                                    }
                                                    else
                                                    {
                                                        <span class="badge bg-warning">Unread</span>
                                                    }
                                                </td>
                                                <td>
                                                    <div class="btn-group" role="group">
                                                        <a asp-action="View" asp-route-id="@message.Id" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary">
                                                            <i class="bi bi-eye"></i> View
                                                        </a>
                                                        <a asp-action="Reply" asp-route-id="@message.Id" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary">
                                                            <i class="bi bi-reply"></i> Reply
                                                        </a>
                                                    </div>
                                                </td>
                                            </tr>
                                        }
                                    </tbody>
                                </table>
                            </div>
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            <div class="text-center p-5">
                                <i class="bi bi-inbox display-4 text-muted"></i>
                                <h5 class="mt-3">Your inbox is empty</h5>
                                <p class="text-muted">You haven't received any messages yet.</p>
                                <a asp-action="Compose" class="btn btn-primary">
                                    <i class="bi bi-plus-circle me-1"></i> Send Your First Message
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        }
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/Messages/Sent.cshtml
```
@model IEnumerable<CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Messages.MessageListDto>
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Messages - Sent";
}

<style>
    .messages-container-scaled {
        font-size: 1.2rem;
    }

        .messages-container-scaled .btn {
            padding: 0.5em 1em;
            font-size: 0.9em;
        }
</style>

<div class="messages-container-scaled">
    <div class="container-fluid">
        <div class="row">
            <!-- Sidebar -->
            <div class="col-md-3">
                <div class="card">
                    <div class="card-header">
                        <h5><i class="bi bi-envelope me-2"></i>Messages</h5>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card-body p-0">
                        <div class="list-group list-group-flush">
                            <a asp-action="Index" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                                <i class="bi bi-inbox-fill me-2"></i> Inbox
                            </a>
                            <a asp-action="Sent" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action active">
                                <i class="bi bi-send-fill me-2"></i> Sent Messages
                            </a>
                            <a asp-action="Compose" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action text-primary">
                                <i class="bi bi-plus-circle-fill me-2"></i> New Message
                            </a>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Main Content -->
            <div class="col-md-9">
                <div class="card">
                    <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                        <h5><i class="bi bi-send me-2"></i>Sent Messages</h5>
                        <a asp-action="Compose" class="btn btn-primary">
                            <i class="bi bi-plus-circle me-1"></i> New Message
                        </a>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card-body p-0">
                        @if (Model.Any())
                        {
                            <div class="table-responsive">
                                <table class="table table-hover mb-0 align-middle">
                                    <thead class="table-light">
                                        <tr>
                                            <th>To</th>
                                            <th>Subject</th>
                                            <th>Building</th>
                                            <th>Date</th>
                                            <th>Actions</th>
                                        </tr>
                                    </thead>
                                    <tbody>
                                        @foreach (var message in Model)
                                        {
                                            <tr>
                                                <td>@message.ReceiverName</td>
                                                <td>@message.Subject</td>
                                                <td>
                                                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(message.CondominiumName))
                                                    {
                                                        <small class="text-muted">@message.CondominiumName</small>
                                                    }
                                                    else
                                                    {
                                                        <small class="text-muted">General</small>
                                                    }
                                                </td>
                                                <td><small>@message.SentDate.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm")</small></td>
                                                <td>
                                                    <a asp-action="View" asp-route-id="@message.Id" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary">
                                                        <i class="bi bi-eye"></i> View
                                                    </a>
                                                </td>
                                            </tr>
                                        }
                                    </tbody>
                                </table>
                            </div>
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            <div class="text-center p-5">
                                <i class="bi bi-send display-4 text-muted"></i>
                                <h5 class="mt-3">No sent messages</h5>
                                <p class="text-muted">You haven't sent any messages yet.</p>
                                <a asp-action="Compose" class="btn btn-primary">
                                    <i class="bi bi-plus-circle me-1"></i> Send Your First Message
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        }
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/Messages/View.cshtml
```
@model CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Messages.MessageDto
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "View Message";
}

<style>
    .message-view-card .card-header {
        background: var(--light-bg);
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    }

    .message-details-grid {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: auto 1fr;
        gap: 0.5rem 1rem;
        font-size: 0.9rem;
    }

        .message-details-grid dt {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            text-align: right;
        }

        .message-details-grid dd {
            margin-bottom: 0;
        }

    .message-content {
        font-size: 1.1rem;
        line-height: 1.6;
        white-space: pre-wrap;
    }
</style>

<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
    <div>
        <h1 class="mb-0">@Model.Subject</h1>
        <p class="text-muted mb-0">Conversation with @Model.SenderName</p>
    </div>
    <div>
        <a asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-secondary">
            <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back to Inbox
        </a>
        <a asp-action="Reply" asp-route-id="@Model.Id" class="btn btn-primary">
            <i class="bi bi-reply-fill me-1"></i> Reply
        </a>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="card shadow-sm border-0 message-view-card">
    <div class="card-header p-3">
        <dl class="message-details-grid">
            <dt>From:</dt>
            <dd>@Model.SenderName</dd>

            <dt>To:</dt>
            <dd>@Model.ReceiverName</dd>

            <dt>Date:</dt>
            <dd>@Model.SentDate.ToLocalTime().ToString("dddd, MMMM dd, yyyy 'at' hh:mm tt")</dd>

            @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.CondominiumName))
            {
                <dt>Property:</dt>
                <dd>@Model.CondominiumName</dd>
            }
        </dl>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body p-4 p-md-5">
        <div class="message-content">
            @Model.Content
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/Portal/AllNotifications.cshtml
```
@model IEnumerable<CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Notifications.NotificationDto>

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "All Notifications";
}

<style>
    .notification-item {
        display: flex;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: 1rem;
        padding: 1rem;
        border-bottom: 2px solid #e2e8f0; /* Darker, thicker border */
        transition: background-color 0.2s ease;
        text-decoration: none;
        color: inherit;
    }

        .notification-item:last-child {
            border-bottom: none;
        }

        .notification-item:hover {
            background-color: var(--light-bg);
        }

    .notification-icon-wrapper {
        flex-shrink: 0;
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        background-color: var(--primary-color);
        color: white;
    }

        .notification-icon-wrapper i {
            font-size: 1.25rem;
        }

    .notification-content {
        flex-grow: 1;
    }

    .notification-title {
        font-weight: 600;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
    }

    .notification-message {
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    }

    .notification-meta {
        font-size: 0.8rem;
        color: var(--text-muted);
    }

    .notification-unread {
        background-color: #f0f8ff; /* A pleasant light blue for unread items */
    }

        .notification-unread .notification-title {
            font-weight: 700; /* Make unread titles bolder */
        }

    .empty-notifications {
        text-align: center;
        padding: 4rem 2rem;
    }
</style>

<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
    <div>
        <h1 class="mb-0">@ViewData["Title"]</h1>
        <p class="text-muted mb-0">Your complete notification history.</p>
    </div>
    <a asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-secondary">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back to Portal
    </a>
</div>

<div class="card shadow-sm border-0 overflow-hidden">
    <div class="list-group list-group-flush">
        @if (Model.Any())
        {
            @foreach (var notification in Model)
            {
                <a href="@notification.LinkUrl" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action notification-item @(notification.IsRead ? "" : "notification-unread")">
                    <div class="notification-icon-wrapper">
                        <i class="bi bi-bell-fill"></i>
                    </div>
                    <div class="notification-content">
                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-between">
                            <h5 class="notification-title">@notification.Title</h5>
                        </div>
                        <p class="notification-message">@notification.Message</p>
                        <small class="notification-meta">@notification.SentDate.ToLocalTime().ToString("MMMM dd, yyyy 'at' hh:mm tt")</small>
                    </div>
                </a>
            }
        }
        else
        {
            <div class="empty-notifications">
                <i class="bi bi-bell-slash-fill" style="font-size: 3rem; color: var(--text-secondary);"></i>
                <h4 class="mt-3">No Notifications Yet</h4>
                <p class="text-muted">You have no notifications in your history.</p>
            </div>
        }
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/Portal/Details.cshtml
```
@model CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Occurrences.OccurrenceDto
@using CondoSphere.Core.Enums

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Occurrence Details";
}

<style>
    .details-card-body {
        font-size: 1.3rem; /* Makes content text slightly larger */
    }

    .status-badge-lg {
        font-size: 1.3rem;
        padding: 0.8em 0.9em;
    }

    .details-label {
        font-weight: 600;
        width: 160px;
    }
</style>

<!-- Page Header -->
<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
    <div>
        <h1 class="mb-0">@Model.Title</h1>
    </div>
    <a asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-secondary">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back to Portal
    </a>
</div>

<!-- SINGLE PARENT CARD -->
<div class="card shadow-sm border-0">
    <div class="card-header bg-light">
        <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text-fill me-2"></i>Details</h5>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body p-4 details-card-body">
        <div class="row g-4">

            <!-- Left Column for Details -->
            <div class="col-lg-8">

                <!-- Status Row -->
                <div class="row mb-3">
                    <div class="col-auto details-label">Current Status:</div>
                    <div class="col">
                        @{
                            var statusClass = "bg-secondary";
                            switch (Model.Status)
                            {
                                case OccurrenceStatus.Open: statusClass = "bg-danger"; break;
                                case OccurrenceStatus.InProgress: statusClass = "bg-warning text-dark"; break;
                                case OccurrenceStatus.Resolved: statusClass = "bg-info"; break;
                                case OccurrenceStatus.Closed: statusClass = "bg-success"; break;
                            }
                        }
                        <span class="badge rounded-pill @statusClass status-badge-lg">@Model.Status</span>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Description Section -->
                <div class="row mb-3">
                    <div class="col-auto details-label">Description:</div>
                    <div class="col">@Model.Description</div>
                </div>

                <hr class="my-3" />

                <!-- Metadata Rows -->
                <div class="row mb-2">
                    <div class="col-auto details-label">Reported On:</div>
                    <div class="col">@Model.ReportedDate.ToLocalTime().ToString("f")</div>
                </div>
                <div class="row mb-2">
                    <div class="col-auto details-label">Reported By:</div>
                    <div class="col">@Model.ReportedByUserName</div>
                </div>
                <div class="row">
                    <div class="col-auto details-label">Unit:</div>
                    <div class="col">@Model.UnitId</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Right Column for Image -->
            <div class="col-lg-4">
                @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.ImageUrl))
                {
                    <div class="card shadow-sm border-0 h-100">
                        <div class="card-header bg-light">
                            <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="bi bi-image-fill me-2"></i>Attached Image</h5>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card-body p-1">
                            <a href="@Model.ImageUrl" target="_blank" title="Click to view full size">
                                <img src="@Model.ImageUrl" alt="Occurrence Image" class="img-fluid rounded" />
                            </a>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                }
                else
                {
                    <div class="card bg-light h-100">
                        <div class="card-body text-center text-muted d-flex flex-column justify-content-center">
                            <i class="bi bi-image-alt fs-1"></i>
                            <p class="mt-2">No image was provided.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                }
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/Portal/PayQuota.cshtml
```
@model CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Financials.UnitQuotaDto

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Secure Payment";
    var stripePublishableKey = ViewData["StripePublishableKey"] as string;
    ViewData["IsFullWidth"] = true;
}

<style>
    body {
        background-color: var(--light-bg);
    }
</style>

<div class="container my-5">
    <div class="row justify-content-center align-items-center" style="min-height: 70vh;">
        <div class="col-md-11 col-lg-9 col-xl-7">

            <div class="card shadow-lg border-0 text-center">
                <div class="card-header py-4" style="background: var(--primary-gradient);">
                    <h2 class="mb-1 text-white"><i class="bi bi-credit-card-2-front-fill me-2"></i>@ViewData["Title"]</h2>
                    <p class="mb-0 small text-white-50">Powered by Stripe</p>
                </div>

                <div class="card-body p-4 p-md-5">
                    <h5 class="card-title">You are paying for:</h5>
                    <p class="lead mb-4"><strong>@Model.Description</strong></p>

                    <div class="bg-primary-subtle p-3 rounded mb-4">
                        <h6 class="text-primary-emphasis mb-1">Total Amount Due</h6>
                        <span class="h2 text-primary-emphasis fw-bold">@Model.AmountDue.ToString("C")</span>
                    </div>

                    <div class="d-grid">
                        <button id="checkout-button" class="btn btn-success btn-lg">
                            <i class="bi bi-lock-fill me-2"></i>
                            Pay with Card
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="card-footer text-center py-3 bg-light">
                    <a asp-action="QuotaDetails" asp-route-id="@Model.Id" class="btn btn-link">
                        <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i>
                        Back to Bill Details
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@Html.AntiForgeryToken()
<script src="https://js.stripe.com/v3/"></script>

<script>
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
        const stripe = Stripe('@stripePublishableKey');
        const checkoutButton = document.getElementById('checkout-button');
        const tokenInput = document.querySelector('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]');

        if (checkoutButton && tokenInput) {
             checkoutButton.addEventListener('click', function () {
                checkoutButton.disabled = true;
                checkoutButton.innerHTML = '<span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm" role="status" aria-hidden="true"></span> Redirecting...';

                fetch('/portal/quotas/@Model.Id/create-session', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {
                        'RequestVerificationToken': tokenInput.value
                    }
                })
                .then(function (response) {
                    if (!response.ok) {
                        throw new Error('Could not create payment session.');
                    }
                    return response.json();
                })
                .then(function (session) {
                    return stripe.redirectToCheckout({ sessionId: session.sessionId });
                })
                .then(function (result) {

                    if (result.error) {
                        alert(result.error.message);
                        checkoutButton.disabled = false;
                        checkoutButton.innerHTML = '<i class="bi bi-lock-fill me-2"></i> Pay with Card';
                    }
                })
                .catch(function (error) {
                    console.error('Error:', error);
                    alert('An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.');
                    checkoutButton.disabled = false;
                    checkoutButton.innerHTML = '<i class="bi bi-lock-fill me-2"></i> Pay with Card';
                });
            });
        }
    });
</script>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/Portal/QuotaDetails.cshtml
```
@model CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Financials.QuotaBreakdownDto
@using CondoSphere.Core.Enums

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Fee Details";
    var totalExpenses = Model.FixedExpenses.Sum(e => e.Amount) + Model.OneTimeExpenses.Sum(e => e.Amount);
}

<style>
    .table-breakdown th {
        font-weight: 600;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        font-size: 0.8rem;
        letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    }

    .table-breakdown tfoot {
        font-weight: 600;
    }
</style>

<!-- Page Header -->
<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
    <div>
        <h1 class="mb-0">@Model.QuotaDetails.Description</h1>
        <p class="text-muted mb-0">Details for the fee due on @Model.QuotaDetails.DueDate.ToString("d")</p>
    </div>
    <a asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-secondary">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back to Portal
    </a>
</div>

<div class="row g-4">
    <!-- Left Column: Expense Details -->
    <div class="col-lg-8">
        <div class="vstack gap-4">
            <!-- Recurring Expenses Card -->
            <div class="card shadow-sm border-0">
                <div class="card-header bg-light"><h5 class="mb-0"><i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat me-2"></i>Recurring Expenses</h5></div>
                <div class="card-body p-0">
                    @if (Model.FixedExpenses.Any())
                    {
                        <table class="table mb-0 table-breakdown">
                            <tbody>
                                @foreach (var expense in Model.FixedExpenses)
                                {
                                    <tr>
                                        <td>@expense.Title</td>
                                        <td class="text-end">@expense.Amount.ToString("C")</td>
                                    </tr>
                                }
                            </tbody>
                            <tfoot>
                                <tr class="table-light">
                                    <td>Subtotal</td>
                                    <td class="text-end">@Model.FixedExpenses.Sum(e => e.Amount).ToString("C")</td>
                                </tr>
                            </tfoot>
                        </table>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <p class="p-3 text-muted">No recurring expenses were included this month.</p>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- One-Time Expenses Card -->
            <div class="card shadow-sm border-0">
                <div class="card-header bg-light"><h5 class="mb-0"><i class="bi bi-tools me-2"></i>One-Time & Maintenance Expenses</h5></div>
                <div class="card-body p-0">
                    @if (Model.OneTimeExpenses.Any())
                    {
                        <table class="table mb-0 table-breakdown">
                            <tbody>
                                @foreach (var expense in Model.OneTimeExpenses)
                                {
                                    <tr>
                                        <td>@expense.Title</td>
                                        <td class="text-end">@expense.Amount.ToString("C")</td>
                                    </tr>
                                }
                            </tbody>
                            <tfoot>
                                <tr class="table-light">
                                    <td>Subtotal</td>
                                    <td class="text-end">@Model.OneTimeExpenses.Sum(e => e.Amount).ToString("C")</td>
                                </tr>
                            </tfoot>
                        </table>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <p class="p-3 text-muted">No one-time expenses were included this month.</p>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Right Column: Summary -->
    <div class="col-lg-4">
        <div class="card shadow-sm border-0" style="position: sticky; top: 20px;">
            <div class="card-header bg-light"><h5 class="mb-0"><i class="bi bi-card-list me-2"></i>Summary</h5></div>
            <div class="card-body">
                <dl class="row">
                    <dt class="col-7">Total Expenses:</dt>
                    <dd class="col-5 text-end">@totalExpenses.ToString("C")</dd>

                    <dt class="col-7">Number of Units:</dt>
                    <dd class="col-5 text-end">@Model.TotalUnitsInCondo</dd>

                    <dt class="col-7 border-top pt-2">Fee Per Unit:</dt>
                    <dd class="col-5 text-end border-top pt-2">@((Model.TotalUnitsInCondo > 0 ? totalExpenses / Model.TotalUnitsInCondo : 0).ToString("C"))</dd>
                </dl>
                <hr />
                <div class="bg-primary-subtle p-3 rounded text-center">
                    <h6 class="text-primary-emphasis mb-1">Your Total Due</h6>
                    <span class="h3 text-primary-emphasis fw-bold">@Model.QuotaDetails.AmountDue.ToString("C")</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Bottom Section: Payment -->
<div class="card shadow-sm border-0 mt-4">
    <div class="card-header bg-light"><h5 class="mb-0"><i class="bi bi-credit-card-2-front-fill me-2"></i>Payment</h5></div>
    <div class="card-body">
        @if (Model.QuotaDetails.Status == UnitQuotaStatus.Pending || Model.QuotaDetails.Status == UnitQuotaStatus.Overdue)
        {
            <form asp-action="SubmitProof" asp-route-id="@Model.QuotaDetails.Id" method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">
                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                <div class="row align-items-center">
                    <div class="col-lg-8">
                        <label for="proofFile" class="form-label fw-bold">Upload Proof of Payment</label>
                        <input name="proofFile" id="proofFile" class="form-control form-control-lg" type="file" required accept="image/*,.pdf" />
                        <small class="text-muted">Upload a receipt or bank transfer screenshot.</small>
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-lg-4 mt-3 mt-lg-0">
                        <div class="d-grid">
                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">
                                <i class="bi bi-upload me-1"></i> Submit Proof
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </form>
        }
        else if (Model.QuotaDetails.Status == UnitQuotaStatus.PendingConfirmation)
        {
            <div class="alert alert-info d-flex align-items-center mb-0">
                <i class="bi bi-hourglass-split flex-shrink-0 me-3" style="font-size: 1.5rem;"></i>
                <div>
                    <h5 class="alert-heading">Awaiting Confirmation</h5>
                    <p class="mb-0">Your payment proof has been submitted and is awaiting confirmation from the manager.</p>
                </div>
            </div>
        }
        else if (Model.QuotaDetails.Status == UnitQuotaStatus.Paid)
        {
            <div class="alert alert-success d-flex align-items-center mb-0">
                <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill flex-shrink-0 me-3" style="font-size: 1.5rem;"></i>
                <div>
                    <h5 class="alert-heading">Paid</h5>
                    <p class="mb-0">This fee was paid on @Model.QuotaDetails.PaymentDate?.ToLocalTime().ToString("d").</p>
                </div>
            </div>
        }
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/Profile/ChangePassword.cshtml
```
@model ChangePasswordViewModel
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Change Password";
    ViewData["IsFullWidth"] = true;
}

<style>
    body {
        background-color: var(--light-bg);
    }
</style>

<div class="container my-5">
    <div class="row justify-content-center align-items-center" style="min-height: 70vh;">
        <div class="col-md-11 col-lg-9 col-xl-7">

            <div class="card shadow-lg border-0">
                <div class="card-header text-center py-4" style="background: var(--primary-gradient);">
                    <h2 class="mb-1 text-white"><i class="bi bi-shield-lock-fill me-2"></i>@ViewData["Title"]</h2>
                    <p class="mb-0 small text-white-50">Update your account security.</p>
                </div>

                <div class="card-body p-4 p-md-5">
                    <form asp-action="ChangePassword" method="post">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <div asp-validation-summary="All" class="text-danger mb-3"></div>

                        <div class="form-floating mb-3">
                            <input asp-for="CurrentPassword" class="form-control" type="password" placeholder="Current Password" />
                            <label asp-for="CurrentPassword"></label>
                            <span asp-validation-for="CurrentPassword" class="text-danger small"></span>
                        </div>

                        <div class="form-floating mb-3">
                            <input asp-for="NewPassword" class="form-control" type="password" placeholder="New Password" />
                            <label asp-for="NewPassword"></label>
                            <span asp-validation-for="NewPassword" class="text-danger small"></span>
                        </div>

                        <div class="form-floating mb-3">
                            <input asp-for="ConfirmPassword" class="form-control" type="password" placeholder="Confirm New Password" />
                            <label asp-for="ConfirmPassword"></label>
                            <span asp-validation-for="ConfirmPassword" class="text-danger small"></span>
                        </div>

                        <div class="d-grid gap-2 mt-4">
                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">Update Password</button>
                            <a asp-controller="Profile" asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-secondary btn-lg">Cancel</a>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/Shared/_CondoMgmtFinancialsPartial.cshtml
```
@model CondoSphere.Web.Models.CondominiumDetailsViewModel

<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3">
    <h5 class="mb-0">Financial Tools</h5>
    <div class="btn-group">
        <a asp-controller="CondoManagement" asp-action="QuotaManagement" asp-route-condominiumId="@Model.Condominium.Id" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-info">
            <i class="bi bi-cash-stack me-1"></i> Manage Quotas
        </a>
        <a asp-controller="CondoManagement" asp-action="FinancialReport" asp-route-condominiumId="@Model.Condominium.Id" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-dark">
            <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-bar-graph me-1"></i> Financial Report
        </a>
        <a asp-controller="CondoManagement" asp-action="FixedExpenses" asp-route-condominiumId="@Model.Condominium.Id" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary">
            <i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat me-1"></i> Manage Fixed Expenses
        </a>
        <a asp-controller="CondoManagement" asp-action="GenerateFees" asp-route-id="@Model.Condominium.Id" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary">
            <i class="bi bi-calculator-fill me-1"></i> Generate Monthly Fees
        </a>
    </div>
</div>
<p class="text-muted">
    Use this section to manage recurring costs, generate monthly fees for all residents, and review payment statuses.
</p>
