```
                             HorizontalOptions="Center" />
        </Frame>

        <!-- Header -->
        <Frame Grid.Row="0"
               BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Primary}"
               CornerRadius="24"
               HasShadow="False"
               Padding="24,40,24,24"
               Margin="0,0,0,20">
            <Frame.Shadow>
                <Shadow Brush="{StaticResource ShadowDark}" 
                        Offset="0,4" 
                        Radius="12" 
                        Opacity="0.15" />
            </Frame.Shadow>
            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto">
                <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="4">
                    <Label Text="📋 Document Library" 
                           Style="{StaticResource HeadingMedium}"
                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" />
                    <Label Text="Access your property documents and files"
                           Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}"
                           Opacity="0.9" />
                </VerticalStackLayout>
            </Grid>
        </Frame>

        <!-- Quick Access Filters) -->
        <VerticalStackLayout Grid.Row="1" Spacing="12" Padding="20,0,20,10">
            <Label Text="📁 Quick Access" Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />
            <ScrollView Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalScrollBarVisibility="Never">
                <HorizontalStackLayout Spacing="12" Padding="4,0">

                    <!-- All Documents -->
                    <Frame Padding="16,12" WidthRequest="120" Style="{StaticResource InactiveCategoryCard}">
                        <Frame.GestureRecognizers>
                            <TapGestureRecognizer Command="{Binding FilterByCategoryCommand}" CommandParameter="All Files" />
                        </Frame.GestureRecognizers>
                        <Frame.Triggers>
                            <DataTrigger TargetType="Frame" Binding="{Binding SelectedCategory}" Value="All Files">
                                <Setter Property="Style" Value="{StaticResource ActiveCategoryCard}" />
                            </DataTrigger>
                        </Frame.Triggers>
                        <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="4" HorizontalOptions="Center">
                            <Label Text="📄" FontSize="20" HorizontalOptions="Center" />
                            <Label Text="All Files" Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}" HorizontalTextAlignment="Center">
                                <Label.Triggers>
                                    <DataTrigger TargetType="Label" Binding="{Binding Source={RelativeSource AncestorType={x:Type Frame}}, Path=Style}" Value="{StaticResource ActiveCategoryCard}">
                                        <Setter Property="Style" Value="{StaticResource ActiveCategoryLabel}" />
                                    </DataTrigger>
                                </Label.Triggers>
                            </Label>
                        </VerticalStackLayout>
                    </Frame>

                    <!-- Minutes -->
                    <Frame Padding="16,12" WidthRequest="120" Style="{StaticResource InactiveCategoryCard}">
                        <Frame.GestureRecognizers>
                            <TapGestureRecognizer Command="{Binding FilterByCategoryCommand}" CommandParameter="Meeting Minutes" />
                        </Frame.GestureRecognizers>
                        <Frame.Triggers>
                            <DataTrigger TargetType="Frame" Binding="{Binding SelectedCategory}" Value="Meeting Minutes">
                                <Setter Property="Style" Value="{StaticResource ActiveCategoryCard}" />
                            </DataTrigger>
                        </Frame.Triggers>
                        <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="4" HorizontalOptions="Center">
                            <Label Text="📝" FontSize="20" HorizontalOptions="Center" />
                            <Label Text="Minutes" Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}" HorizontalTextAlignment="Center">
                                <Label.Triggers>
                                    <DataTrigger TargetType="Label" Binding="{Binding Source={RelativeSource AncestorType={x:Type Frame}}, Path=Style}" Value="{StaticResource ActiveCategoryCard}">
                                        <Setter Property="Style" Value="{StaticResource ActiveCategoryLabel}" />
                                    </DataTrigger>
                                </Label.Triggers>
                            </Label>
                        </VerticalStackLayout>
                    </Frame>

                    <!-- Budget -->
                    <Frame Padding="16,12" WidthRequest="120" Style="{StaticResource InactiveCategoryCard}">
                        <Frame.GestureRecognizers>
                            <TapGestureRecognizer Command="{Binding FilterByCategoryCommand}" CommandParameter="Budget" />
                        </Frame.GestureRecognizers>
                        <Frame.Triggers>
                            <DataTrigger TargetType="Frame" Binding="{Binding SelectedCategory}" Value="Budget">
                                <Setter Property="Style" Value="{StaticResource ActiveCategoryCard}" />
                            </DataTrigger>
                        </Frame.Triggers>
                        <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="4" HorizontalOptions="Center">
                            <Label Text="💰" FontSize="20" HorizontalOptions="Center" />
                            <Label Text="Budget" Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}" HorizontalTextAlignment="Center">
                                <Label.Triggers>
                                    <DataTrigger TargetType="Label" Binding="{Binding Source={RelativeSource AncestorType={x:Type Frame}}, Path=Style}" Value="{StaticResource ActiveCategoryCard}">
                                        <Setter Property="Style" Value="{StaticResource ActiveCategoryLabel}" />
                                    </DataTrigger>
                                </Label.Triggers>
                            </Label>
                        </VerticalStackLayout>
                    </Frame>

                    <!-- Regulations -->
                    <Frame Padding="16,12" WidthRequest="120" Style="{StaticResource InactiveCategoryCard}">
                        <Frame.GestureRecognizers>
                            <TapGestureRecognizer Command="{Binding FilterByCategoryCommand}" CommandParameter="Regulations" />
                        </Frame.GestureRecognizers>
                        <Frame.Triggers>
                            <DataTrigger TargetType="Frame" Binding="{Binding SelectedCategory}" Value="Regulations">
                                <Setter Property="Style" Value="{StaticResource ActiveCategoryCard}" />
                            </DataTrigger>
                        </Frame.Triggers>
                        <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="4" HorizontalOptions="Center">
                            <Label Text="⚖️" FontSize="20" HorizontalOptions="Center" />
                            <Label Text="Rules" Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}" HorizontalTextAlignment="Center">
                                <Label.Triggers>
                                    <DataTrigger TargetType="Label" Binding="{Binding Source={RelativeSource AncestorType={x:Type Frame}}, Path=Style}" Value="{StaticResource ActiveCategoryCard}">
                                        <Setter Property="Style" Value="{StaticResource ActiveCategoryLabel}" />
                                    </DataTrigger>
                                </Label.Triggers>
                            </Label>
                        </VerticalStackLayout>
                    </Frame>

                </HorizontalStackLayout>
            </ScrollView>
        </VerticalStackLayout>

        <!-- Main Content -->
        <RefreshView Grid.Row="2" 
                     Command="{Binding LoadDataCommand}" 
                     IsRefreshing="{Binding IsBusy}">
            <CollectionView x:Name="documentsCollectionView" 
                            ItemsSource="{Binding Documents}"
                            SelectionMode="Single"
                            Margin="20,0,20,40">

                <CollectionView.Header>
                    <Label Text="📋 Recent Documents" 
                           Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}"
                           Margin="4,8,0,0" />
                </CollectionView.Header>

                <!-- Document Items -->
                <CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
                    <DataTemplate x:DataType="dto:DocumentDto">
                        <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Margin="0,6">
                            <Frame.GestureRecognizers>
                                <TapGestureRecognizer Command="{Binding Source={RelativeSource AncestorType={x:Type vm:DocumentsViewModel}}, Path=OpenDocumentCommand}" 
                                                      CommandParameter="{Binding .}"/>
                            </Frame.GestureRecognizers>
                            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto" 
                                  RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto"
                                  ColumnSpacing="16"
                                  RowSpacing="4">
                                <Frame Grid.RowSpan="3" CornerRadius="20" HeightRequest="40" WidthRequest="40" Padding="0" HasShadow="False" BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Info}">
                                    <Label Text="📄" FontSize="18" HorizontalOptions="Center" VerticalOptions="Center" />
                                </Frame>
                                <Label Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding Title}" Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />
                                <Label Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="1" Text="{Binding Category}" Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}" TextColor="{StaticResource Primary}" FontAttributes="Bold" />
                                <Grid Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="2" ColumnDefinitions="Auto,Auto,*" ColumnSpacing="12">
                                    <Label Text="{Binding UploadDate, StringFormat='{0:MMM dd, yyyy}'}" Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />
                                    <Label Grid.Column="1" Text="•" Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />
                                    <Label Grid.Column="2" Text="{Binding UploadedByUserName}" Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}" TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />
                                </Grid>
                                <Frame Grid.Column="2" Grid.RowSpan="3" CornerRadius="16" HeightRequest="32" WidthRequest="32" Padding="0" HasShadow="False" BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Success}">
                                    <Label Text="⬇️" FontSize="14" HorizontalOptions="Center" VerticalOptions="Center" />
                                </Frame>
                            </Grid>
                        </Frame>
                    </DataTemplate>
                </CollectionView.ItemTemplate>

                <!-- Empty State -->
                <CollectionView.EmptyView>
                    <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Padding="40" Margin="0,40">
                        <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="20" HorizontalOptions="Center">
                            <Label Text="📁" FontSize="64" HorizontalOptions="Center" Opacity="0.5" />
                            <Label Text="No Documents Available" Style="{StaticResource SubheadingLarge}" HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />
                            <Label Text="Documents for the selected category will appear here." Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}" HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />
                        </VerticalStackLayout>
                    </Frame>
                </CollectionView.EmptyView>
            </CollectionView>
        </RefreshView>
    </Grid>
</ContentPage>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/Views/LoginPage.xaml
```
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<ContentPage xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels"
             x:DataType="vm:LoginViewModel"
             x:Class="CondoSphere.Mobile.Views.LoginPage"
             Shell.NavBarIsVisible="False"
             BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BackgroundSecondary}"
             Title="Login">

    <ScrollView>
        <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto" Padding="0" MinimumHeightRequest="700">

            <!-- Header Section with Brand -->
            <Frame Grid.Row="0" 
                   BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Primary}"
                   CornerRadius="32"
                   HasShadow="False"
                   Padding="0"
                   Margin="0,0,0,40">
                <Frame.Shadow>
                    <Shadow Brush="{StaticResource ShadowDark}" 
                            Offset="0,8" 
                            Radius="24" 
                            Opacity="0.2" />
                </Frame.Shadow>

                <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="16" 
                                   Padding="40,20,40,15"
                                   VerticalOptions="Center">

                    <!-- App Icon Placeholder -->
                    <Frame BackgroundColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}"
                           CornerRadius="32"
                           HeightRequest="64"
                           WidthRequest="64"
                           HasShadow="False"
                           HorizontalOptions="Center"
                           Padding="0">
                        <Label Text="🏢" 
                               FontSize="32"
                               HorizontalOptions="Center"
                               VerticalOptions="Center" />
                    </Frame>

                    <!-- Welcome Text -->
                    <Label Text="Welcome to CondoSphere"
                           Style="{StaticResource HeadingMedium}"
                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}"
                           HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />

                    <Label Text="Manage your condominium with ease"
                           Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}"
                           Opacity="0.9"
                           HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />
                </VerticalStackLayout>
            </Frame>

            <!-- Login Form -->
            <VerticalStackLayout Grid.Row="1" 
                               Spacing="24" 
                               Padding="32,0"
                               VerticalOptions="Center">

                <!-- Email Input -->
                <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8">
                    <Label Text="Email Address" 
                           Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}"
                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />

                    <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardOutline}" 
                           Padding="0"
                           HeightRequest="56">
                        <Entry Placeholder="Enter your email" 
                               Text="{Binding Email}" 
                               Keyboard="Email"
                               Style="{StaticResource EntryDefault}"
                               BackgroundColor="Transparent" />
                    </Frame>
                </VerticalStackLayout>

                <!-- Password Input -->
                <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8">
                    <Label Text="Password" 
                           Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}"
                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />

                    <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardOutline}" 
                           Padding="0"
                           HeightRequest="56">
                        <Entry Placeholder="Enter your password" 
                               Text="{Binding Password}" 
                               IsPassword="True"
                               Style="{StaticResource EntryDefault}"
                               BackgroundColor="Transparent" />
                    </Frame>
                </VerticalStackLayout>

                <!-- Login Button -->
                <Button Text="Sign In" 
                        Command="{Binding LoginCommand}"
                        Style="{StaticResource ButtonPrimary}"
                        Margin="0,16,0,0"
                        IsEnabled="{Binding IsBusy, Converter={StaticResource InverseBoolConverter}}" />

                <!-- Loading Indicator -->
                <ActivityIndicator IsRunning="{Binding IsBusy}" 
                                 Color="{StaticResource Primary}"
                                 HeightRequest="32"
                                 WidthRequest="32"
                                 HorizontalOptions="Center"
                                 IsVisible="{Binding IsBusy}" />

                <!-- Forgot Password Link -->
                <Button Text="Forgot Password?" 
                        Style="{StaticResource ButtonGhost}"
                        FontSize="14"
                        HeightRequest="40"
                        Margin="0,8,0,0" />

            </VerticalStackLayout>

            <!-- Footer -->
            <VerticalStackLayout Grid.Row="2" 
                               Spacing="16" 
                               Padding="32,32,32,40">

                <BoxView HeightRequest="1" 
                         BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BorderPrimary}"
                         Margin="0,0,0,16" />

                <Label Text="Need help? Contact your property manager"
                       Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                       HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />

                <Label Text="© 2024 CondoSphere. All rights reserved."
                       Style="{StaticResource Caption}"
                       HorizontalTextAlignment="Center"
                       Opacity="0.7" />
            </VerticalStackLayout>

        </Grid>
    </ScrollView>
</ContentPage>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/Views/ProfilePage.xaml
```
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<ContentPage xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml"
             xmlns:behaviors="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.Behaviors;assembly=CondoSphere.Mobile"
             x:Class="CondoSphere.Mobile.Views.ProfilePage"
             xmlns:vm="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels"
             x:DataType="vm:ProfileViewModel"
             BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BackgroundSecondary}"
             Title="My Profile">

    <ContentPage.ToolbarItems>
        <ToolbarItem Text="Close" Command="{Binding GoBackCommand}" Order="Primary" Priority="0" />
    </ContentPage.ToolbarItems>
    
    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">

        <!-- Header with User Info -->
        <Frame Grid.Row="0"
               BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Primary}"
               CornerRadius="24"
               HasShadow="False"
               Padding="24,40,24,32"
               Margin="0,0,0,20">
            <Frame.Shadow>
                <Shadow Brush="{StaticResource ShadowDark}" 
                        Offset="0,4" 
                        Radius="12" 
                        Opacity="0.15" />
            </Frame.Shadow>

            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto" ColumnSpacing="20">

                <!-- Profile Avatar -->
                <Frame CornerRadius="32"
                       HeightRequest="64"
                       WidthRequest="64"
                       Padding="0"
                       HasShadow="False"
                       BackgroundColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}">
                    <Image Source="{Binding ProfilePictureUrl}" 
                    Aspect="AspectFill"
                    HeightRequest="64"
                     WidthRequest="64">
                        <Image.Clip>
                            <EllipseGeometry RadiusX="32" RadiusY="32" Center="32,32"/>
                        </Image.Clip>
                    </Image>
                </Frame>

                <!-- User Info -->
                <VerticalStackLayout Grid.Column="1" 
                                   Spacing="4"
                                   VerticalOptions="Center">
                    <Label Text="{Binding FullName}"
                           Style="{StaticResource SubheadingLarge}"
                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" />
                    <Label Text="{Binding RoleAndUnit}"
                           Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}"
                           Opacity="0.9" />
                    <Label Text="{Binding Email}"
                           Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}"
                           Opacity="0.8" />
                </VerticalStackLayout>

                <!-- Edit Button -->
                <Frame Grid.Column="2"
                       BackgroundColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}"
                       CornerRadius="16"
                       HeightRequest="32"
                       WidthRequest="32"
                       Padding="0"
                       HasShadow="False">
                    <Frame.GestureRecognizers>
                        <TapGestureRecognizer Command="{Binding GoToEditProfileCommand}" />
                    </Frame.GestureRecognizers>
                    <Label Text="✏️" 
                           FontSize="14"
                           HorizontalOptions="Center"
                           VerticalOptions="Center" />
                </Frame>
            </Grid>
        </Frame>

        <!-- Main Content -->
        <ScrollView Grid.Row="1">
            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="24" Padding="20,0,20,40">

                <!-- Account Settings -->
                <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="16">
                    <Label Text="⚙️ Account Settings" 
                           Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />

                    <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}">
                        <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="0">

                            <!-- Edit Profile -->
                            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto" 
                                  RowDefinitions="48"
                                  ColumnSpacing="16">
                                <Grid.GestureRecognizers>
                                    <TapGestureRecognizer Command="{Binding GoToEditProfileCommand}" />
                                </Grid.GestureRecognizers>

                                <Frame CornerRadius="16"
                                       HeightRequest="32"
                                       WidthRequest="32"
                                       Padding="0"
                                       HasShadow="False"
                                       BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Info}"
                                       VerticalOptions="Center">
                                    <Label Text="👤" 
                                           FontSize="16"
                                           HorizontalOptions="Center"
                                           VerticalOptions="Center" />
                                </Frame>

                                <VerticalStackLayout Grid.Column="1" 
                                                   VerticalOptions="Center"
                                                   Spacing="2">
                                    <Label Text="Edit Profile" 
                                           Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                                           FontAttributes="Bold" />
                                    <Label Text="Update your personal information" 
                                           Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />
                                </VerticalStackLayout>

                                <Label Grid.Column="2" 
                                       Text="▶️" 
                                       FontSize="12"
                                       VerticalOptions="Center" />
                            </Grid>

                            <!-- Separator -->
                            <BoxView HeightRequest="1" 
                                     BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BorderPrimary}"
                                     Margin="0,16" />

                            <!-- Change Password -->
                            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto" 
                                  RowDefinitions="48"
                                  ColumnSpacing="16">
                                <Grid.GestureRecognizers>
                                    <TapGestureRecognizer Command="{Binding GoToChangePasswordCommand}" />
                                </Grid.GestureRecognizers>

                                <Frame CornerRadius="16"
                                       HeightRequest="32"
                                       WidthRequest="32"
                                       Padding="0"
                                       HasShadow="False"
                                       BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Warning}"
                                       VerticalOptions="Center">
                                    <Label Text="🔐" 
                                           FontSize="16"
                                           HorizontalOptions="Center"
                                           VerticalOptions="Center" />
                                </Frame>

                                <VerticalStackLayout Grid.Column="1" 
                                                   VerticalOptions="Center"
                                                   Spacing="2">
                                    <Label Text="Change Password" 
                                           Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                                           FontAttributes="Bold" />
                                    <Label Text="Update your account security" 
                                           Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />
                                </VerticalStackLayout>

                                <Label Grid.Column="2" 
                                       Text="▶️" 
                                       FontSize="12"
                                       VerticalOptions="Center" />
                            </Grid>

                            <!-- Separator -->
                            <BoxView HeightRequest="1" 
                                     BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BorderPrimary}"
                                     Margin="0,16" />

                            <!-- Notification Settings -->
                            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto" 
                                  RowDefinitions="48"
                                  ColumnSpacing="16">
                                <Grid.GestureRecognizers>
                                    <TapGestureRecognizer />
                                </Grid.GestureRecognizers>

                                <Frame CornerRadius="16"
                                       HeightRequest="32"
                                       WidthRequest="32"
                                       Padding="0"
                                       HasShadow="False"
                                       BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Secondary}"
                                       VerticalOptions="Center">
                                    <Label Text="🔔" 
                                           FontSize="16"
                                           HorizontalOptions="Center"
                                           VerticalOptions="Center" />
                                </Frame>

                                <VerticalStackLayout Grid.Column="1" 
                                                   VerticalOptions="Center"
                                                   Spacing="2">
                                    <Label Text="Notifications" 
                                           Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                                           FontAttributes="Bold" />
                                    <Label Text="Manage your notification preferences" 
                                           Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />
                                </VerticalStackLayout>

                                <Label Grid.Column="2" 
                                       Text="▶️" 
                                       FontSize="12"
                                       VerticalOptions="Center" />
                            </Grid>
                        </VerticalStackLayout>
                    </Frame>
                </VerticalStackLayout>

                <!-- My Properties Info -->
                <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="16">
                    <Label Text="🏠 My Property" 
                           Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />

                    <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardElevated}">
                        <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*" 
                              RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto"
                              ColumnSpacing="16"
                              RowSpacing="8">

                            <!-- Building Icon -->
                            <Frame Grid.RowSpan="3"
                                   CornerRadius="24"
                                   HeightRequest="48"
                                   WidthRequest="48"
                                   Padding="0"
                                   HasShadow="False"
                                   BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Primary}">
                                <Label Text="🏢" 
                                       FontSize="24"
                                       HorizontalOptions="Center"
                                       VerticalOptions="Center" />
                            </Frame>

                            <!-- Property Details -->
                            <Label Grid.Column="1" 
                                   Text="Sunset Gardens Residence" 
                                   Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />

                            <Label Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="1"
                                   Text="Unit 4B • 3 Bedrooms" 
                                   Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                                   TextColor="{StaticResource Primary}" />

                            <Label Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="2"
                                   Text="Rua das Flores, 123, Lisboa" 
                                   Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                                   TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />
                        </Grid>
                    </Frame>
                </VerticalStackLayout>

                <!-- Quick Stats -->
                <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="16">
                    <Label Text="📊 Quick Overview" 
                           Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />

                    <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,*" ColumnSpacing="12">

                        <!-- Bills Status -->
                        <Frame Grid.Column="0" 
                               Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}"
                               Padding="20">
                            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8" HorizontalOptions="Center">
                                <Label Text="💳" FontSize="28" HorizontalOptions="Center" />
                                <Label Text="Up to Date" 
                                       Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}"
                                       TextColor="{StaticResource Success}"
                                       HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />
                                <Label Text="Bills Status" 
                                       Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                                       HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />
                            </VerticalStackLayout>
                        </Frame>

                        <!-- Issues Reported -->
                        <Frame Grid.Column="1" 
                               Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}"
                               Padding="20">
                            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8" HorizontalOptions="Center">
                                <Label Text="📋" FontSize="28" HorizontalOptions="Center" />
                                <Label Text="2 Active" 
                                       Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}"
                                       TextColor="{StaticResource Warning}"
                                       HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />
                                <Label Text="Issues" 
                                       Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                                       HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />
                            </VerticalStackLayout>
                        </Frame>
                    </Grid>
                </VerticalStackLayout>

                <!-- Support & Help -->
                <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="16">
                    <Label Text="💬 Support" 
                           Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />

                    <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}">
                        <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="0">

                            <!-- Contact Support -->
                            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto" 
                                  RowDefinitions="48"
                                  ColumnSpacing="16">
                                <Grid.GestureRecognizers>
                                    <TapGestureRecognizer />
                                </Grid.GestureRecognizers>

                                <Frame CornerRadius="16"
                                       HeightRequest="32"
                                       WidthRequest="32"
                                       Padding="0"
                                       HasShadow="False"
                                       BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Success}"
                                       VerticalOptions="Center">
                                    <Label Text="📞" 
                                           FontSize="16"
                                           HorizontalOptions="Center"
                                           VerticalOptions="Center" />
                                </Frame>

                                <VerticalStackLayout Grid.Column="1" 
                                                   VerticalOptions="Center"
                                                   Spacing="2">
                                    <Label Text="Contact Property Manager" 
                                           Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                                           FontAttributes="Bold" />
                                    <Label Text="Get help with your property issues" 
                                           Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />
                                </VerticalStackLayout>

                                <Label Grid.Column="2" 
                                       Text="▶️" 
                                       FontSize="12"
                                       VerticalOptions="Center" />
                            </Grid>

                            <!-- Separator -->
                            <BoxView HeightRequest="1" 
                                     BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BorderPrimary}"
                                     Margin="0,16" />

                            <!-- Help & FAQ -->
                            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto" 
                                  RowDefinitions="48"
                                  ColumnSpacing="16">
                                <Grid.GestureRecognizers>
                                    <TapGestureRecognizer />
                                </Grid.GestureRecognizers>

                                <Frame CornerRadius="16"
                                       HeightRequest="32"
                                       WidthRequest="32"
                                       Padding="0"
                                       HasShadow="False"
                                       BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Info}"
                                       VerticalOptions="Center">
                                    <Label Text="❓" 
                                           FontSize="16"
                                           HorizontalOptions="Center"
                                           VerticalOptions="Center" />
                                </Frame>

                                <VerticalStackLayout Grid.Column="1" 
                                                   VerticalOptions="Center"
                                                   Spacing="2">
                                    <Label Text="Help and FAQ" 
                                           Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                                           FontAttributes="Bold" />
                                    <Label Text="Find answers to common questions" 
                                           Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />
                                </VerticalStackLayout>

                                <Label Grid.Column="2" 
                                       Text="▶️" 
                                       FontSize="12"
                                       VerticalOptions="Center" />
                            </Grid>
                        </VerticalStackLayout>
                    </Frame>
                </VerticalStackLayout>

                <!-- App Info & Logout -->
                <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="16">
                    <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardOutline}">
                        <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="16">

                            <!-- App Version -->
                            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto">
                                <Label Text="CondoSphere Mobile v1.0.0" 
                                       Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                                       VerticalOptions="Center" />
                                <Label Grid.Column="1" 
                                       Text="ℹ️" 
                                       FontSize="16"
                                       VerticalOptions="Center" />
                            </Grid>

                            <!-- Logout Button -->
                            <Button Text="🚪 Sign Out" 
                                    Command="{Binding SignOutCommand}"
                                    Style="{StaticResource ButtonOutline}"
                                    HeightRequest="44"
                                    BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Error}"
                                    TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}"
                                    BorderColor="{StaticResource Error}" />
                        </VerticalStackLayout>
                    </Frame>
                </VerticalStackLayout>

            </VerticalStackLayout>
        </ScrollView>
    </Grid>
</ContentPage>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Mobile/Views/ResidentPortalPage.xaml
```
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<ContentPage xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Mobile.ViewModels"
             xmlns:dto="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Financials;assembly=CondoSphere.Core"
             xmlns:dtoOcc="clr-namespace:CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Occurrences;assembly=CondoSphere.Core"
             x:DataType="vm:ResidentPortalViewModel"
             x:Class="CondoSphere.Mobile.Views.ResidentPortalPage"
             BackgroundColor="{StaticResource BackgroundSecondary}"
             Title="My Portal">

    <ContentPage.ToolbarItems>
        <ToolbarItem Text="Report an Occurrence"
                     IconImageSource="plus_icon.png" 
                     Command="{Binding AddOccurrenceCommand}" />
        <ToolbarItem IconImageSource="default_profile.png" Command="{Binding GoToProfileCommand}" Order="Primary" Priority="0" />
    </ContentPage.ToolbarItems>

    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">

        <!-- Loading Overlay -->
        <Frame Grid.RowSpan="2" 
               BackgroundColor="#80000000"
               IsVisible="{Binding IsBusy}"
               ZIndex="999"
               Padding="0">
            <ActivityIndicator IsRunning="{Binding IsBusy}" 
                             Color="{StaticResource Primary}"
                             HeightRequest="48"
                             WidthRequest="48"
                             VerticalOptions="Center" 
                             HorizontalOptions="Center" />
        </Frame>

        <!-- Header with Welcome Message -->
        <Frame Grid.Row="0"
               BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Primary}"
               CornerRadius="24"
               HasShadow="False"
               Padding="24,40,24,24"
               Margin="0,0,0,16">
            <Frame.Shadow>
                <Shadow Brush="{StaticResource ShadowDark}" 
                        Offset="0,4" 
                        Radius="12" 
                        Opacity="0.15" />
            </Frame.Shadow>

            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto">
                <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="4">
                    <Label Text="Good day!" 
                           Style="{StaticResource SubheadingLarge}"
                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}" />
                    <Label Text="Here's what's happening in your home"
                           Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                           TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}"
                           Opacity="0.9" />
                </VerticalStackLayout>

                <!-- Notification Bell Icon -->
                <Frame Grid.Column="1"
                       BackgroundColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}"
                       CornerRadius="20"
                       HeightRequest="40"
                       WidthRequest="40"
                       Padding="0"
                       HasShadow="False">
                    <Label Text="🔔" 
                           FontSize="18"
                           HorizontalOptions="Center"
                           VerticalOptions="Center" />
                </Frame>
            </Grid>
        </Frame>

        <!-- Main Content -->
        <RefreshView Grid.Row="1" 
                     Command="{Binding LoadDataCommand}" 
                     IsRefreshing="{Binding IsBusy}">
            <ScrollView>
                <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="24" Padding="20,0,20,40">

                    <!-- Quick Stats Cards -->
                    <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,*" 
                          RowDefinitions="Auto"
                          ColumnSpacing="12">

                        <!-- Unpaid Bills Card -->
                        <Frame Grid.Column="0" 
                               Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}"
                               Padding="16">
                            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8">
                                <Label Text="💳" FontSize="24" />
                                <Label Text="Pending Bills" 
                                       Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                                       TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />
                                <Label Text="{Binding Quotas.Count}" 
                                       Style="{StaticResource SubheadingLarge}"
                                       TextColor="{StaticResource Primary}" />
                            </VerticalStackLayout>
                        </Frame>

                        <!-- Open Issues Card -->
                        <Frame Grid.Column="1" 
                               Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}"
                               Padding="16">
                            <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="8">
                                <Label Text="⚠️" FontSize="24" />
                                <Label Text="Open Issues" 
                                       Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                                       TextColor="{StaticResource TextSecondary}" />
                                <Label Text="{Binding Occurrences.Count}" 
                                       Style="{StaticResource SubheadingLarge}"
                                       TextColor="{StaticResource Warning}" />
                            </VerticalStackLayout>
                        </Frame>
                    </Grid>

                    <!-- Bills Section -->
                    <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="16">
                        <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto">
                            <Label Text="Bills and Payments" 
                                   Style="{StaticResource SubheadingLarge}" />
                            <Button Grid.Column="1" 
                                    Text="View All" 
                                    Style="{StaticResource ButtonGhost}"
                                    FontSize="14"
                                    HeightRequest="32"
                                    Padding="12,0" />
                        </Grid>

                        <CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding Quotas}"
                                        HeightRequest="200">
                            <CollectionView.EmptyView>
                                <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}"
                                       Padding="32">
                                    <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="12" HorizontalOptions="Center">
                                        <Label Text="📋" FontSize="48" HorizontalOptions="Center" />
                                        <Label Text="No bills at the moment" 
                                               Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                                               HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />
                                        <Label Text="You're all caught up!" 
                                               Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                                               HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />
                                    </VerticalStackLayout>
                                </Frame>
                            </CollectionView.EmptyView>

                            <CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate x:DataType="dto:UnitQuotaDto">
                                    <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" 
                                           Margin="0,4">
                                        <Frame.GestureRecognizers>
                                            <TapGestureRecognizer 
                                                Command="{Binding Source={RelativeSource AncestorType={x:Type vm:ResidentPortalViewModel}}, Path=ViewQuotaDetailsCommand}"
                                                CommandParameter="{Binding .}" />
                                        </Frame.GestureRecognizers>

                                        <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto" 
                                              RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto"
                                              ColumnSpacing="16"
                                              RowSpacing="4">

                                            <!-- Status Icon -->
                                            <Frame Grid.RowSpan="3"
                                                   CornerRadius="20"
                                                   HeightRequest="40"
                                                   WidthRequest="40"
                                                   Padding="0"
                                                   HasShadow="False"
                                                   BackgroundColor="{Binding Status, Converter={StaticResource StatusToColorConverter}}">
                                                <Label Text="💰" 
                                                       FontSize="18"
                                                       HorizontalOptions="Center"
                                                       VerticalOptions="Center" />
                                            </Frame>

                                            <!-- Bill Details -->
                                            <Label Grid.Column="1" 
                                                   Text="{Binding Description}" 
                                                   Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />

                                            <Label Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="1"
                                                   Text="{Binding AmountDue, StringFormat='€{0:N2}'}" 
                                                   Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                                                   TextColor="{StaticResource Primary}"
                                                   FontAttributes="Bold" />

                                            <Label Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="2"
                                                   Text="{Binding DueDate, StringFormat='Due: {0:MMM dd, yyyy}'}" 
                                                   Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}" />

                                            <!-- Status Badge -->
                                            <Frame Grid.Column="2" Grid.RowSpan="3"
                                                   CornerRadius="12"
                                                   Padding="8,4"
                                                   HasShadow="False"
                                                   VerticalOptions="Start"
                                                   BackgroundColor="{Binding Status, Converter={StaticResource StatusToColorConverter}}">
                                                <Label Text="{Binding Status}" 
                                                       Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                                                       TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}"
                                                       FontAttributes="Bold" />
                                            </Frame>
                                        </Grid>
                                    </Frame>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
                        </CollectionView>
                    </VerticalStackLayout>

                    <!-- Issues Section -->
                    <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="16">
                        <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto">
                            <Label Text="My Reported Issues" 
                                   Style="{StaticResource SubheadingLarge}" />
                            <Button Grid.Column="1" 
                                    Text="+ Report" 
                                    Style="{StaticResource ButtonOutline}"
                                    FontSize="14"
                                    HeightRequest="36"
                                    Padding="16,0"
                                    Command="{Binding AddOccurrenceCommand}" />
                        </Grid>

                        <CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding Occurrences}"
                                        HeightRequest="200">
                            <CollectionView.EmptyView>
                                <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}"
                                       Padding="32">
                                    <VerticalStackLayout Spacing="12" HorizontalOptions="Center">
                                        <Label Text="✅" FontSize="48" HorizontalOptions="Center" />
                                        <Label Text="No issues reported" 
                                               Style="{StaticResource BodyMedium}"
                                               HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />
                                        <Label Text="Everything looks good!" 
                                               Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                                               HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" />
                                    </VerticalStackLayout>
                                </Frame>
                            </CollectionView.EmptyView>

                            <CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate x:DataType="dtoOcc:OccurrenceDto">
                                    <Frame Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" 
                                           Margin="0,4">

                                        <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto" 
                                              RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto"
                                              ColumnSpacing="16"
                                              RowSpacing="4">

                                            <!-- Issue Icon -->
                                            <Frame Grid.RowSpan="2"
                                                   CornerRadius="20"
                                                   HeightRequest="40"
                                                   WidthRequest="40"
                                                   Padding="0"
                                                   HasShadow="False"
                                                   BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Warning}">
                                                <Label Text="🔧" 
                                                       FontSize="18"
                                                       HorizontalOptions="Center"
                                                       VerticalOptions="Center" />
                                            </Frame>

                                            <!-- Issue Details -->
                                            <Label Grid.Column="1" 
                                                   Text="{Binding Title}" 
                                                   Style="{StaticResource SubheadingMedium}" />

                                            <Label Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="1"
                                                   Text="{Binding ReportedDate, StringFormat='Reported: {0:MMM dd, yyyy}'}" 
                                                   Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}" />

                                            <!-- Status Badge -->
                                            <Frame Grid.Column="2" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                                                   CornerRadius="12"
                                                   Padding="8,4"
                                                   HasShadow="False"
                                                   VerticalOptions="Start"
                                                   BackgroundColor="{StaticResource Info}">
                                                <Label Text="{Binding Status}" 
                                                       Style="{StaticResource BodySmall}"
                                                       TextColor="{StaticResource TextOnPrimary}"
                                                       FontAttributes="Bold" />
                                            </Frame>
                                        </Grid>
                                    </Frame>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
                        </CollectionView>
                    </VerticalStackLayout>
                </VerticalStackLayout>
            </ScrollView>
        </RefreshView>
    </Grid>
</ContentPage>
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Controllers/ProfileController.cs
```csharp
using CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Account;
using CondoSphere.Web.Models;
using CondoSphere.Web.Services;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.Cookies;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using Microsoft.IdentityModel.Tokens;
using System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt;
using System.Security.Claims;
using System.Text;

namespace CondoSphere.Web.Controllers
{
    [Authorize]
    [Route("profile")]
    public class ProfileController : Controller
    {
        private readonly ApiClient _apiClient;
        private readonly IImageService _imageService;
        private readonly IConfiguration _configuration;

        public ProfileController(ApiClient apiClient, IImageService imageService, IConfiguration configuration)
        {
            _apiClient = apiClient;
            _imageService = imageService;
            _configuration = configuration;
        }

        [HttpGet("")]
        public async Task<IActionResult> Index()
        {
            var email = User.FindFirstValue(ClaimTypes.Email) ?? User.Identity?.Name ?? "";

            var model = new MyProfileViewModel
            {
                FirstName = User.FindFirstValue(ClaimTypes.GivenName) ?? "",
                LastName = User.FindFirstValue(ClaimTypes.Surname) ?? "",
                PhoneNumber = User.FindFirstValue(ClaimTypes.MobilePhone) ?? "",
                CurrentProfileImageUrl = User.FindFirstValue("profile_picture"),
                // 👇 estado atual do 2FA vindo da API
                TwoFactorEnabled = await _apiClient.IsTwoFactorEnabledAsync(new EmailDto { Email = email })
            };

            return View(model);
        }

        [HttpPost("")]
        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]
        public async Task<IActionResult> Index(MyProfileViewModel model)
        {
            if (!ModelState.IsValid)
            {
                model.CurrentProfileImageUrl = User.FindFirstValue("profile_picture");
                return View(model);
            }

            // Step 1: upload imagem
            string? finalImageUrl = model.CurrentProfileImageUrl;
            if (model.ProfileImage != null && model.ProfileImage.Length > 0)
            {
                finalImageUrl = await _imageService.SaveImageAsync(
                    model.ProfileImage, "user-photos", model.CurrentProfileImageUrl);
            }

            // Step 2: DTO para API
            var dto = new UpdateProfileDto
            {
                FirstName = model.FirstName,
                LastName = model.LastName,
                PhoneNumber = model.PhoneNumber,
                ProfilePictureUrl = finalImageUrl
            };

            // Step 3: chama API (volta com novo JWT)
            var (success, message, newToken) = await _apiClient.UpdateProfileAsync(dto);

            if (success && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(newToken))
            {
                // Step 4: reemitir cookie
                var handler = new JwtSecurityTokenHandler();
                var principal = handler.ValidateToken(
                    newToken,
                    new TokenValidationParameters
                    {
                        ValidateIssuer = true,
                        ValidateAudience = true,
                        ValidateIssuerSigningKey = true,
                        ValidateLifetime = true,
                        ClockSkew = TimeSpan.Zero,
                        ValidIssuer = _configuration["Jwt:Issuer"],
                        ValidAudience = _configuration["Jwt:Audience"],
                        IssuerSigningKey = new SymmetricSecurityKey(Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(_configuration["Jwt:Key"]))
                    },
                    out _
                );

                var claimsIdentity = (ClaimsIdentity)principal.Identity!;
                claimsIdentity.AddClaim(new Claim("access_token", newToken)); // guarda o novo token

                await HttpContext.SignInAsync(
                    CookieAuthenticationDefaults.AuthenticationScheme,
                    new ClaimsPrincipal(claimsIdentity),
                    new AuthenticationProperties { IsPersistent = true });

                TempData["SuccessMessage"] = "Your profile has been updated.";
                return RedirectToAction("Index");
            }

            ModelState.AddModelError(string.Empty, message);
            model.CurrentProfileImageUrl = User.FindFirstValue("profile_picture");
            return View(model);
        }


        public class Toggle2FaVm { public bool Enable { get; set; } }

        [HttpPost("ToggleTwoFactor")]
        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]
        public async Task<IActionResult> ToggleTwoFactor([FromBody] Toggle2FaVm vm)
        {
            var email = User.FindFirstValue(ClaimTypes.Email) ?? User.Identity?.Name ?? "";
            var result = await _apiClient.SwitchTwoFactorAsync(new ToggleTwoFactorDto
            {
                Email = email,
                Enable = vm.Enable
            });

            if (result.Success) return Ok(new { message = result.Message });
            return BadRequest(new { message = result.Message });
        }

        [HttpGet("change-password")]
        public IActionResult ChangePassword() => View(new ChangePasswordViewModel());

        [HttpPost("change-password")]
        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]
        public async Task<IActionResult> ChangePassword(ChangePasswordViewModel model)
        {
            if (!ModelState.IsValid) return View(model);

            var (success, message) = await _apiClient.ChangePasswordAsync(model);
            if (success)
            {
                ModelState.Clear();
                TempData["SuccessMessage"] = "Your password has been changed successfully.";
                return RedirectToAction("Index");
            }

            ModelState.AddModelError(string.Empty, "Failed to change password. Please check your current password and try again.");
            return View(model);
        }
    }
}
```

## File: CondoSphere.Web/Views/Account/Login.cshtml
```
@model CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Account.LoginDto

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Log in";
    ViewData["IsFullWidth"] = true;
}

<style>
    body {
        background: var(--light-bg);
    }
</style>

<div class="container" style="margin-top: 4rem; margin-bottom: 3rem;">
    <div class="row justify-content-center align-items-center" style="min-height: 70vh;">
        <div class="col-md-11 col-lg-9 col-xl-7">

            <div class="card shadow-lg border-0">
                <div class="card-header text-center py-4" style="background: var(--primary-gradient);">
                    <h2 class="mb-1 text-white"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-in-right me-2"></i>Welcome Back</h2>
                    <p class="mb-0 small text-white-50">Sign in to continue to CondoSphere</p>
                </div>

                <div class="card-body p-4 p-md-5">
                    <section>
                        <form id="account" method="post">
                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()

                            <div asp-validation-summary="ModelOnly" class="text-danger mb-3"></div>

                            <!-- Email with Icon -->
                            <div class="mb-3">
                                <label asp-for="Email" class="form-label fw-bold"></label>
                                <div class="input-group">
                                    <span class="input-group-text"><i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i></span>
                                    <div class="form-floating flex-grow-1">
                                        <input asp-for="Email" class="form-control" placeholder="Email" autocomplete="username" aria-required="true" />
                                        <label asp-for="Email"></label>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <span asp-validation-for="Email" class="text-danger small mt-1 d-block"></span>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Password with Icon -->
                            <div class="mb-3">
                                <label asp-for="Password" class="form-label fw-bold"></label>
                                <div class="input-group">
                                    <span class="input-group-text"><i class="bi bi-lock-fill"></i></span>
                                    <div class="form-floating flex-grow-1">
                                        <input asp-for="Password" class="form-control" type="password" placeholder="Password" autocomplete="current-password" aria-required="true" />
                                        <label asp-for="Password"></label>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <span asp-validation-for="Password" class="text-danger small mt-1 d-block"></span>
                            </div>

                            <div class="d-grid mt-4">
                                <button id="login-submit" type="submit" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">Log in</button>
                            </div>

                            <div class="text-center mt-3">
                                <a asp-action="ForgotPassword">Forgot your password?</a>
                            </div>
                        </form>
                    </section>
                </div>

                <div class="card-footer text-center py-3 bg-light">
                    <p class="mb-0">New to CondoSphere? <a asp-controller="Account" asp-action="Register">Create an account</a></p>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <partial name="_ValidationScriptsPartial" />
}
}
```

```
@model CondoSphere.Core.DTOs.Account.RegisterManagerDto

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Register New Employee";
    ViewData["IsFullWidth"] = true;
}

<style>
    body {
        background-color: var(--light-bg);
    }
</style>

<div class="container my-5">
    <div class="row justify-content-center align-items-center" style="min-height: 70vh;">
        <div class="col-md-11 col-lg-9 col-xl-8">

            <div class="card shadow-lg border-0">
                <div class="card-header text-center py-4" style="background: var(--primary-gradient);">
                    <h2 class="mb-1 text-white"><i class="bi bi-person-plus-fill me-2"></i>@ViewData["Title"]</h2>
                    <p class="mb-0 small text-white-50">Create an account for a new staff member.</p>
                </div>

                <div class="card-body p-4 p-md-5">
                    <form asp-action="RegisterEmployee" method="post">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <div asp-validation-summary="ModelOnly" class="text-danger mb-4"></div>

                        <div class="row">
                            <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
                                <div class="form-floating">
                                    <input asp-for="FirstName" class="form-control" placeholder="First Name" />
                                    <label asp-for="FirstName"></label>
                                    <span asp-validation-for="FirstName" class="text-danger small"></span>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
                                <div class="form-floating">
                                    <input asp-for="LastName" class="form-control" placeholder="Last Name" />
                                    <label asp-for="LastName"></label>
                                    <span asp-validation-for="LastName" class="text-danger small"></span>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
                                <div class="form-floating">
                                    <input asp-for="Email" class="form-control" placeholder="Email Address" />
                                    <label asp-for="Email"></label>
                                    <span asp-validation-for="Email" class="text-danger small"></span>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
                                <div class="form-floating">
                                    <input asp-for="PhoneNumber" class="form-control" placeholder="Phone Number" />
                                    <label asp-for="PhoneNumber"></label>
                                    <span asp-validation-for="PhoneNumber" class="text-danger small"></span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="d-grid gap-2 mt-4">
                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">Register Employee</button>
                            <a asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-secondary">Cancel</a>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <partial name="_ValidationScriptsPartial" />
}
```
